maxTotalThreads) continue //Saving 1 maxThreads for heartbleed\\n        running++\\n        bleedGrab(ns, server, 999, maxThreads).then((bleed) => { //Bleed takes longer than auth at the same threads\\n          running--\\n          bleedResults = bleed\\n        })\\n        while (running > 0) await ns.asleep(4)\\n        for (const results of processing)\\n          if (results.success) return results\\n        if (!await bleedCheck(ns, server, details, bleedResults)) return { success: false }\\n        for (const log of bleedResults.logs) {\\n          let jsonLog\\n          try { jsonLog = JSON.parse(log) } catch { continue }\\n          if (jsonLog.passwordAttempted.toString().length !== details.passwordLength) continue\\n          if (!isNumeric(jsonLog.passwordAttempted)) continue\\n          const altitude = Number(jsonLog.data)\\n          guessed.add(Number(jsonLog.passwordAttempted))\\n          guessedAltitudes[Number(jsonLog.passwordAttempted)] = altitude\\n        }\\n        const newMax = await getMaxAuthThreads(ns, true)\\n        if (newMax > maxTotalThreads) {\\n          maxTotalThreads = newMax\\n          maxThreads = Math.max(1, Math.floor(maxTotalThreads / (needsTesting.length + 1)))\\n        }\\n        tries++\\n        record()\\n      }\\n      //Now that the coarse scan is out of the way, start the climbs.\\n      //The true hill could be at the extreem of left or right.  So, start in a way that we will catch these cases\\n      candidateQueue.push({ x: (MIN + (Math.max(0, Math.floor(trueHillMinWidth / 2)))), alt: await getAltitude((MIN + (Math.max(0, Math.floor(trueHillMinWidth / 2))))) })\\n      candidateQueue.push({ x: (MAX - (Math.max(0, Math.floor(trueHillMinWidth / 2)))), alt: await getAltitude((MAX - (Math.max(0, Math.floor(trueHillMinWidth / 2))))) })\\n      for (let step = Math.ceil((MIN + (Math.max(0, Math.floor(trueHillMinWidth / 2)))) + trueHillMinWidth); step < MAX && !solved; step += Math.max(4, Math.ceil((trueHillMinWidth + stepBonus) / 2))) {\\n        candidateQueue.push({ x: step, alt: await getAltitude(step) })\\n      }\\n\\n      candidateQueue.sort((a, b) => b.alt - a.alt)\\n      for (const test of candidateQueue) {\\n        if (solved) break\\n        //Each test is a possible true hill, sorted by highest first\\n        //Get direction\\n        let direction = 0\\n        if (test.x < MAX) {\\n          let checkPoint = await getAltitude(test.x + 1) //Test 1 to the right\\n          if (test.alt > checkPoint) direction = -1 //We are moving left\\n          else if (test.alt < checkPoint) direction = 1 //We are moving right\\n        }\\n        else {\\n          let checkPoint = await getAltitude(test.x - 1) //Test 1 to the left\\n          if (test.alt < checkPoint) direction = -1 //We are moving left\\n          else if (test.alt > checkPoint) direction = 1 //We are moving right\\n        }\\n        if (solved) break\\n        if (direction === 0) continue\\n        //Climb and refine that hill.\\n        let step = length === 1 ? 1 : length === 2 ? 2 : Math.ceil((minHillSpacing + trueHillMinWidth) / 3)\\n        let pivot = test\\n        while (!solved) {\\n          //If checked1 is higher, we have a new pivot and need to check around it\\n          //Even if it's higher, we could be on the other side of the hill and need to change direction\\n          //If it's lower, we keep our pivot point and still halve the step.\\n          let checked1 = await getAltitude(Math.max(MIN, Math.min(MAX, pivot.x + (direction * step))))\\n          if (checked1 > pivot.alt) {\\n            pivot = { x: Math.max(MIN, Math.min(MAX, pivot.x + (direction * step))), alt: checked1 }\\n            step = Math.ceil(step / 2)\\n            continue\\n          }\\n          let checked2 = await getAltitude(Math.max(MIN, Math.min(MAX, pivot.x + (direction * step * -1))))\\n          if (checked2 > pivot.alt) {\\n            pivot = { x: Math.max(MIN, Math.min(MAX, pivot.x + (direction * step * -1))), alt: checked2 }\\n            step = Math.ceil(step / 2)\\n            direction *= -1\\n            continue\\n          }\\n          if (step === 1) break\\n          step = Math.ceil(step / 2)\\n        }\\n      }\\n      if (solved) return solvedResult\\n      failureReport(ns, server, details)\\n      return { success: false }\\n    }\\n\\n    case \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\": {\\n      if (labComplete !== false) return { success: false }\\n      let lastBlockedRam = Infinity\\n      while (ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer) {\\n        const blockedRam = ns.dnet.getBlockedRam(ns.self().server)\\n        if (blockedRam <= 0) break\\n        if (blockedRam >= lastBlockedRam) break\\n        lastBlockedRam = blockedRam\\n        if (!await tryMemoryReallocation(ns, ns.self().server, complete.get(ns.self().server).pw)) return { success: false }\\n      }\\n\\n      if (!ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer) return { success: false }\\n      if (player.skills.charisma < chaReq)\\n        return { success: false }\\n      if (!ns.dnet.getStasisLinkedServers().includes(ns.self().server) && ns.dnet.getStasisLinkLimit() > ns.dnet.getStasisLinkedServers().length && await proxyHome(ns, \\\"getServerMaxRam\\\", ns.self().server) - await proxyHome(ns, \\\"getServerUsedRam\\\", ns.self().server) >= 13.6)\\n        await proxyLocal(ns, true, \\\"dnet.setStasisLink\\\")\\n      if (!ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer) {\\n        if (ns.dnet.getStasisLinkedServers().includes(ns.self().server)) await proxyLocal(ns, true, \\\"dnet.setStasisLink\\\", false)\\n        return { success: false }\\n      }\\n      if (!labName) {\\n        labName = server\\n        // First worker on a fresh maze name: clear any stale frozen ring\\n        // from a previous run.  Per-worker spawns within the same maze\\n        // keep accumulating into the same ring so we see all workers'\\n        // recent decisions in one place.\\n        labResetDecisionRing()\\n      }\\n      tries = 1\\n      const workerId = ns.self().server + \\\"-\\\" + ns.pid\\n      const failLab = (reason) => {\\n        labDiagDecision(`fail ${reason}`)\\n        labDiag(\\\"fail\\\", `reason=${reason}`)\\n        return { success: false }\\n      }\\n      let claim = null\\n      let skippedClaimKeys = new Set()\\n      let labWorker = 0\\n      let trackedLease = null\\n      let needsPositionSync = false\\n      let labExitHookRegistered = false\\n      // ===== Decision logging =====\\n      // Per-iteration record of meaningful worker decisions, pushed into the\\n      // module-scoped labDecisionRing for rendering at the bottom of the lab\\n      // map.  Format kept short so 30 lines comfortably fit in a screenshot:\\n      //   HH:MM:SS w<pidTail> i=N X,Y EVENT details\\n      let labIter = 0\\n      const labDiagWorkerTag = `w${ns.pid}`\\n      const labDiagPosString = () => {\\n        const pos = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        return Array.isArray(pos) ? `${pos[0]},${pos[1]}` : \\\"?,?\\\"\\n      }\\n      const labDiag = (event, detail = \\\"\\\") => {\\n        if (!labDecisionLog) return\\n        const now = new Date()\\n        const hh = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, \\\"0\\\")\\n        const mm = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, \\\"0\\\")\\n        const ss = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, \\\"0\\\")\\n        const line = `${hh}:${mm}:${ss} ${labDiagWorkerTag} i=${labIter} ${labDiagPosString()} ${event}${detail ? ` ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`\\n        labDecisionPush(line)\\n      }\\n      const labDiagWalk = (label, target, moved) => {\\n        if (!labDecisionLog) return\\n        const tx = Number.isInteger(target?.x) ? target.x : \\\"?\\\"\\n        const ty = Number.isInteger(target?.y) ? target.y : \\\"?\\\"\\n        const status = moved?.arrived ? \\\"arrived\\\" : moved?.blocked ? \\\"blocked\\\" : moved?.desynced ? \\\"desynced\\\" : moved?.noRoute ? \\\"noRoute\\\" : moved?.stepLimit ? \\\"stepLimit\\\" : moved?.workerExited ? \\\"exited\\\" : moved?.lostServer ? \\\"lostServer\\\" : moved?.finished ? \\\"finished\\\" : \\\"stopped\\\"\\n        labDiag(label, `t=${tx},${ty} ${status} s=${moved?.stepsTaken ?? 0}`)\\n      }\\n      const markSkippedClaim = (badClaim) => {\\n        const key = typeof badClaim?.key === \\\"string\\\" && badClaim.key ? badClaim.key : (Number.isInteger(badClaim?.x) && Number.isInteger(badClaim?.y) ? getLabKey(badClaim.x, badClaim.y) : \\\"\\\")\\n        if (!key) return\\n        skippedClaimKeys.add(key)\\n        if (skippedClaimKeys.size > 64) skippedClaimKeys = new Set([key])\\n      }\\n      const pickLabClaimAt = (x, y) => {\\n        const pickerOptions = { skipKeys: skippedClaimKeys }\\n        return claimLabExitSubquadrantTurnback(server, workerId, x, y, pickerOptions)\\n          ?? claimImmediateGoalwardCrossing(server, workerId, x, y, pickerOptions)\\n          ?? claimAdjacentLabRoom(server, workerId, x, y, pickerOptions)\\n          ?? claimNearestRoutedFrontier(server, workerId, x, y, pickerOptions)\\n          ?? claimLabRoom(server, details, workerId, pickerOptions)\\n      }\\n      const updateTrackedLease = (nextClaim = null) => {\\n        if (trackedLease) {\\n          trackedLease.server = server\\n          trackedLease.claim = nextClaim ?? null\\n          trackedLease.workerId = workerId\\n          return\\n        }\\n        trackedLease = { server, claim: nextClaim ?? null, workerId }\\n      }\\n      const releaseTrackedLease = () => {\\n        if (!trackedLease) return\\n        releaseLabClaim(trackedLease.server, trackedLease.claim, trackedLease.workerId)\\n        trackedLease = null\\n      }\\n      const syncLabExit = () => {\\n        if (labExitHookRegistered) return\\n        labExitHookRegistered = true\\n        ns.atExit(() => {\\n          if (trackedLease) releaseLabClaim(trackedLease.server, trackedLease.claim, trackedLease.workerId)\\n          clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        })\\n      }\\n      const shouldPersistLabState = () => labComplete === false || inProgress.has(server)\\n      const refreshLabState = () => {\\n        if (!shouldPersistLabState()) return\\n        const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n        if (state?.layout && state.layout.estimated !== true) return\\n        ensureLabLayout(server, details, chaReq)\\n      }\\n      const prepareLabEntry = async () => {\\n        let lastBlocked = Infinity\\n        while (ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer) {\\n          const blocked = ns.dnet.getBlockedRam(ns.self().server)\\n          if (blocked <= 0) break\\n          if (blocked >= lastBlocked) break\\n          lastBlocked = blocked\\n          if (!await tryMemoryReallocation(ns, ns.self().server, complete.get(ns.self().server).pw)) return false\\n        }\\n        if (!ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer) return false\\n        if (!ns.dnet.getStasisLinkedServers().includes(ns.self().server)\\n          && ns.dnet.getStasisLinkLimit() > ns.dnet.getStasisLinkedServers().length\\n          && await proxyHome(ns, \\\"getServerMaxRam\\\", ns.self().server) - await proxyHome(ns, \\\"getServerUsedRam\\\", ns.self().server) >= 13.6) {\\n          await proxyLocal(ns, true, \\\"dnet.setStasisLink\\\")\\n        }\\n        return ns.dnet.getServerAuthDetails(server).isConnectedToCurrentServer\\n      }\\n      const launchLabWorker = async () => {\\n        let pid = await startLabWorker(ns, server)\\n        if (pid) {\\n          needsPositionSync = true\\n          return pid\\n        }\\n        if (!await prepareLabEntry()) {\\n          return 0\\n        }\\n        pid = await startLabWorker(ns, server)\\n        if (pid) {\\n          needsPositionSync = true\\n        }\\n        return pid\\n      }\\n\\n      const stopLabWorker = async (pid = labWorker) => {\\n        if (!pid) return\\n        await proxyHome(ns, \\\"kill\\\", pid)\\n        clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        if (labWorker === pid) labWorker = 0\\n        syncLabExit()\\n      }\\n      const adoptSharedBootstrap = () => {\\n        return false\\n      }\\n      const commitBootstrapRoom = (roomReport) => {\\n        const [bootstrapX, bootstrapY] = Array.isArray(roomReport?.coords)\\n          ? roomReport.coords\\n          : [1, 1]\\n        recordLabRoom(server, details, bootstrapX, bootstrapY, roomReport, [])\\n        const [rootX, rootY] = getLabActualCoords(bootstrapX, bootstrapY, roomReport, inProgress.get(server))\\n        const bootstrapState = inProgress.get(server)\\n        addLabStartMarker(bootstrapState, rootX, rootY, workerId)\\n        inProgress.set(server, bootstrapState)\\n        updateLabWorkerPosition(server, details, workerId, rootX, rootY)\\n        updateTrackedLease(null)\\n        needsPositionSync = false\\n        syncLabExit()\\n        return { success: true }\\n      }\\n      const bootstrapLabyrinth = async () => {\\n        const probe = await labWork(ns, labWorker, labCurrentRoomCommand)\\n        if (probe?.workerExited) {\\n          clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n          resetLabWorkerRef()\\n          if (adoptSharedBootstrap()) return { success: true }\\n          return failLab(\\\"bootstrap-worker-exited\\\")\\n        }\\n        if (probe?.finished) {\\n          const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n          return await finalizeLabCompletion(probe.authResults.data, completedState, tries + 1)\\n        }\\n        if (probe?.report?.success === false) {\\n          if (adoptSharedBootstrap()) return { success: true }\\n          await stopLabWorker()\\n          return failLab(\\\"bootstrap-report-failed\\\")\\n        }\\n        const probeReport = probe?.report || getLabReportFromAuthResult(probe?.authResults)\\n        if (probeReport) return commitBootstrapRoom(probeReport)\\n        if (!await serverCheck(ns, server, details, probe?.authResults)) {\\n          if (adoptSharedBootstrap()) return { success: true }\\n          await stopLabWorker()\\n          return failLab(\\\"bootstrap-lost-server\\\")\\n        }\\n        if (adoptSharedBootstrap()) return { success: true }\\n        await stopLabWorker()\\n        return failLab(\\\"bootstrap-no-report\\\")\\n      }\\n      const releaseLease = () => {\\n        releaseTrackedLease()\\n        claim = null\\n        syncLabExit()\\n      }\\n      const resetLabWorkerRef = (pid = labWorker) => {\\n        if (labWorker === pid) labWorker = 0\\n        syncLabExit()\\n      }\\n      const stopAllLabWorkers = async () => {\\n        if (labWorker) await stopLabWorker(labWorker)\\n      }\\n      const syncLabWorkerPositionFromReport = async () => {\\n        const current = await labWork(ns, labWorker, labCurrentRoomCommand)\\n        if (current?.workerExited) {\\n          clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n          resetLabWorkerRef()\\n          return { success: false, workerExited: true }\\n        }\\n        if (current?.report?.success === false) return { success: false, lostServer: true }\\n        const report = current?.report\\n        if (!Array.isArray(report?.coords)\\n          || !Number.isInteger(report.coords[0])\\n          || !Number.isInteger(report.coords[1])) return { success: false }\\n        const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n        const [roomX, roomY] = getLabActualCoords(report.coords[0], report.coords[1], report, state)\\n        const path = getLabKnownOrInferredPath(state, roomX, roomY)\\n        recordLabRoom(server, details, roomX, roomY, report, path ?? [], true)\\n        addLabStartMarker(inProgress.get(server), roomX, roomY, workerId)\\n        updateLabWorkerPosition(server, details, workerId, roomX, roomY)\\n        updateTrackedLease(null)\\n        syncLabExit()\\n        return { success: true, x: roomX, y: roomY, report }\\n      }\\n      const finalizeLabCompletion = async (answer, completedState, triesUsed) => {\\n        const existingCompletedState = getLabCompleteState()\\n        const existingCompletedAnswer = getLabCompleteAnswer()\\n        if (existingCompletedState?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && existingCompletedState.rooms) {\\n          completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(existingCompletedState)\\n          if (typeof existingCompletedAnswer === \\\"string\\\" && existingCompletedAnswer) answer = existingCompletedAnswer\\n        }\\n        syncLabAnchorLayout(completedState)\\n        setCompletedLabState(answer, completedState, server)\\n        inProgress.delete(server)\\n        clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        releaseTrackedLease()\\n        claim = null\\n        //if (labName === server) labName = false\\n        await stopAllLabWorkers()\\n        syncLabExit()\\n        updateFull(server, answer, details)\\n        updateTelemetry(details, triesUsed, server)\\n        return { success: true, data: answer }\\n      }\\n      const loseLabyrinth = async () => {\\n        clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        await stopAllLabWorkers()\\n        releaseLease()\\n      }\\n      refreshLabState()\\n      const rootRoom = getLabRootRoom(server)\\n      if (!rootRoom?.jsonLog) {\\n        ns.clearPort(ns.pid)\\n        labWorker = await launchLabWorker()\\n        if (labWorker === 0) return failLab(\\\"launch-worker-bootstrap\\\")\\n        syncLabExit()\\n        const bootstrapResult = await bootstrapLabyrinth()\\n        if (bootstrapResult?.success !== true) return failLab(\\\"bootstrap\\\")\\n        if (bootstrapResult?.data) return bootstrapResult\\n      }\\n      ensureLabLayout(server, details, chaReq)\\n      syncLabExit()\\n\\n      labDiag(\\\"loop-enter\\\", `state-rooms=${inProgress.get(server)?.roomRecordCount ?? 0}`)\\n      while (labComplete === false) {\\n        labIter++\\n        refreshLabState()\\n        if (!labWorker) {\\n          ns.clearPort(ns.pid)\\n          labDiag(\\\"relaunch-worker\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n          labWorker = await launchLabWorker()\\n          if (labWorker === 0) return failLab(\\\"launch-worker-loop\\\")\\n        }\\n        if (needsPositionSync || !getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)) {\\n          labDiag(\\\"sync-position\\\", `needsSync=${needsPositionSync} hasPos=${!!getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)}`)\\n          const syncResult = await syncLabWorkerPositionFromReport()\\n          if (syncResult?.success === true) needsPositionSync = false\\n          else {\\n            if (syncResult?.lostServer) await stopLabWorker()\\n            return failLab(syncResult?.workerExited ? \\\"sync-worker-exited\\\" : (syncResult?.lostServer ? \\\"sync-lost-server\\\" : \\\"sync-position\\\"))\\n          }\\n        }\\n        const workerPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        if (!workerPosition) return failLab(\\\"missing-position\\\")\\n        const [startX, startY] = workerPosition\\n        if (!claim) {\\n          updateTrackedLease(null)\\n          // Standard picker chain.  When all of those return null (typical\\n          // for secondary workers entering a maze where the primary already\\n          // claimed everything, or for a worker whose only candidates trip\\n          // the heuristic filters), fall through to the routing-tree\\n          // \\\"nearest goalforward\\\" claimer that ignores those heuristics and\\n          // simply picks the closest reachable frontier.  This is what\\n          // keeps the worker from doing nothing on entry.\\n          claim = pickLabClaimAt(startX, startY)\\n          labDiag(\\\"picker-chain\\\", `claim=${claim ? `${claim.x},${claim.y}` : \\\"null\\\"} skips=${skippedClaimKeys.size}`)\\n          updateTrackedLease(claim)\\n        } else {\\n          labDiag(\\\"claim-held\\\", `target=${claim.x},${claim.y}`)\\n          updateTrackedLease(claim)\\n        }\\n\\n        if (!claim) {\\n          let idleX\\n          let idleY\\n          const knownPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n          if (!knownPosition) return failLab(\\\"missing-known-position\\\")\\n          const [knownX, knownY] = knownPosition\\n          const currentRoom = getLabRoom(server, knownX, knownY)\\n          if (currentRoom?.explored && currentRoom?.jsonLog) {\\n            idleX = knownX\\n            idleY = knownY\\n            if (!claim) {\\n              const finishDir = getLabCompletionDir(server, knownX, knownY)\\n              if (finishDir) {\\n                const finalStep = await labWork(ns, labWorker, finishDir)\\n                if (finalStep?.finished) {\\n                  const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n                  const delta = labDirections[finishDir]\\n                  const fallbackX = delta ? knownX + delta.dx / 2 : knownX\\n                  const fallbackY = delta ? knownY + delta.dy / 2 : knownY\\n                  applyLabCompletionMarker(server, completedState, fallbackX, fallbackY, finalStep)\\n                  await finalizeLabCompletion(finalStep.authResults.data, completedState, tries + 1)\\n                  return finalStep.authResults\\n                }\\n                if (!await serverCheck(ns, server, details, finalStep?.authResults)) {\\n                  await stopLabWorker()\\n                  return failLab(\\\"finish-step-lost-server\\\")\\n                }\\n              }\\n            }\\n          }\\n          if (!claim) {\\n            const advanceTarget = getLabAdvanceTarget(server, workerId)\\n            labDiag(\\\"advance-pick\\\", advanceTarget ? `target=${advanceTarget.x},${advanceTarget.y} key=${advanceTarget.key}` : \\\"null\\\")\\n            if (advanceTarget) {\\n              const moved = await walkLabToTarget(ns, server, details, workerId, labWorker, advanceTarget, { maxSteps: labWalkStepChunk, reason: \\\"advance\\\" })\\n              labDiagWalk(\\\"advance-walk\\\", advanceTarget, moved)\\n              tries += moved.stepsTaken ?? 0\\n              if (moved.finished) {\\n                const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n                if (completedState?.layout && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) {\\n                  completedState.layout.finishX = moved.exitX\\n                  completedState.layout.finishY = moved.exitY\\n                }\\n                if (completedState && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) completedState.finishKey = getLabKey(moved.exitX, moved.exitY)\\n                await finalizeLabCompletion(moved.authResults.data, completedState, tries)\\n                return moved.authResults\\n              }\\n              if (moved.workerExited) {\\n                clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n                resetLabWorkerRef()\\n                return failLab(\\\"advance-worker-exited\\\")\\n              }\\n              if (moved.lostServer) {\\n                await stopLabWorker()\\n                return failLab(\\\"advance-lost-server\\\")\\n              }\\n              if (moved.arrived === true || (moved.stepsTaken ?? 0) > 0) {\\n                skippedClaimKeys.clear()\\n                continue\\n              }\\n              if (moved.noRoute && advanceTarget?.key) {\\n                labDiag(\\\"advance-mark-skipped\\\", `key=${advanceTarget.key}`)\\n                markSkippedClaim(advanceTarget)\\n              }\\n            }\\n            const retreatTarget = getLabRetreatTarget(server, workerId)\\n            labDiag(\\\"retreat-pick\\\", retreatTarget ? `target=${retreatTarget.x},${retreatTarget.y} key=${retreatTarget.key}` : \\\"null\\\")\\n            if (retreatTarget) {\\n              const moved = await walkLabToTarget(ns, server, details, workerId, labWorker, retreatTarget, { maxSteps: 1, reason: \\\"retreat\\\" })\\n              labDiagWalk(\\\"retreat-walk\\\", retreatTarget, moved)\\n              tries += moved.stepsTaken ?? 0\\n              if (moved.finished) {\\n                const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n                if (completedState?.layout && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) {\\n                  completedState.layout.finishX = moved.exitX\\n                  completedState.layout.finishY = moved.exitY\\n                }\\n                if (completedState && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) completedState.finishKey = getLabKey(moved.exitX, moved.exitY)\\n                await finalizeLabCompletion(moved.authResults.data, completedState, tries)\\n                return moved.authResults\\n              }\\n              if (moved.workerExited) {\\n                clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n                resetLabWorkerRef()\\n                return failLab(\\\"retreat-worker-exited\\\")\\n              }\\n              if (moved.lostServer) {\\n                await stopLabWorker()\\n                return failLab(\\\"retreat-lost-server\\\")\\n              }\\n              if (moved.arrived === true || (moved.stepsTaken ?? 0) > 0) {\\n                skippedClaimKeys.clear()\\n                continue\\n              }\\n              if (moved.noRoute && retreatTarget?.key) {\\n                labDiag(\\\"retreat-mark-skipped\\\", `key=${retreatTarget.key}`)\\n                markSkippedClaim(retreatTarget)\\n              }\\n            }\\n            if (Number.isInteger(idleX) && Number.isInteger(idleY)) {\\n              const finishDir = getLabCompletionDir(server, idleX, idleY)\\n              if (finishDir) {\\n                labDiag(\\\"idle-finish-attempt\\\", `dir=${finishDir} from=${idleX},${idleY}`)\\n                const finalStep = await labWork(ns, labWorker, finishDir)\\n                if (finalStep?.finished) {\\n                  const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n                  const delta = labDirections[finishDir]\\n                  const fallbackX = delta ? idleX + delta.dx / 2 : idleX\\n                  const fallbackY = delta ? idleY + delta.dy / 2 : idleY\\n                  applyLabCompletionMarker(server, completedState, fallbackX, fallbackY, finalStep)\\n                  await finalizeLabCompletion(finalStep.authResults.data, completedState, tries + 1)\\n                  return finalStep.authResults\\n                }\\n                if (!await serverCheck(ns, server, details, finalStep?.authResults)) {\\n                  await stopLabWorker()\\n                  return failLab(\\\"idle-finish-lost-server\\\")\\n                }\\n              }\\n            }\\n            {\\n              // Re-run the full picker chain.  This used to skip the retry\\n              // and stop the worker whenever ANY other worker had an\\n              // active claim — which made secondary workers give up the\\n              // moment the primary picked anything, \\\"doing nothing\\\" for\\n              // the entire run.  We now always retry: if the routing\\n              // tree has any reachable frontier, we claim it.\\n              claim = pickLabClaimAt(knownX, knownY)\\n              labDiag(\\\"idle-picker-retry\\\", `claim=${claim ? `${claim.x},${claim.y}` : \\\"null\\\"} skips=${skippedClaimKeys.size}`)\\n              updateTrackedLease(claim)\\n              if (claim) continue\\n              if (skippedClaimKeys.size > 0) {\\n                labDiag(\\\"idle-clear-skips\\\", `cleared=${skippedClaimKeys.size}`)\\n                skippedClaimKeys.clear()\\n              }\\n              labDiag(\\\"idle-yield\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n              // Picker truly empty for this iteration.  We must yield\\n              // control to the runtime — looping synchronously here\\n              // freezes the game.  ns.asleep(0) is the shortest possible\\n              // yield (single tick of the event loop, no artificial\\n              // wait), so the worker resumes the moment ANYTHING else\\n              // moves: another worker recording a room, the renderer\\n              // ticking, etc.  This is a yield, not a pause.\\n              await ns.asleep(0)\\n              continue\\n            }\\n          }\\n          if (claim) continue\\n          continue\\n        }\\n\\n        let roomReport = getLabRoomReport(server, claim.x, claim.y) || false\\n        const currentPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n        if (!currentPosition) return failLab(\\\"missing-current-position\\\")\\n        const [currentX, currentY] = currentPosition\\n        const claimRoom = getLabRoom(server, claim.x, claim.y)\\n        if (claimRoom?.claimedBy && claimRoom.claimedBy !== workerId) {\\n          labDiag(\\\"claim-stolen\\\", `target=${claim.x},${claim.y} by=${claimRoom.claimedBy}`)\\n          releaseLease()\\n          claim = null\\n          continue\\n        }\\n        if (claimRoom?.explored) {\\n          labDiag(\\\"claim-already-explored\\\", `target=${claim.x},${claim.y}`)\\n          releaseLease()\\n          claim = null\\n          continue\\n        }\\n        if (currentX !== claim.x || currentY !== claim.y) {\\n          const moved = await walkLabToTarget(ns, server, details, workerId, labWorker, claim, { maxSteps: labWalkStepChunk, reason: claim.gateway ? \\\"gateway-claim\\\" : \\\"claim\\\" })\\n          labDiagWalk(\\\"claim-walk\\\", claim, moved)\\n          tries += moved.stepsTaken ?? 0\\n          if (moved.finished) {\\n            const completedState = cloneCompletedLabState(inProgress.get(server) ?? getLabCompleteState())\\n            if (completedState?.layout && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) {\\n              completedState.layout.finishX = moved.exitX\\n              completedState.layout.finishY = moved.exitY\\n            }\\n            if (completedState && Number.isInteger(moved.exitX) && Number.isInteger(moved.exitY)) completedState.finishKey = getLabKey(moved.exitX, moved.exitY)\\n            await finalizeLabCompletion(moved.authResults.data, completedState, tries)\\n            return moved.authResults\\n          }\\n          if (moved.workerExited) {\\n            releaseLease()\\n            clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n            resetLabWorkerRef()\\n            return failLab(\\\"claim-worker-exited\\\")\\n          }\\n          if (moved.lostServer) {\\n            releaseLease()\\n            await stopLabWorker()\\n            return failLab(\\\"claim-lost-server\\\")\\n          }\\n          if (moved.quadrantCrossed) {\\n            // Crossed into a more-goalward quadrant mid-walk.  Drop the\\n            // existing claim so the picker chain re-runs from the new\\n            // in-quadrant position; this gives claimImmediateGoalwardCrossing\\n            // and claimAdjacentLabRoom first crack at any local goalward\\n            // frontier before the routed picker reaches for distant work.\\n            labDiag(\\\"claim-quadrant-crossed\\\", `at=${moved.currentX},${moved.currentY}`)\\n            releaseLease()\\n            claim = null\\n            continue\\n          }\\n          if (moved.stepLimit && (moved.stepsTaken ?? 0) > 0) {\\n            skippedClaimKeys.clear()\\n            continue\\n          }\\n          if (moved.arrived !== true) {\\n            if ((moved.noRoute || (moved.stepsTaken ?? 0) === 0) && claim) {\\n              labDiag(\\\"claim-mark-skipped\\\", `key=${claim.key} reason=${moved.noRoute ? \\\"noRoute\\\" : \\\"zeroSteps\\\"}`)\\n              markSkippedClaim(claim)\\n            }\\n            releaseLease()\\n            claim = null\\n            await ns.asleep(0)\\n            continue\\n          }\\n          if (moved.report) roomReport = moved.report\\n        }\\n        if (!roomReport) {\\n          labDiag(\\\"claim-no-report\\\", `target=${claim.x},${claim.y}`)\\n          releaseLease()\\n          continue\\n        }\\n        const [roomX, roomY] = labDiag(\\\"claim-chain\\\", claim ? `next=${claim.x},${claim.y}` : \\\"null\\\")\\n        updateTrackedLease(claim)\\n      }\\n      await loseLabyrinth()\\n      return No artificial delay — nextPortWrite\\n  // wakes up exactly when data arrives.\\n  await ns.nextPortWrite(port)\\n  return ns.readPort(port)\\n}\\n\\nfunction romanToDecimal(details) {\\n  if (details === \\\"nulla\\\") return 0\\n  const values = {\\n    I: 1,\\n    V: 5,\\n    X: 10,\\n    L: 50,\\n    C: 100,\\n    D: 500,\\n    M: 1000\\n  }\\n  let total = 0;\\n  const romanNums = details.split(\\\"\\\")\\n  for (let i = 0; i < romanNums.length; i++) {\\n    const current = values[romanNums[i]]\\n    const next = values[romanNums[i + 1]]\\n    if (next && current < next) {\\n      total -= current\\n    } else {\\n      total += current\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return total\\n}\\n//Handles fractions...  Damn you\\nfunction convertToBase10(value) {//numberStr, base) {\\n  function charToValue(char) {\\n    if (char >= '0' && char <= '9') return char.charCodeAt(0) - 48\\n    if (char >= 'A' && char <= 'Z') return char.charCodeAt(0) - 55\\n    if (char >= 'a' && char <= 'z') return char.charCodeAt(0) - 87\\n    throw new Error(`Invalid digit: ${char}`)\\n  }\\n  const numberStr = value[0]\\n  const base = value[1]\\n  const [intPart, fracPart = \\\"\\\"] = numberStr.split('.')\\n  let result = 0\\n  // Integer part\\n  for (let i = 0; i < intPart.length; i++) {\\n    const digit = charToValue(intPart[i])\\n    result += digit * Math.pow(base, intPart.length - i - 1)\\n  }\\n  // Fractional part\\n  for (let i = 0; i < fracPart.length; i++) {\\n    const digit = charToValue(fracPart[i])\\n    result += digit * Math.pow(base, -(i + 1))\\n  }\\n  return result\\n}\\nfunction isNumeric(value) {\\n  const testing = value.split(\\\"\\\")\\n  for (const test of testing)\\n    if (test >= '0' && test <= \\\"9\\\") continue\\n    else return false\\n  return true\\n}\\nfunction isAlphabetic(value) {\\n  for (const test of value.split(\\\"\\\"))\\n    if (!lettersLCase.concat(lettersUCase).includes(test.toString())) return false\\n  return true\\n}\\nfunction isAlphanumeric(value) {\\n  let numeric = false\\n  let alphabetic = false\\n  for (const test of value.split(\\\"\\\")) {\\n    if (test >= '0' && test <= \\\"9\\\") numeric = true\\n    else if (lettersLCase.concat(lettersUCase).includes(test.toString())) alphabetic = true\\n  }\\n  return numeric && alphabetic\\n}\\nfunction factorial(n) {\\n  let result = 1n\\n  for (let i = 2n; i <= n; i++) {\\n    result *= i\\n  }\\n  return result\\n}\\nfunction permutationCount(arr) {\\n  const counts = new Map()\\n  for (const v of arr) {\\n    counts.set(v, (counts.get(v) || 0) + 1)\\n  }\\n  let numerator = factorial(BigInt(arr.length))\\n  let denominator = 1n\\n  for (const count of counts.values()) {\\n    denominator *= factorial(BigInt(count))\\n  }\\n  return numerator / denominator\\n}\\nfunction getWorker() {\\n  const blob = new Blob([workerCode], { type: \\\"application/javascript\\\" })\\n  const worker = new Worker(URL.createObjectURL(blob))\\n  return worker\\n}\\n\\nconst workerCode = `\\n// Does this candidate satisfy all constraints?\\nfunction candidateSatisfiesAll(x, constraints) {\\n  for (const { k, r } of constraints) {\\n    const m = k % 32;\\n    if (m === 0) continue;\\n    if ((x % k) % m !== r) return false;\\n  }\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\n// Extended GCD for modular inverse with a save return of null on 0\\nfunction modInverse(a, m) {\\n  a = ((a % m) + m) % m;\\n  if (m === 0) return null;\\n\\n  let m0 = m;\\n  let x0 = 0, x1 = 1;\\n\\n  while (a > 1) {\\n    if (m === 0) return null;\\n\\n    const q = Math.floor(a / m);\\n    [a, m] = [m, a % m];\\n    [x0, x1] = [x1 - q * x0, x0];\\n  }\\n\\n  if (x1 < 0) x1 += m0;\\n  return x1;\\n}\\n\\n\\n// Combine two modular constraints using CRT\\nfunction combineModConstraints(a1, m1, a2, m2) {\\n  // Enforce integer invariants early\\n  if (\\n    !Number.isInteger(a1) ||\\n    !Number.isInteger(m1) ||\\n    !Number.isInteger(a2) ||\\n    !Number.isInteger(m2)) { return null; }\\n\\n  const d = gcd(m1, m2);\\n  if ((a2 - a1) % d !== 0) return null;\\n  const m1d = m1 / d;\\n  const m2d = m2 / d;\\n  const inv = modInverse(m1d, m2d);\\n  if (inv === null) return null;\\n  const t = ((a2 - a1) / d) % m2d;\\n  let x = a1 + m1 * ((t * inv) % m2d);\\n  const mod = m1 * m2d;\\n\\n  // Normalize\\n  x = ((x % mod) + mod) % mod;\\n\\n  // Final safety gate\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(mod)) return null;\\n\\n  return { x, mod };\\n}\\n\\n\\n// Greatest common divisor\\nfunction gcd(a, b) {\\n  a = Math.abs(a);\\n  b = Math.abs(b);\\n  while (b !== 0) {\\n    const t = b;\\n    b = a % b;\\n    a = t;\\n  }\\n  return a;\\n}\\n\\n//Entry point\\nfunction getNextCandidate(data) {\\n  let [candidate, tripleConstraints, tries, MIN, MAX, tried] = data;\\n  const testGroup = [31, 29, 28, 27, 25, 23, 19, 17, 13, 11];\\n  \\n  // Phase 0 - baseline tests, adaptive to length.  Will go 1 over max as it tends to save 1 try\\n  let testedValue = 1;\\n  for (const p of testGroup) {\\n    testedValue *= p;\\n    if (!tried.has(p)) return p;\\n    if (testedValue > MAX) break;\\n  }\\n\\n  // Phase 2: CRT\\n  const crtConstraints = tripleConstraints\\n    .map(({ k, r }) => ({ a: r, m: k % 32 }))\\n    .filter(c => c.m !== 0);\\n\\n  if (crtConstraints.length > 0) {\\n    let crt = { x: crtConstraints[0].a, mod: crtConstraints[0].m };\\n    let valid = true;\\n\\n    for (let i = 1; i < crtConstraints.length; i++) {\\n      const res = combineModConstraints(\\n        crt.x,\\n        crt.mod,\\n        crtConstraints[i].a,\\n        crtConstraints[i].m\\n      );\\n\\n      if (res === null) {\\n        valid = false;\\n        break;\\n      }\\n\\n      crt = res;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (valid) {\\n      let x = crt.x;\\n      const mod = crt.mod;\\n\\n      if (x < MIN) x += Math.ceil((MIN - x) / mod) * mod;\\n\\n      while (x <= MAX) {\\n        if (!tried.has(x) && candidateSatisfiesAll(x, tripleConstraints)) {\\n          return x;\\n        }\\n        x += mod;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  \\n  // Phase 3 - brute force with what we have\\n  let next = candidate + 1;\\n  let issue = false\\n  while (!candidateSatisfiesAll(next, tripleConstraints) || tried.has(next)) {\\n    next++;\\n    if (next > MAX) {\\n    if (issue) throw new Error(\\\"No possible code found for BigMod\\\");\\n      next = MIN;\\n      issue = true;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return next;\\n}\\nfunction getNextCode([tested, testFeedback, lastGuessRaw, pool, cursorRaw, timeBudgetMs]) {\\n  const length = lastGuessRaw.length;\\n  const candidate = new Array(length);\\n  const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(50, Number(timeBudgetMs) || 1000);\\n  const TIMEOUT = { timeout: true };\\n  let checked = 0;\\n  let sawTestedCandidate = false;\\n  let lastChecked = [];\\n\\n  function isValidCursor(cursor) {\\n    if (!Array.isArray(cursor) || cursor.length !== length) return false;\\n    for (const value of cursor) {\\n      if (!Number.isInteger(value) || value < 0 || value >= pool.length) return false;\\n    }\\n    return true;\\n  }\\n\\n  const cursor = isValidCursor(cursorRaw)\\n    ? cursorRaw.slice()\\n    : isValidCursor(lastGuessRaw)\\n      ? lastGuessRaw.slice()\\n      : null;\\n  if (cursor) lastChecked = cursor.slice();\\n\\n  function updatePrunedCursor(pos) {\\n    const pruned = candidate.slice(0, pos);\\n    while (pruned.length < length) pruned.push(pool.length - 1);\\n    lastChecked = pruned;\\n  }\\n\\n  function dfs(pos, cursorRelation) {\\n    if (Date.now() > deadline) return TIMEOUT;\\n    if (pos === length) {\\n      if (cursor && cursorRelation !== 1) return null;\\n      checked++;\\n      const key = candidate.join(\\\",\\\");\\n      if (!tested.has(key) && isPossible(candidate, testFeedback)) {\\n        lastChecked = candidate.slice();\\n        return candidate.slice();\\n      }\\n      if (tested.has(key)) sawTestedCandidate = true;\\n      lastChecked = candidate.slice();\\n      return null;\\n    }\\n\\n    for (let d = 0; d < pool.length; d++) {\\n      let nextCursorRelation = cursorRelation;\\n      if (cursor && cursorRelation === 0) {\\n        if (d < cursor[pos]) continue;\\n        if (d > cursor[pos]) nextCursorRelation = 1;\\n      }\\n      candidate[pos] = d;\\n\\n      if (!prefixPossible(candidate, pos + 1, testFeedback)) {\\n        updatePrunedCursor(pos + 1);\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n\\n      const result = dfs(pos + 1, nextCursorRelation);\\n      if (result === TIMEOUT || result) return result;\\n    }\\n    return null;\\n  }\\n\\n  const result = dfs(0, cursor ? 0 : 1);\\n  if (result === TIMEOUT) {\\n    return { guess: null, cursor: lastChecked.slice(), checked, exhausted: false, sawTestedCandidate };\\n  }\\n  if (!result) {\\n    return { guess: null, cursor: lastChecked.slice(), checked, exhausted: true, sawTestedCandidate };\\n  }\\n  return { guess: result, cursor: result.slice(), checked, exhausted: false, sawTestedCandidate };\\n}\\n\\nfunction prefixPossible(candidate, len, testFeedback) {\\n  for (const { guess, feedback } of testFeedback) {\\n    const targetBlk = Number(feedback.blk);\\n\\n    let blk = 0;\\n    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {\\n      if (candidate[i] === guess[i]) {\\n        blk++;\\n        if (blk > targetBlk) return false;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const remaining = guess.length - len;\\n    if (blk + remaining < targetBlk) return false;\\n  }\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\n\\nfunction scoreFast(guessRaw, codeRaw, expected) {\\n  let blk = 0, wht = 0;\\n  const guessCount = new Map();\\n  const codeCount = new Map();\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < guessRaw.length; i++) {\\n    if (guessRaw[i] === codeRaw[i]) {\\n      blk++;\\n      if (blk > expected.blk) return null;\\n    } else {\\n      guessCount.set(guessRaw[i], (guessCount.get(guessRaw[i]) || 0) + 1);\\n      codeCount.set(codeRaw[i], (codeCount.get(codeRaw[i]) || 0) + 1);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [k, v] of guessCount) {\\n    if (codeCount.has(k)) {\\n      wht += Math.min(v, codeCount.get(k));\\n      if (blk + wht > expected.blk + expected.wht) return null;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { blk, wht };\\n}\\nfunction* digitArraysFrom(start, pool) {\\n  const arr = start.slice();\\n  if (!increment(arr, pool)) return;\\n\\n  while (true) {\\n    yield arr.slice();\\n    if (!increment(arr, pool)) return;\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction increment(arr, pool) {\\n  const base = pool.length;\\n  let i = arr.length - 1;\\n\\n  while (i >= 0) {\\n   if (arr[i] < base - 1) {\\n      arr[i]++;\\n      return true;\\n    }\\n    arr[i] = 0;\\n    i--;\\n  }\\n  return false;\\n}\\nfunction isPossible(testRaw, testFeedback) {\\n  for (const { guess, feedback } of testFeedback) {\\n    const expected = {\\n      blk: Number(feedback.blk),\\n      wht: Number(feedback.wht)\\n    };\\n\\n    const s = scoreFast(guess, testRaw, expected);\\n\\n    if (s === null) return false;\\n\\n    // Final exact check (scoreFast may early-exit before full count)\\n    if (s.blk !== expected.blk || s.wht !== expected.wht) {\\n      return false;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\nfunction getNextUniquePermutation([array, guessed, restraints]) {\\n  let bestResult = [];\\n  let lowestScore = Infinity;\\n  let found = false;\\n  const nums = [...array].sort(); // sort to group duplicates\\n  const used = Array(nums.length).fill(false);\\n\\n  function squaredDistance(a, b) {\\n    let sum = 0;\\n    for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {\\n      const d = a[i] - b[i];\\n      sum += d * d;\\n    }\\n    return sum;\\n  }\\n  function rmsError(candidate, tests) {\\n    let error = 0;\\n    for (const { guess, rms } of tests) {\\n      const g = guess.split(\\\"\\\").map(Number);\\n      const sse = squaredDistance(candidate, g);\\n      const expected = rms * rms * candidate.length;\\n      error += Math.abs(sse - expected);\\n    }\\n    return error\\n  }\\n\\n  function backtrack(current) {\\n    if (current.length === nums.length) {\\n      if (guessed.has(current.join(\\\",\\\"))) return;\\n      if (restraints.length === 0) {\\n        bestResult = current.slice();\\n        found = true;\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      else {\\n        const testScore = rmsError(current, restraints);\\n        if (testScore < lowestScore) {\\n          //We need to save memory.  No slicing here.\\n          for (let i = 0; i < current.length; i++)\\n            bestResult[i] = current[i];\\n          lowestScore = testScore;\\n          return;\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n    for (let i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {\\n      // Skip already-used elements\\n      if (used[i]) continue;\\n      // Skip duplicates:\\n      // only allow the first unused instance\\n      if (i > 0 && nums[i] === nums[i - 1] && !used[i - 1]) continue;\\n      used[i] = true;\\n      current.push(nums[i]);\\n      backtrack(current);\\n      if (restraints.length === 0 && found) break\\n      current.pop();\\n      used[i] = false;\\n    };\\n  };\\n  backtrack([]);\\n  return bestResult;\\n}\\n// ==============================\\n// PIX BLACK-ONLY MULTISET SOLVER\\n// ==============================\\nfunction pixGetNextCode([tested, testFeedback, lastGuessRaw, pool, cursorRaw, timeBudgetMs]) {\\n  const sortedPool = pool.slice().sort((a, b) => a - b);\\n  const length = sortedPool.length;\\n  const candidate = new Array(length);\\n  const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(50, Number(timeBudgetMs) || 1000);\\n  const TIMEOUT = { timeout: true };\\n\\n  // Build multiset\\n  const values = [];\\n  const counts = [];\\n  for (const v of sortedPool) {\\n    const i = values.indexOf(v);\\n    if (i === -1) {\\n      values.push(v);\\n      counts.push(1);\\n    } else {\\n      counts[i]++;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  let checked = 0;\\n  let sawTestedCandidate = false;\\n  let lastChecked = [];\\n\\n  function hasSameMultiset(candidateRaw) {\\n    if (!Array.isArray(candidateRaw) || candidateRaw.length !== length) return false;\\n    const remaining = new Map();\\n    for (const v of sortedPool) remaining.set(v, (remaining.get(v) || 0) + 1);\\n    for (const v of candidateRaw) {\\n      const count = remaining.get(v) || 0;\\n      if (count <= 0) return false;\\n      remaining.set(v, count - 1);\\n    }\\n    for (const count of remaining.values()) if (count !== 0) return false;\\n    return true;\\n  }\\n\\n  const cursor = hasSameMultiset(cursorRaw)\\n    ? cursorRaw.slice()\\n    : hasSameMultiset(lastGuessRaw)\\n      ? lastGuessRaw.slice()\\n      : null;\\n  if (cursor) lastChecked = cursor.slice();\\n  const valueIndexByKey = new Map();\\n  for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) valueIndexByKey.set(values[i], i);\\n  const openCountsScratch = new Array(values.length).fill(0);\\n  const feedbackConstraints = testFeedback.map(({ guess, feedback }) => ({\\n    guess,\\n    required: Number(feedback.blk)\\n  }));\\n\\n  function maxRemainingExactMatches(guess, pos) {\\n    openCountsScratch.fill(0);\\n    for (let i = pos; i < length; i++) {\\n      const valueIndex = valueIndexByKey.get(guess[i]);\\n      if (valueIndex !== undefined) openCountsScratch[valueIndex]++;\\n    }\\n    let max = 0;\\n    for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {\\n      max += Math.min(counts[i], openCountsScratch[i]);\\n    }\\n    return max;\\n  }\\n\\n  function updatePrunedCursor(pos) {\\n    const pruned = candidate.slice(0, pos);\\n    for (let i = values.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\\n      for (let count = 0; count < counts[i]; count++) pruned.push(values[i]);\\n    }\\n    lastChecked = pruned;\\n  }\\n\\n  function candidateMatchesFeedback(testRaw) {\\n    for (const { guess, required } of feedbackConstraints) {\\n      let blk = 0;\\n      for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {\\n        if (testRaw[i] === guess[i]) blk++;\\n      }\\n      if (blk !== required) return false;\\n    }\\n    return true;\\n  }\\n\\n  function dfs(pos, cursorRelation) {\\n    if (Date.now() > deadline) return TIMEOUT;\\n\\n    for (const constraint of feedbackConstraints) {\\n      const { guess, required } = constraint;\\n      let blk = 0;\\n      for (let i = 0; i < pos; i++) {\\n        if (candidate[i] === guess[i]) blk++;\\n      }\\n\\n      // Upper bound: too many matches already\\n      if (blk > required) {\\n        updatePrunedCursor(pos);\\n        return null;\\n      }\\n\\n      // Lower bound: cannot possibly reach required matches\\n      if (blk + maxRemainingExactMatches(guess, pos) < required) {\\n        updatePrunedCursor(pos);\\n        return null;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    if (pos === length) {\\n      if (cursor && cursorRelation !== 1) return null;\\n      checked++;\\n      lastChecked = candidate.slice();\\n      const key = candidate.join(\\\",\\\");\\n\\n      if (!candidateMatchesFeedback(candidate)) return null;\\n      if (tested.has(key)) {\\n        sawTestedCandidate = true;\\n        return null;\\n      }\\n      return candidate.slice();\\n    }\\n\\n    for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {\\n      if (counts[i] === 0) continue;\\n      const value = values[i];\\n      let nextCursorRelation = cursorRelation;\\n      if (cursor && cursorRelation === 0) {\\n        if (value < cursor[pos]) continue;\\n        if (value > cursor[pos]) nextCursorRelation = 1;\\n      }\\n      candidate[pos] = value;\\n      counts[i]--;\\n      const result = dfs(pos + 1, nextCursorRelation);\\n      if (result === TIMEOUT || result) {\\n        counts[i]++;\\n        return result;\\n      }\\n      updatePrunedCursor(pos + 1);\\n      counts[i]++;\\n    }\\n    return null;\\n  }\\n\\n  function validateFeedbackAgainstPool(pool, testFeedback) {\\n    const poolCounts = {};\\n    for (const v of pool) {\\n      poolCounts[v] = (poolCounts[v] || 0) + 1;\\n    }\\n    for (const { guess } of testFeedback) {\\n      const guessCounts = {};\\n      for (const v of guess) {\\n        guessCounts[v] = (guessCounts[v] || 0) + 1;\\n      }\\n      for (const k in guessCounts) {\\n        if (!poolCounts[k] || guessCounts[k] > poolCounts[k]) {\\n          throw new Error(\\n            \\\"Feedback guess contains symbols not compatible with pool\\\"\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  validateFeedbackAgainstPool(sortedPool, testFeedback);\\n  const result = dfs(0, cursor ? 0 : 1);\\n  if (result === TIMEOUT) {\\n    return { guess: null, cursor: lastChecked.slice(), checked, exhausted: false, sawTestedCandidate };\\n  }\\n  if (!result) {\\n    return { guess: null, cursor: lastChecked.slice(), checked, exhausted: true, sawTestedCandidate };\\n  }\\n  return { guess: result, cursor: result.slice(), checked, exhausted: false, sawTestedCandidate };\\n}\\nonmessage = (event) => {\\n  try {\\n    postMessage([eval(event.data[0])(event.data[1])]);\\n  } catch (e) {\\n    postMessage(null); // always return something\\n  }\\n};\\n`;\\n//Ram dodged functions below and their file writes\\nasync function proxyHome(ns, func, ...argmnts) { return await runIt(ns, %s\\\", result)\\n          break;\\n      }\\n    }\\n    await ns.asleep(200)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// LABYRINTH SOLVER — high-level overview\\n//\\n// Map structure (per Bitburner's \\\"darknet labyrinth\\\" mode):\\n//   * The maze sits in a fixed bounding box.  Rooms occupy the ODD-coordinate\\n//     grid points; even coordinates are wall slots between rooms.\\n//   * The whole maze is enclosed by an outer-ring wall (the layout boundary).\\n//     No room can ever exit out of that boundary.\\n//   * The maze is partitioned into FOUR top-level quadrants by a + of\\n//     boundary walls running through the middle.  Between any two adjacent\\n//     quadrants there is exactly ONE open passage.  Once we discover that\\n//     passage, EVERY OTHER potential crossing on that boundary segment is\\n//     guaranteed to be a wall.\\n//   * The start lives in the top-left quadrant.  The exit lives in the\\n//     bottom-right quadrant — and inside that quadrant the exit is itself in\\n//     the bottom-right sub-quadrant (so the heuristic prefers heading\\n//     down-right within the goal quadrant).\\n//\\n// Solver strategy:\\n//   1. recordLabRoom stores every visited room's exits, expands the frontier\\n//      to neighbouring unexplored rooms, and prunes any frontier cells that\\n//      are now provably unreachable / useless.\\n//   2. buildLabWallCache derives extra \\\"inferred walls\\\" from the layout rules\\n//      above — outer ring + one-passage-per-quadrant.  These are blockedEdges\\n//      that pathfinding must respect even though `room.exits` doesn't yet\\n//      list them.\\n//   3. The routing graph keeps corridor paths collapsed into edges, so a\\n//      worker can ask for the next step toward a target without rebuilding a\\n//      full-room travel map on every move.\\n//   4. claimLabRoom / getLabAdvanceTarget / claimAdjacentLabRoom score the\\n//      candidate frontier targets with a multi-tier comparison:\\n//        progress class (toward goal quadrant) → progress amount → branch\\n//        penalty (heading into a known-enclosed branch is Infinity) → influence\\n//        (distance to exit-target corner) → goal distance → tie-breakers.\\n//      The picked target becomes a routing-table target.\\n//   5. walkLabToTarget asks that routing table for exactly one next step,\\n//      then handles blocked / desync results by re-recording the current room.\\n//\\n// Caches use narrow state versions where possible.  Layout-only helpers\\n// key off labLayoutVersion, wall/enclosure helpers key off labWallVersion,\\n// and frontier-wide scans still use labTopologyVersion.\\n// =============================================================================\\n\\n// Labyrinth global commands and variables\\n//\\n// labDirections — for each cardinal direction give the (dx, dy) delta to step\\n// to the neighbouring room (rooms sit on the odd grid so deltas are ±2) and\\n// the back-direction string used when checking the inverse exit.\\nconst labDirections = {\\n  north: { dx: 0, dy: -2, back: \\\"south\\\" },\\n  south: { dx: 0, dy: 2, back: \\\"north\\\" },\\n  east: { dx: 2, dy: 0, back: \\\"west\\\" },\\n  west: { dx: -2, dy: 0, back: \\\"east\\\" }\\n}\\nconst labDirectionEntries = Object.entries(labDirections)\\nconst labDirectionIndex = { north: 0, east: 1, south: 2, west: 3 }\\nconst labPackedCoordOffset = 4096\\nconst labPackedCoordSpan = labPackedCoordOffset * 2\\nconst labDimensionsByCha = {\\n  300: { mazeWidth: 20, mazeHeight: 14, offsetStartAndEnd: false },\\n  600: { mazeWidth: 30, mazeHeight: 20, offsetStartAndEnd: false },\\n  1500: { mazeWidth: 40, mazeHeight: 26, offsetStartAndEnd: false },\\n  2500: { mazeWidth: 60, mazeHeight: 40, offsetStartAndEnd: true },\\n  3000: { mazeWidth: 60, mazeHeight: 40, offsetStartAndEnd: true },\\n  3500: { mazeWidth: 60, mazeHeight: 40, offsetStartAndEnd: true },\\n  4000: { mazeWidth: 60, mazeHeight: 40, offsetStartAndEnd: true }\\n}\\nconst labMapFill = \\\"\\\\u2588\\\"\\nconst labMapPossibleHall = \\\"·\\\"\\nconst labMapUnknownRoom = labMapPossibleHall\\nconst labMapOpen = \\\" \\\"\\nconst labMapStart = \\\"S\\\"\\nconst labMapFinish = \\\"X\\\"\\nconst labMapWorker = \\\"o\\\"\\nconst labCurrentRoomCommand = \\\"nothing\\\"\\n\\n// Labyrinth function declarations\\n\\nfunction labDiagNow() {\\n  return (typeof performance !== \\\"undefined\\\" && performance?.now) ? performance.now() : Date.now()\\n}\\n\\nfunction labDiagStart() {\\n  return labDiagnostics ? labDiagNow() : 0\\n}\\n\\nfunction labDiagEnd(label, startedAt, detail = \\\"\\\") {\\n  if (!labDiagnostics || !startedAt) return\\n  const elapsed = labDiagNow() - startedAt\\n  let stat = labDiagStats.get(label)\\n  if (!stat) {\\n    stat = { count: 0, total: 0, max: 0 }\\n    labDiagStats.set(label, stat)\\n  }\\n  stat.count++\\n  stat.total += elapsed\\n  if (elapsed > stat.max) stat.max = elapsed\\n  if (elapsed >= labDiagSlowMs) {\\n    labDiagLastSlowLine = `${label} ${elapsed.toFixed(1)}ms${detail ? ` ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction labDiagDecision(detail = \\\"\\\") {\\n  if (labDiagnostics && detail) labDiagLastDecision = detail\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabDiagnosticsText() {\\n  if (!labDiagnostics) return \\\"\\\"\\n  const top = Array.from(labDiagStats.entries())\\n    .sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)\\n    .slice(0, 4)\\n    .map(([name, s]) => `${name} n=${s.count} avg=${(s.total / Math.max(1, s.count)).toFixed(1)} max=${s.max.toFixed(1)}`)\\n    .join(\\\" | \\\")\\n  const deadState = labDisableDeadRoomDetection ? \\\"dead rooms off\\\" : \\\"dead rooms on\\\"\\n  if (!top && !labDiagLastDecision && !labDiagLastSlowLine) return `${deadState} | waiting for timings`\\n  return `${deadState}${top ? ` | ${top}` : \\\"\\\"}${labDiagLastDecision ? ` | decision ${labDiagLastDecision}` : \\\"\\\"}${labDiagLastSlowLine ? ` | last ${labDiagLastSlowLine}` : \\\"\\\"}`\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCompleteAnswer() {\\n  if (typeof labComplete === \\\"string\\\") return labComplete\\n  if (labComplete && typeof labComplete.answer === \\\"string\\\") return labComplete.answer\\n  return false\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCompleteState() {\\n  if (labComplete && typeof labComplete === \\\"object\\\" && labComplete.state) return normalizeLabOrigin(labComplete.state)\\n  return null\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCompleteMap() {\\n  if (labComplete && typeof labComplete === \\\"object\\\" && Array.isArray(labComplete.map)) return labComplete.map.slice()\\n  return null\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCompleteServerName() {\\n  if (labComplete && typeof labComplete === \\\"object\\\") {\\n    if (typeof labComplete.serverName === \\\"string\\\" && labComplete.serverName) return labComplete.serverName\\n    if (typeof labComplete.state?.serverName === \\\"string\\\" && labComplete.state.serverName) return labComplete.state.serverName\\n  }\\n  if (complete instanceof Map) {\\n    for (const [server, record] of complete.entries()) {\\n      if (record?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\") return String(server)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return \\\"\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabMapServerName() {\\n  if (labName) return String(labName)\\n  return getLabCompleteServerName()\\n}\\n\\nfunction cloneCompletedLabState(state) {\\n  if (!state) return null\\n  let finalState = null\\n  try {\\n    finalState = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state))\\n  }\\n  catch {\\n    return null\\n  }\\n  finalState.workers = {}\\n  finalState.displayMap = []\\n  finalState.displayLayoutKey = \\\"\\\"\\n  finalState.workerClaims = {}\\n  finalState.workerClaimIndexReady = true\\n  finalState.frontierKeys = {}\\n  finalState.frontierIndexReady = false\\n  finalState.routing = null\\n  for (const room of Object.values(finalState.rooms ?? {})) room.claimedBy = \\\"\\\"\\n  return finalState\\n}\\n\\nfunction setCompletedLabState(answer, state, serverName = \\\"\\\") {\\n  const finalState = state\\n    ? cloneCompletedLabState(state)\\n    : (getLabCompleteState() ? String(labName) : \\\"\\\")\\n  if (finalState && completedServerName) finalState.serverName = completedServerName\\n  normalizeLabOrigin(finalState)\\n  syncLabAnchorLayout(finalState)\\n  labComplete = {\\n    answer: answer,\\n    serverName: completedServerName,\\n    state: finalState,\\n    map: finalState ? buildLabMapObject(finalState, true) : (getLabCompleteMap() ?? [])\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction normalizeLabMapLine(line) {\\n  if (typeof line !== \\\"string\\\") return \\\"\\\"\\n  if (line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u001b\\\") === -1 && line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u00c2\\\") === -1 && line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u00c3\\\") === -1) return line\\n  return line\\n    .replace(/\\\\u001b\\\\[[0-9;]*m/g, \\\"\\\")\\n    .replace(/\\\\u00c2\\\\u00b7/g, \\\"\\\\u00b7\\\")\\n    .replace(/\\\\u00c3\\\\u0082\\\\u00c2\\\\u00b7/g, \\\"\\\\u00b7\\\")\\n}\\n\\nfunction getReactLib() {\\n  return globalThis[\\\"React\\\"] ?? globalThis[\\\"window\\\"]?.React\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabMapDimensions(map = []) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(map)) return { cols: 0, rows: 0 }\\n  return {\\n    cols: map.reduce((best, line) => {\\n      if (typeof line !== \\\"string\\\") return best\\n      const width = (line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u001b\\\") === -1 && line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u00c2\\\") === -1 && line.indexOf(\\\"\\\\u00c3\\\") === -1)\\n        ? line.length\\n        : normalizeLabMapLine(line).length\\n      return Math.max(best, width)\\n    }, 0),\\n    rows: map.length\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/** @param {NS} ns */\\nfunction autoSizeLabTail(ns, map, options = {}) {\\n  const { cols, rows } = getLabMapDimensions(map)\\n  const cellSize = options.cellSize ?? 15\\n  const cellGap = options.cellGap ?? 2\\n  const paddingX = options.paddingX ?? 46\\n  // Reserve extra vertical space for the decision-log panel rendered\\n  // beneath the map (labDecisionRingMax lines × ~13px line height +\\n  // a little padding).  Only adds height when the log is enabled.\\n  const decisionLogHeight = labDecisionLog ? Math.max(0, labDecisionRingMax) * 13 + 16 : 0\\n  const paddingY = (options.paddingY ?? 162) + decisionLogHeight\\n  const minWidth = options.minWidth ?? 360\\n  const minHeight = options.minHeight ?? 268\\n  const width = Math.max(minWidth, paddingX + (cols * (cellSize + cellGap)))\\n  const height = Math.max(minHeight, paddingY + (rows * (cellSize + cellGap)))\\n  ns.ui.resizeTail(width, height)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCellPresentation(char) {\\n  if (char === \\\"\\\\u00b7\\\" || char === labMapPossibleHall || char === labMapUnknownRoom) {\\n    return {\\n      background: \\\"linear-gradient(135deg, #07111f, #0b2a36)\\\",\\n      borderColor: \\\"#0e7490\\\",\\n      color: \\\"#67e8f9\\\",\\n      label: \\\"\\\",\\n      name: \\\"Hallway\\\",\\n      boxShadow: \\\"inset 0 0 8px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.14)\\\",\\n      opacity: 0.35\\n    }\\n  }\\n  switch (char) {\\n    case labMapFill:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"linear-gradient(135deg, #020617, #050816)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#111827\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#020617\\\",\\n        label: \\\"\\\",\\n        name: \\\"Wall\\\",\\n        boxShadow: \\\"inset 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75)\\\"\\n      }\\n    case labMapPossibleHall:\\n    case labMapUnknownRoom:\\n    case \\\"Â·\\\":\\n      return { background: \\\"#9ca3af\\\", borderColor: \\\"#6b7280\\\", color: \\\"#111827\\\", label: \\\"\\\", name: \\\"Hallway\\\" }\\n    case labMapOpen:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"linear-gradient(135deg, #0b1f18, #146c3c)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#34d399\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#bbf7d0\\\",\\n        label: \\\"\\\",\\n        name: \\\"Open\\\",\\n        boxShadow: \\\"0 0 9px rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.46), inset 0 0 10px rgba(134, 239, 172, 0.22)\\\"\\n      }\\n    case labMapStart:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"radial-gradient(circle, #f0fdf4 0%, #86efac 24%, #22c55e 54%, #064e3b 100%)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#f0fdf4\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#022c22\\\",\\n        label: \\\"S\\\",\\n        name: \\\"Start\\\",\\n        outline: \\\"1px solid rgba(240, 253, 244, 0.78)\\\"\\n      }\\n    case labMapFinish:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"radial-gradient(circle, #fecaca 0%, #ef4444 40%, #7f1d1d 100%)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#fecaca\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#450a0a\\\",\\n        label: \\\"X\\\",\\n        name: \\\"Finish\\\"\\n      }\\n    case labMapWorker:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"radial-gradient(circle, #67e8f9 0%, #06b6d4 46%, #164e63 100%)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#cffafe\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#042f2e\\\",\\n        label: \\\"o\\\",\\n        name: \\\"Worker\\\"\\n      }\\n    default:\\n      return {\\n        background: \\\"linear-gradient(135deg, #030712, #111827)\\\",\\n        borderColor: \\\"#1f2937\\\",\\n        color: \\\"#64748b\\\",\\n        label: (char ?? \\\"\\\").trim(),\\n        name: \\\"Unknown\\\",\\n        boxShadow: \\\"inset 0 0 8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8)\\\"\\n      }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCanvasCellPresentation(char) {\\n  if (char === \\\"\\\\u00b7\\\" || char === labMapPossibleHall || char === labMapUnknownRoom) {\\n    return { fill: \\\"#082536\\\", stroke: \\\"#0e7490\\\", alpha: 0.55, label: \\\"\\\", labelColor: \\\"#67e8f9\\\" }\\n  }\\n  switch (char) {\\n    case labMapFill:\\n      return { fill: \\\"#030712\\\", stroke: \\\"#111827\\\", alpha: 1, label: \\\"\\\", labelColor: \\\"#020617\\\" }\\n    case labMapOpen:\\n      return { fill: \\\"#147044\\\", stroke: \\\"#34d399\\\", alpha: 1, label: \\\"\\\", labelColor: \\\"#bbf7d0\\\", glow: \\\"#34d399\\\" }\\n    case labMapStart:\\n      return { fill: \\\"#86efac\\\", stroke: \\\"#f0fdf4\\\", alpha: 1, label: \\\"S\\\", labelColor: \\\"#022c22\\\" }\\n    case labMapFinish:\\n      return { fill: \\\"#ef4444\\\", stroke: \\\"#fecaca\\\", alpha: 1, label: \\\"X\\\", return { fill: \\\"#111827\\\", stroke: \\\"#1f2937\\\", alpha: 1, label: (char ?? \\\"\\\").trim(), labelColor: \\\"#64748b\\\" }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction drawLabMapCanvas(canvas, map, options = {}) {\\n  if (!canvas || !Array.isArray(map)) return\\n  const { cols, rows } = getLabMapDimensions(map)\\n  const cellSize = options.cellSize ?? 15\\n  const cellGap = options.cellGap ?? 2\\n  const previousMap = Array.isArray(options.previousMap) ? options.previousMap : null\\n  const pixelRatio = Math.max(1, Math.min(2, globalThis?.devicePixelRatio ?? 1))\\n  const width = Math.max(1, cols * cellSize + Math.max(0, cols - 1) * cellGap)\\n  const height = Math.max(1, rows * cellSize + Math.max(0, rows - 1) * cellGap)\\n  const canvasWidth = Math.ceil(width * pixelRatio)\\n  const canvasHeight = Math.ceil(height * pixelRatio)\\n  let fullRedraw = options.fullRedraw === true\\n  if (canvas.width !== canvasWidth) { canvas.width = canvasWidth; fullRedraw = true }\\n  if (canvas.height !== canvasHeight) { canvas.height = canvasHeight; fullRedraw = true }\\n  if (canvas.style.width !== `${width}px`) canvas.style.width = `${width}px`\\n  if (canvas.style.height !== `${height}px`) canvas.style.height = `${height}px`\\n  const ctx = canvas.getContext(\\\"2d\\\")\\n  if (!ctx) return\\n  ctx.setTransform(pixelRatio, 0, 0, pixelRatio, 0, 0)\\n  if (!previousMap || previousMap.length !== rows || getLabMapDimensions(previousMap).cols !== cols) fullRedraw = true\\n  const background = \\\"#020617\\\"\\n  if (fullRedraw) {\\n    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height)\\n    ctx.fillStyle = background\\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height)\\n  }\\n  ctx.textAlign = \\\"center\\\"\\n  ctx.textBaseline = \\\"middle\\\"\\n  ctx.font = `700 ${Math.max(8, cellSize - 4)}px monospace`\\n  const drawCell = (x, y, char) => {\\n    const cell = getLabCanvasCellPresentation(char)\\n    const px = x * (cellSize + cellGap)\\n    const py = y * (cellSize + cellGap)\\n    if (!fullRedraw) {\\n      ctx.shadowBlur = 0\\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1\\n      ctx.fillStyle = background\\n      ctx.clearRect(px, py, cellSize, cellSize)\\n      ctx.fillRect(px, py, cellSize, cellSize)\\n    }\\n    ctx.globalAlpha = cell.alpha ?? 1\\n    if (cell.glow) {\\n      ctx.shadowColor = cell.glow\\n      ctx.shadowBlur = cellSize * 0.35\\n    }\\n    else {\\n      ctx.shadowBlur = 0\\n    }\\n    ctx.fillStyle = cell.fill\\n    ctx.fillRect(px, py, cellSize, cellSize)\\n    ctx.shadowBlur = 0\\n    ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(1, (cell.alpha ?? 1) + 0.2)\\n    ctx.strokeStyle = cell.stroke\\n    ctx.lineWidth = 1\\n    ctx.strokeRect(px + 0.5, py + 0.5, Math.max(1, cellSize - 1), Math.max(1, cellSize - 1))\\n    if (cell.label) {\\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1\\n      ctx.fillStyle = cell.labelColor\\n      ctx.fillText(cell.label, px + cellSize / 2, py + cellSize / 2 + 0.5)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  if (fullRedraw) {\\n    for (let y = 0; y < rows; y++) {\\n      const row = typeof map[y] === \\\"string\\\" ? map[y] : \\\"\\\"\\n      for (let x = 0; x < cols; x++) drawCell(x, y, row[x] ?? labMapFill)\\n    }\\n  } else {\\n    const dirty = new Set()\\n    const addDirtyCell = (x, y) => {\\n      if (x >= 0 && x < cols && y >= 0 && y < rows) dirty.add(y * cols + x)\\n    }\\n    for (let y = 0; y < rows; y++) {\\n      const row = typeof map[y] === \\\"string\\\" ? map[y] : \\\"\\\"\\n      const previousRow = typeof previousMap?.[y] === \\\"string\\\" ? previousMap[y] : \\\"\\\"\\n      for (let x = 0; x < cols; x++) {\\n        if (previousRow[x] === (row[x] ?? labMapFill)) continue\\n        for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) {\\n          for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) addDirtyCell(x + dx, y + dy)\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n    for (const cellIndex of dirty) {\\n      const x = cellIndex % cols\\n      const y = Math.floor(cellIndex / cols)\\n      const row = typeof map[y] === \\\"string\\\" ? map[y] : \\\"\\\"\\n      drawCell(x, y, row[x] ?? labMapFill)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 1\\n  ctx.shadowBlur = 0\\n}\\n\\nfunction LabMapApp({ ns, options = {} }) {\\n  const React = getReactLib()\\n  const e = React.createElement\\n  const refreshMs = options.refreshMs ?? 200\\n  const cellSize = options.cellSize ?? 15\\n  const cellGap = options.cellGap ?? 2\\n  const canvasRef = React.useRef(null)\\n  const lastSizeKeyRef = React.useRef(\\\"\\\")\\n  const lastDrawnMapRef = React.useRef([])\\n  const [snapshot, setSnapshot] = React.useState({ map: [], versionKey: \\\"\\\", updatedAt: 0, hasData: false, serverName: \\\"\\\", diagnostics: \\\"\\\", decisionLog: \\\"\\\", cols: 0, rows: 0, fullRedraw: true })\\n  React.useEffect(() => {\\n    let cancelled = false\\n    let timer = 0\\n    let lastNonEmptyMap = []\\n    let lastKey = \\\"\\\"\\n    let lastMapVersionKey = \\\"\\\"\\n    let lastNormalizedMap = []\\n    const tick = async () => {\\n      const nextServerName = getLabMapServerName()\\n      const rawMapObject = await getLabMapObject(ns)\\n      const rawRows = Array.isArray(rawMapObject) ? rawMapObject : rawMapObject?.rows\\n      const mapVersionKey = typeof rawMapObject?.versionKey === \\\"string\\\" && rawMapObject.versionKey\\n        ? rawMapObject.versionKey\\n        : (Array.isArray(rawRows) ? rawRows.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") : \\\"\\\")\\n lastNormalizedMap\\n        else {\\n          nextMap = rawRows.map((line) => normalizeLabMapLine(line))\\n          lastMapVersionKey = mapVersionKey\\n          lastNormalizedMap = nextMap\\n        }\\n      }\\n      const diagnostics = getLabDiagnosticsText()\\n      const decisionLog = getLabDecisionRingText()\\n      if (nextMap.length > 0) lastNonEmptyMap = nextMap.slice()\\n      else if (lastNonEmptyMap.length > 0) nextMap = lastNonEmptyMap.slice()\\n      const { cols, rows } = getLabMapDimensions(nextMap)\\n      const nextKey = `${nextServerName}\\\\n${mapVersionKey}\\\\n${diagnostics}\\\\n${decisionLog}`\\n      if (!cancelled && nextKey !== lastKey) {\\n        lastKey = nextKey\\n        const sizeKey = `${cols}x${rows}:${cellSize}:${cellGap}`\\n        const fullRedraw = sizeKey !== lastSizeKeyRef.current\\n        if (sizeKey !== lastSizeKeyRef.current) {\\n          lastSizeKeyRef.current = sizeKey\\n          autoSizeLabTail(ns, nextMap, options)\\n        }\\n        setSnapshot({\\n          map: nextMap,\\n          versionKey: mapVersionKey,\\n          updatedAt: Date.now(),\\n          hasData: nextMap.length > 0,\\n          serverName: nextServerName,\\n          diagnostics,\\n          decisionLog,\\n          cols,\\n          rows,\\n          fullRedraw\\n        })\\n      }\\n      if (!cancelled && modeShowMap) timer = setTimeout(tick, refreshMs)\\n    }\\n    autoSizeLabTail(ns, [], options)\\n    tick()\\n    return () => {\\n      cancelled = true\\n      if (timer) clearTimeout(timer)\\n    }\\n  }, [ns, refreshMs, cellSize, cellGap, options.paddingX, options.paddingY, options.minWidth, options.minHeight, modeShowMap])\\n  React.useEffect(() => {\\n    if (!snapshot.hasData) return\\n    drawLabMapCanvas(canvasRef.current, snapshot.map, {\\n      cellSize,\\n      cellGap,\\n      previousMap: lastDrawnMapRef.current,\\n      fullRedraw: snapshot.fullRedraw\\n    })\\n    lastDrawnMapRef.current = snapshot.map\\n  }, [snapshot.versionKey, snapshot.hasData, snapshot.fullRedraw, cellSize, cellGap])\\n\\n  const cols = snapshot.cols\\n  const rows = snapshot.rows\\n  const legend = [\\n    { label: \\\"Wall\\\", char: labMapFill },\\n    { label: \\\"Hall\\\", char: labMapPossibleHall },\\n    { label: \\\"Room\\\", char: labMapOpen },\\n    { label: \\\"Start\\\", char: labMapStart },\\n    { label: \\\"Finish\\\", char: labMapFinish },\\n    { label: \\\"Worker\\\", char: labMapWorker }\\n  ]\\n  const displayName = gap: \\\"12px\\\",\\n    marginBottom: \\\"14px\\\",\\n    color: \\\"#ecfeff\\\",\\n    fontFamily: \\\"monospace\\\",\\n    letterSpacing: \\\"0.08em\\\"\\n  }\\n  const infoStyle = {\\n    color: \\\"#22d3ee\\\",\\n    fontSize: \\\"11px\\\",\\n    textShadow: \\\"0 0 8px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.65)\\\"\\n  }\\n  const gridStyle = {\\n    display: \\\"inline-block\\\",\\n    padding: \\\"14px\\\",\\n    background: \\\"linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.96), rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.58))\\\",\\n    border: \\\"1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.34)\\\",\\n    borderRadius: \\\"14px\\\",\\n    boxShadow: \\\"0 0 0 1px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.18), 0 20px 42px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72), inset 0 0 36px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.14)\\\"\\n  }\\n  const containerStyle = {\\n    padding: \\\"14px\\\",\\n    background: [\\n      \\\"radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.18), transparent 30%)\\\",\\n      \\\"radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12), minHeight: \\\"100%\\\",\\n    fontFamily: \\\"monospace\\\",\\n    boxShadow: \\\"inset 0 0 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.62)\\\"\\n  }\\n  const legendStyle = {\\n    display: \\\"flex\\\",\\n    flexWrap: Mono\\n  // font + pre-wrap so each entry stays on its own line and the whole thing\\n  // is screen-capturable as a single rectangle. borderRadius: \\\"3px\\\",\\n              boxShadow: cell.boxShadow,\\n              opacity: cell.opacity ?? 1,\\n              outline: cell.outline,\\n              outlineOffset: \\\"-1px\\\",\\n              display: \\\"flex\\\",\\n              alignItems: \\\"center\\\",\\n              justifyContent: \\\"center\\\",\\n              color: cell.color,\\n              fontSize:
