decisionLogStyle }, snapshot.decisionLog) : null\\n  ])\\n}\\n/** @param {NS} ns */\\nasync function startMapDisplay(ns, options = {}) {\\n  while (!labName) await ns.asleep(200)\\n  const React = getReactLib()\\n  ns.ui.openTail()\\n  if (!React) return\\n  ns.clearLog()\\n  ns.printRaw(React.createElement(LabMapApp, { ns, options }))\\n}\\n\\n\\nasync function labWork(ns, labWorker, dir) {\\n  const diag = labDiagStart()\\n  if (!labWorker) {\\n    const result = { finished: false, workerExited: true, authResults: false }\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"labWork\\\", diag, `dir=${dir} missing-worker`)\\n    return result\\n  }\\n  ns.clearPort(ns.pid)\\n  ns.writePort(labWorker, dir.toString())\\n  const result = await readQueuedPort(ns, ns.pid)\\n  labDiagEnd(\\\"labWork\\\", diag, `dir=${dir} finished=${!!result?.finished} exited=${!!result?.workerExited}`)\\n  return result\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabKey(x, y) {\\n  return `${x},${y}`\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabRoom(server, x, y) {\\n  return inProgress.get(server)?.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabRoomReport(server, x, y) {\\n  return getLabRoom(server, x, y)?.jsonLog ?? false\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabRootRoom(server) {\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (typeof state?.rootKey === \\\"string\\\" && state.rootKey && state.rooms?.[state.rootKey]) return state.rooms[state.rootKey]\\n  return null\\n}\\n\\nfunction normalizeLabOrigin(state) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return state\\n  const knownRoomCount = Number.isInteger(state.roomRecordCount) ? state.roomRecordCount : Object.keys(state.rooms).length\\n  if (knownRoomCount <= 0) return state\\n  const rootRoom = (typeof state.rootKey === \\\"string\\\" && state.rootKey && state.rooms?.[state.rootKey])\\n    ? state.rooms[state.rootKey]\\n    : Object.values(state.rooms).find((room) => Array.isArray(room?.path) && room.path.length === 0)\\n  if (!rootRoom || !Number.isInteger(rootRoom.x) || !Number.isInteger(rootRoom.y)) return state\\n\\n  if (Array.isArray(rootRoom.jsonLog?.coords)\\n    && Number.isInteger(rootRoom.jsonLog.coords[0])\\n    && Number.isInteger(rootRoom.jsonLog.coords[1])) {\\n    state.coordOffsetX = rootRoom.x - rootRoom.jsonLog.coords[0]\\n    state.coordOffsetY = rootRoom.y - rootRoom.jsonLog.coords[1]\\n  }\\n\\n  const finishRoom = (typeof state.finishKey === \\\"string\\\" && state.finishKey && state.rooms?.[state.finishKey]) ? state.rooms[state.finishKey] : null\\n  if (state.layout) {\\n    const layoutChanged = state.layout.startX !== rootRoom.x || state.layout.startY !== rootRoom.y\\n    state.layout.startX = rootRoom.x\\n    state.layout.startY = rootRoom.y\\n    if (layoutChanged) bumpLabTopologyVersion(state, { layout: true, wall: true, routing: true })\\n  }\\n\\n  state.rootKey = getLabKey(rootRoom.x, rootRoom.y)\\n  if (finishRoom && Number.isInteger(finishRoom.x) && Number.isInteger(finishRoom.y)) state.finishKey = getLabKey(finishRoom.x, finishRoom.y)\\n  return state\\n}\\n\\nfunction syncLabAnchorLayout(state) {\\n  if (!state?.layout) return state\\n  const rootRoom = typeof state.rootKey === \\\"string\\\" && state.rootKey ? state.rooms?.[state.rootKey] : null\\n  if (rootRoom) {\\n    const changed = state.layout.startX !== rootRoom.x || state.layout.startY !== rootRoom.y\\n    state.layout.startX = rootRoom.x\\n    state.layout.startY = rootRoom.y\\n    if (changed) bumpLabTopologyVersion(state, { layout: true, wall: true, routing: true })\\n  }\\n  return state\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabVersionCounters(state) {\\n  if (!state) return state\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(state.labTopologyVersion)) state.labTopologyVersion = 0\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(state.labLayoutVersion)) state.labLayoutVersion = state.labTopologyVersion\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(state.labWallVersion)) state.labWallVersion = state.labTopologyVersion\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(state.labRoutingVersion)) state.labRoutingVersion = state.labTopologyVersion\\n  return state\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabVersion(state, key) {\\n  ensureLabVersionCounters(state)\\n  return Number.isInteger(state?.[key]) ? state[key] : 0\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWallVersion(state) {\\n  return getLabVersion(state, \\\"labWallVersion\\\")\\n}\\n\\nfunction bumpLabTopologyVersion(state, options = {}) {\\n  ensureLabVersionCounters(state)\\n  if (!state) return\\n  const all = Object.keys(options ?? {}).length === 0\\n  state.labTopologyVersion++\\n  if (all || options.layout === true) state.labLayoutVersion++\\n  if (all || options.wall === true) state.labWallVersion++\\n  if (all || options.routing === true) state.labRoutingVersion++\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabAnchorCoords(state, keyName, fallbackX, fallbackY) {\\n  const roomKey = typeof state?.[keyName] === \\\"string\\\" && state[keyName] ? state[keyName] : \\\"\\\"\\n  const room = roomKey ? state?.rooms?.[roomKey] : null\\n  if (room && Number.isInteger(room.x) && Number.isInteger(room.y)) return [room.x, room.y]\\n  if (Number.isInteger(fallbackX) && Number.isInteger(fallbackY)) return [fallbackX, fallbackY]\\n  return [null, null]\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabStartCollections(state) {\\n  if (!state) return state\\n  if (!Array.isArray(state.startKeys)) state.startKeys = []\\n  if (!state.workerStarts || typeof state.workerStarts !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.workerStarts)) state.workerStarts = {}\\n  return state\\n}\\n\\nfunction addLabStartMarker(state, x, y, workerId = \\\"\\\") {\\n  if (!state || !Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(y)) return state\\n  ensureLabStartCollections(state)\\n  const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n  if (!state.startKeys.includes(key)) state.startKeys.push(key)\\n  if (workerId && !state.workerStarts[workerId]) state.workerStarts[workerId] = { x, y }\\n  return state\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabStartMarkerCoords(state) {\\n  ensureLabStartCollections(state)\\n  const keys = new Set(Array.isArray(state?.startKeys) ? state.startKeys : [])\\n  if (typeof state?.rootKey === \\\"string\\\" && state.rootKey) keys.add(state.rootKey)\\n  const coords = []\\n  for (const key of keys) {\\n    const room = state?.rooms?.[key]\\n    if (room && Number.isInteger(room.x) && Number.isInteger(room.y)) coords.push([room.x, room.y])\\n  }\\n  return coords\\n}\\n\\nfunction cloneLabReport(report) {\\n  if (!report) return report\\n  return {\\n    success: report.success !== false,\\n    coords: Array.isArray(report.coords) ? report.coords.slice() : null,\\n    north: Boolean(report.north),\\n    east: Boolean(report.east),\\n    south: Boolean(report.south),\\n    west: Boolean(report.west)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabRawCoordsFromAuthResult(result) {\\n  const message = typeof result?.message === \\\"string\\\" ? result.message : \\\"\\\"\\n  const match = message.match(/(?:You have moved to|You are still at)\\\\s+(-?\\\\d+)\\\\s*,\\\\s*(-?\\\\d+)\\\\./i)\\n  if (!match) return null\\n  const rawX = Number(match[1])\\n  const rawY = Number(match[2])\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(rawX) || !Number.isInteger(rawY)) return null\\n  return [rawX, rawY]\\n}\\n\\nfunction parseLabAuthData(data) {\\n  if (typeof data !== \\\"string\\\") return null\\n  const rows = data.split(/\\\\r?\\\\n/)\\n  if (rows.length < 3) return null\\n  let atX = -1\\n  let atY = -1\\n  for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < rows.length; rowIndex++) {\\n    const markerIndex = rows[rowIndex].indexOf(\\\"@\\\")\\n    if (markerIndex < 0) continue\\n    atX = markerIndex\\n    atY = rowIndex\\n    break\\n  }\\n  if (atY < 0 || atX < 0) return null\\n  const charAt = (x, y) => {\\n    if (y < 0 || y >= rows.length) return labMapFill\\n    const row = rows[y]\\n    if (x < 0 || x >= row.length) return labMapFill\\n    return row[x]\\n  }\\n  const isOpen = (char) => typeof char === \\\"string\\\" && char !== \\\"\\\" && char !== labMapFill\\n  return {\\n    north: isOpen(charAt(atX, atY - 1)),\\n    east: isOpen(charAt(atX + 1, atY)),\\n    south: isOpen(charAt(atX, atY + 1)),\\n    west: isOpen(charAt(atX - 1, atY))\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabReportFromAuthResult(result) {\\n  const coords = getLabRawCoordsFromAuthResult(result)\\n  const exits = parseLabAuthData(result?.data)\\n  if (!Array.isArray(coords) || !exits) return false\\n  return {\\n    success: true,\\n    coords: coords.slice(),\\n    north: exits.north,\\n    east: exits.east,\\n    south: exits.south,\\n    west: exits.west\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabActualCoords(x, y, report, state = null) {\\n  if (Array.isArray(report?.coords) && Number.isInteger(report.coords[0]) && Number.isInteger(report.coords[1])) {\\n    const offsetX = Number.isInteger(state?.coordOffsetX) ? state.coordOffsetX : 0\\n    const offsetY = Number.isInteger(state?.coordOffsetY) ? state.coordOffsetY : 0\\n    return [report.coords[0] + offsetX, report.coords[1] + offsetY]\\n  }\\n  return [x, y]\\n}\\n\\nfunction sanitizeLabRoomExits(state, x, y, exits) {\\n  const cleanExits = { ...exits }\\n  if (x === 1) cleanExits.west = false\\n  if (y === 1) cleanExits.north = false\\n  if (!state?.layout) return cleanExits\\n  if (x <= state.layout.minX) cleanExits.west = false\\n  if (y <= state.layout.minY) cleanExits.north = false\\n  if (Number.isInteger(state.layout.finishX) && Number.isInteger(state.layout.finishY)) {\\n    if (x >= state.layout.maxX && !(state.layout.finishX === x && state.layout.finishY === y)) cleanExits.east = false\\n    if (y >= state.layout.maxY && !(state.layout.finishX === x && state.layout.finishY === y)) cleanExits.south = false\\n  }\\n  return cleanExits\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabMoveCoords(currentX, currentY, expectedX, expectedY, report, state = null) {\\n  const [actualX, actualY] = getLabActualCoords(expectedX, expectedY, report, state)\\n  if (actualX === currentX && actualY === currentY) return { status: \\\"blocked\\\", x: currentX, y: currentY }\\n  if (actualX === expectedX && actualY === expectedY) return { status: \\\"moved\\\", x: expectedX, y: expectedY }\\n  return { status: \\\"mismatch\\\", x: currentX, y: currentY, reportedX: actualX, reportedY: actualY }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCompletionCoords(server, fallbackX, fallbackY, result) {\\n  const rawCoords = getLabRawCoordsFromAuthResult(result?.authResults)\\n  if (Array.isArray(rawCoords)) {\\n    const [actualX, actualY] = getLabActualCoords(rawCoords[0], rawCoords[1], { coords: rawCoords }, inProgress.get(server))\\n    if (Number.isInteger(actualX) && Number.isInteger(actualY)) return [actualX, actualY]\\n  }\\n  return [fallbackX, fallbackY]\\n}\\n\\nfunction applyLabCompletionMarker(server, completedState, fallbackX, fallbackY, result) {\\n  const [finishX, finishY] = getLabCompletionCoords(server, fallbackX, fallbackY, result)\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(finishX) || !Number.isInteger(finishY)) return [null, null]\\n  if (completedState?.layout) {\\n    completedState.layout.finishX = finishX\\n    completedState.layout.finishY = finishY\\n  }\\n  if (completedState) completedState.finishKey = getLabKey(finishX, finishY)\\n  return [finishX, finishY]\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabGoalDistance(state, x, y) {\\n  if (!state?.layout) return Infinity\\n  if (!Number.isFinite(state.layout.goalX) || !Number.isFinite(state.layout.goalY)) return Infinity\\n  return Math.abs(x - state.layout.goalX) + Math.abs(y - state.layout.goalY)\\n}\\n\\n// Distance metric the routing picker should rank by — different from\\n// raw Manhattan-to-the-exit-corner because in non-goal quadrants we want\\n// the BOUNDARY into the next-rank quadrant to be the immediate target,\\n// not the exit corner itself.\\n//\\n// Three cases:\\n//   * Inside goal quadrant: Manhattan distance to (goalX, goalY).  Drives\\n//     the final approach to the exit cell.\\n//   * Adjacent quadrant (one axis matches the goal side, one doesn't):\\n//     distance to the SINGLE boundary line that crosses into the goal\\n//     quadrant.  E.g. TR → distance to its south edge (the TR/BR\\n//     boundary).  Stepping along the matching axis doesn't change this\\n//     metric, so the picker drives the worker toward the boundary.\\n//   * Opposite-corner quadrant (both axes mismatch — the typical start\\n//     quadrant when start and exit are diagonal corners): TWO boundary\\n//     lines lead to a rank-1 quadrant.  The metric is the MINIMUM of the\\n//     distances to the two boundaries, so the worker heads toward\\n//     whichever crossing is closer.\\nfunction getLabGoalQuadrantBoundaryDistance(state, x, y) {\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  if (!layout) return Infinity\\n  const context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  if (!context) return getLabGoalDistance(state, x, y)\\n  const goalBounds = getLabQuadrantBounds(context.goalSideX, context.goalSideY, context)\\n  if (!goalBounds) return getLabGoalDistance(state, x, y)\\n  if (isLabCoordsInsideBounds(x, y, goalBounds)) return getLabGoalDistance(state, x, y)\\n  const currentBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)\\n  if (!currentBounds) return Infinity\\n  const xMismatch = currentBounds.sideX !== context.goalSideX\\n  const yMismatch = currentBounds.sideY !== context.goalSideY\\n  // Boundary line of `currentBounds` adjacent to the goal side: the\\n  // edge between this quadrant and the adjacent goal-side quadrant.\\n  const xBoundary = context.goalSideX === 1 ? currentBounds.maxX : currentBounds.minX\\n  const yBoundary = context.goalSideY === 1 ? currentBounds.maxY : currentBounds.minY\\n  const xDist = Math.abs(x - xBoundary)\\n  const yDist = Math.abs(y - yBoundary)\\n  if (xMismatch && yMismatch) return Math.min(xDist, yDist)\\n  if (xMismatch) return xDist\\n  return yDist\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabAxisGoalward(state, fromX, fromY, toX, toY, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const layout = context?.layout ?? state?.layout\\n  if (!layout) return false\\n  const goalX = context?.exitTargetX ?? (context?.goalSideX === 1 ? layout.maxX : layout.minX)\\n  const goalY = context?.exitTargetY ?? (context?.goalSideY === 1 ? layout.maxY : layout.minY)\\n  if (![fromX, fromY, toX, toY, goalX, goalY].every(Number.isFinite)) return false\\n  return Math.abs(toX - goalX) <= Math.abs(fromX - goalX)\\n    && Math.abs(toY - goalY) <= Math.abs(fromY - goalY)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabQuadrantSide(value, midpoint) {\\n  return value >= midpoint ? 1 : -1\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabQuadrantKeyFromSides(sideX, sideY) {\\n  return `${sideX},${sideY}`\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabInfluenceContext(state) {\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  if (!layout || ![layout.minX, layout.minY, layout.maxX, layout.maxY].every(Number.isFinite)) return null\\n  const layoutKey = getLabDisplayLayoutKey(layout)\\n  const cached = labInfluenceContextCache.get(state)\\n  if (cached?.layoutKey === layoutKey) return cached.context\\n  const midX = (layout.minX + layout.maxX) / 2\\n  const midY = (layout.minY + layout.maxY) / 2\\n  const startX = Number.isFinite(layout.startX) ? layout.startX : layout.minX\\n  const startY = Number.isFinite(layout.startY) ? layout.startY : layout.minY\\n  const goalX = Number.isFinite(layout.goalX) ? layout.goalX : layout.maxX\\n  const goalY = Number.isFinite(layout.goalY) ? layout.goalY : layout.maxY\\n  const goalSideX = getLabQuadrantSide(goalX, midX)\\n  const goalSideY = getLabQuadrantSide(goalY, midY)\\n  const exitTargetX = goalSideX === 1 ? layout.maxX : layout.minX\\n  const exitTargetY = goalSideY === 1 ? layout.maxY : layout.minY\\n  const context = {\\n    // back-reference to the state object so other memoizers (quadrant bounds,\\n    // goalward dirs, branch enclosure, etc.) can use the same cache key.\\n    state,\\n    layout,\\n    midX,\\n    midY,\\n    startX,\\n    startY,\\n    goalX,\\n    goalY,\\n    goalSideX,\\n    goalSideY,\\n    exitTargetX,\\n    exitTargetY,\\n    signature: `${layoutKey}:${goalSideX}:${goalSideY}:${goalX}:${goalY}`\\n  }\\n  labInfluenceContextCache.set(state, { layoutKey, context })\\n  return context\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// shouldDeferGoalQuadrant — modeMapOnly gating helper.\\n//\\n// Returns true when modeMapOnly is on AND there is at least one unexplored\\n// frontier room OUTSIDE the exit subquadrant.  In modeMapOnly the worker\\n// is allowed to roam the entire maze freely — including the goal quadrant\\n// — but is forbidden from stepping INTO the small exit subquadrant (the\\n// region containing the actual exit cell) until every other room has been\\n// mapped, because entering it can auto-trigger maze completion via the\\n// exit cell.  This is a narrower restriction than the previous \\\"defer the\\n// whole goal quadrant\\\" rule, which prevented modeMapOnly from mapping\\n// most of the goal quadrant at all.\\n//\\n// Cached per state and influence signature: the modeMapOnly flag is read at\\n// call time so toggling it mid-run is honoured immediately, while the\\n// outside-frontier count is maintained incrementally by the frontier index.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!modeMapOnly) return false\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !context) return false\\n  ensureLabFrontierIndex(state)\\n  if (!state.exitSubFrontierCounts) rebuildLabFrontierIndex(state)\\n  return (state.exitSubFrontierCounts?.outside ?? 0) > 0\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabInfluenceSignature(context) {\\n  if (!context) return \\\"\\\"\\n  if (typeof context.signature === \\\"string\\\") return context.signature\\n  return \\\"\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunction packLabCoordKey(x, y) {\\n  return ((x + labPackedCoordOffset) * labPackedCoordSpan) + (y + labPackedCoordOffset)\\n}\\n\\nfunction unpackLabCoordKey(key) {\\n  const packed = Number(key)\\n  const x = Math.floor(packed / labPackedCoordSpan) - labPackedCoordOffset\\n  const y = (packed % labPackedCoordSpan) - labPackedCoordOffset\\n  return [x, y]\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x, y, dir) {\\n  const dirIndex = labDirectionIndex[dir]\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(y) || dirIndex === undefined) return `${x},${y},${dir}`\\n  return packLabCoordKey(x, y) * 4 + dirIndex\\n}\\n\\nfunction markLabBlockedEdge(blockedEdges, x, y, dir) {\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  if (!(blockedEdges instanceof Set) || !delta || !Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(y)) return\\n  blockedEdges.add(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x, y, dir))\\n  blockedEdges.add(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x + delta.dx, y + delta.dy, delta.back))\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabCoordsInsideLayout(x, y, layout) {\\n  return Boolean(layout\\n    && Number.isInteger(x)\\n    && Number.isInteger(y)\\n    && x >= layout.minX\\n    && x <= layout.maxX\\n    && y >= layout.minY\\n    && y <= layout.maxY)\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// getLabQuadrantBounds — bounding box of one of the four top-level quadrants.\\n//\\n// Why parity matters (BUG FIX):\\n//   Rooms live on the grid {layout.startX + 2*k, layout.startY + 2*k}.  In\\n//   most labyrinth sizes that grid is ODD-coordinate (start at 1), but for\\n//   the chaReq>=2500 sizes the start is offset and rooms live on an\\n//   EVEN-coordinate grid.  The previous \\\"snap to even\\\" formula was correct\\n//   only for the even-room mazes and silently broke the inferred-wall logic\\n//   on every smaller maze (rooms at x=9 etc fell outside the left quadrant's\\n//   bounds, so the one-passage-per-quadrant rule never fired).  We now snap\\n//   to whichever parity the room grid actually uses.\\n//\\n//   For a midpoint that lands ON a room column (odd-vs-odd or even-vs-even),\\n//   we put that center room in the FAR-side quadrant by convention so the\\n//   left/top quadrants are never larger than the right/bottom ones.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction getLabQuadrantBounds(sideX, sideY, context) {\\n  const layout = context?.layout\\n  if (!layout || ![-1, 1].includes(sideX) || ![-1, 1].includes(sideY)) return null\\n  // Pick the parity (0 = even-room grid, 1 = odd-room grid) from the layout's\\n  // start coordinate so the formula adapts to every maze size.\\n  const xParity = ((layout.startX ?? 1) & 1)\\n  const yParity = ((layout.startY ?? 1) & 1)\\n  // First valid room coord >= midpoint, snapped to the room-grid parity.\\n  // If midX is already on the room grid (matches xParity) it stays put;\\n  // otherwise step right by 1 to land on the next room column.\\n  const rightMinX = context.midX + (((context.midX & 1) === xParity) ? 0 : 1)\\n  const leftMaxX  = rightMinX - 2  // previous room column (one step west)\\n  const southMinY = context.midY + (((context.midY & 1) === yParity) ? 0 : 1)\\n  const northMaxY = southMinY - 2\\n  return {\\n    sideX,\\n    sideY,\\n    key: getLabQuadrantKeyFromSides(sideX, sideY),\\n    minX: sideX < 0 ? layout.minX : rightMinX,\\n    maxX: sideX < 0 ? leftMaxX    : layout.maxX,\\n    minY: sideY < 0 ? layout.minY : southMinY,\\n    maxY: sideY < 0 ? northMaxY   : layout.maxY\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// Memoized variant of \\\"which quadrant does (x, y) belong to?\\\".  Called many\\n// times per scoring pass (once per frontier room per worker iteration), so\\n// caching the lookup by influence signature + (x, y) shaves real cycles.  The\\n// underlying compute is trivial — we cache because the call SITE multiplies.\\nfunction getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context) {\\n  if (!Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y) || !context) {\\n    if (!context) return null\\n    return getLabQuadrantBounds(\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(x, context?.midX),\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(y, context?.midY),\\n      context\\n    )\\n  }\\n  const state = context.state\\n  if (!state) {\\n    return getLabQuadrantBounds(\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(x, context.midX),\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(y, context.midY),\\n      context\\n    )\\n  }\\n  const signature = getLabInfluenceSignature(context)\\n  let cache = labQuadrantBoundsCoordCache.get(state)\\n  if (!cache || cache.signature !== signature) {\\n    cache = { signature, map: new Map() }\\n    labQuadrantBoundsCoordCache.set(state, cache)\\n  }\\n  const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n  if (!cache.map.has(key)) {\\n    cache.map.set(key, getLabQuadrantBounds(\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(x, context.midX),\\n      getLabQuadrantSide(y, context.midY),\\n      context\\n    ))\\n  }\\n  return cache.map.get(key)\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabCoordsInsideBounds(x, y, bounds) {\\n  return Boolean(bounds\\n    && Number.isInteger(x)\\n    && Number.isInteger(y)\\n    && x >= bounds.minX\\n    && x <= bounds.maxX\\n    && y >= bounds.minY\\n    && y <= bounds.maxY)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabGoalwardDirsForQuadrant(bounds, context) {\\n  if (!bounds || !context) return []\\n  const dirs = []\\n  if (bounds.sideX !== context.goalSideX) dirs.push(context.goalSideX > bounds.sideX ? \\\"east\\\" : \\\"west\\\")\\n  if (bounds.sideY !== context.goalSideY) dirs.push(context.goalSideY > bounds.sideY ? \\\"south\\\" : \\\"north\\\")\\n  return dirs\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabExitGoalSubquadrantBounds(context) {\\n  const goalBounds = getLabQuadrantBounds(context?.goalSideX, context?.goalSideY, context)\\n  if (!goalBounds) return null\\n  const subMidX = (goalBounds.minX + goalBounds.maxX) / 2\\n  const subMidY = (goalBounds.minY + goalBounds.maxY) / 2\\n  const targetSideX = getLabQuadrantSide(context.exitTargetX, subMidX)\\n  const targetSideY = getLabQuadrantSide(context.exitTargetY, subMidY)\\n  const xs = []\\n  const ys = []\\n  for (let x = goalBounds.minX; x <= goalBounds.maxX; x += 2) {\\n    if (getLabQuadrantSide(x, subMidX) === targetSideX) xs.push(x)\\n  }\\n  for (let y = goalBounds.minY; y <= goalBounds.maxY; y += 2) {\\n    if (getLabQuadrantSide(y, subMidY) === targetSideY) ys.push(y)\\n  }\\n  if (xs.length === 0 || ys.length === 0) return null\\n  return {\\n    minX: xs[0],\\n    maxX: xs[xs.length - 1],\\n    minY: ys[0],\\n    maxY: ys[ys.length - 1]\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(x, y, context) {\\n  const bounds = getLabExitGoalSubquadrantBounds(context)\\n  if (!bounds || !Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return false\\n  return isLabCoordsInsideBounds(x, y, bounds)\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabExitGoalSubquadrantExplored(state, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !context) return false\\n  const bounds = getLabExitGoalSubquadrantBounds(context)\\n  if (!bounds) return false\\n  for (let y = bounds.minY; y <= bounds.maxY; y += 2) {\\n    for (let x = bounds.minX; x <= bounds.maxX; x += 2) {\\n      if (!state.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]?.explored) {\\n        return false\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return true\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabPositiveExitGoalSubquadrantBranch(state, x, y, dir, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !context || !bounds) return false\\n  if (bounds.sideX !== context.goalSideX || bounds.sideY !== context.goalSideY) return false\\n  if (isLabExitGoalSubquadrantExplored(state, context)) return false\\n  if (isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(x, y, context)) return false\\n  // ANY step that lands inside the exit subquadrant is a \\\"positive\\\" branch\\n  // — that subquadrant always contains the exit and must never be marked\\n  // dead, no matter which direction the entrance comes from.  The original\\n  // implementation required `dir` to be a goalward direction; that left\\n  // entrances arriving from non-goalward sides (common when the maze\\n  // forces a winding approach) unprotected, so the wall flood-fill could\\n  // mark them dead and the worker would give up.\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  if (delta) {\\n    const nextX = x + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = y + delta.dy\\n    if (isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(nextX, nextY, context)) return true\\n  }\\n  return getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(state, x, y, context).includes(dir)\\n}\\n\\nfunction updateLabKnownGoalCrossingsForRoom(state, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !room?.explored || !room.exits || !context) return\\n  if (!state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds || typeof state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds)) {\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds = {}\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingIndex = {}\\n  }\\n  if (!state.knownGoalCrossingIndex || typeof state.knownGoalCrossingIndex !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.knownGoalCrossingIndex)) state.knownGoalCrossingIndex = {}\\n  const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(room.x, room.y, context)\\n  if (!bounds) return\\n  const fromQuadrantDistance = getLabQuadrantGoalDistance(bounds, context)\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (room.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n    const nextX = room.x + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = room.y + delta.dy\\n    if (!isLabCoordsInsideLayout(nextX, nextY, state.layout)) continue\\n    const nextBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(nextX, nextY, context)\\n    if (!nextBounds || nextBounds.key === bounds.key) continue\\n    const nextQuadrantDistance = getLabQuadrantGoalDistance(nextBounds, context)\\n    if (nextQuadrantDistance >= fromQuadrantDistance) continue\\n    const crossingKey = getLabBlockedEdgeKey(room.x, room.y, dir)\\n    if (state.knownGoalCrossingIndex[crossingKey]) continue\\n    const crossing = {\\n      fromX: room.x,\\n      fromY: room.y,\\n      toX: nextX,\\n      toY: nextY,\\n      dir,\\n      nextQuadrantDistance,\\n      goalDist: getLabGoalDistance(state, nextX, nextY)\\n    }\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingIndex[crossingKey] = bounds.key\\n    if (!Array.isArray(state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds[bounds.key])) state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds[bounds.key] = []\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds[bounds.key].push(crossing)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabKnownGoalCrossings(state, bounds, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !bounds || !context) return []\\n  if (!state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds) {\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds = {}\\n    state.knownGoalCrossingIndex = {}\\n    for (const room of Object.values(state.rooms ?? {})) updateLabKnownGoalCrossingsForRoom(state, room, context)\\n  }\\n  return Array.isArray(state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds?.[bounds.key])\\n    ? state.knownGoalCrossingsByBounds[bounds.key]\\n    : []\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBestKnownGoalCrossing(state, bounds, fromX, fromY, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const crossings = getLabKnownGoalCrossings(state, bounds, context)\\n  let best = null\\n  let bestTravel = Infinity\\n  for (const crossing of crossings) {\\n    const travel = Math.abs(fromX - crossing.fromX) + Math.abs(fromY - crossing.fromY)\\n    if (!best\\n      || crossing.nextQuadrantDistance < best.nextQuadrantDistance\\n      || (crossing.nextQuadrantDistance === best.nextQuadrantDistance && travel < bestTravel)\\n      || (crossing.nextQuadrantDistance === best.nextQuadrantDistance && travel === bestTravel && crossing.goalDist < best.goalDist)) {\\n      best = crossing\\n      bestTravel = travel\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return best\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabQuadrantGoalDistance(bounds, context) {\\n  if (!bounds || !context) return Infinity\\n  let distance = 0\\n  if (bounds.sideX !== context.goalSideX) distance++\\n  if (bounds.sideY !== context.goalSideY) distance++\\n  return distance\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabTargetProgressInfo(state, fromX, fromY, targetX, targetY, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const currentBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(fromX, fromY, context)\\n  const targetBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(targetX, targetY, context)\\n  if (!currentBounds || !targetBounds || !context) return { progressClass: 1, progressAmount: 0 }\\n  const currentQuadrantDistance = getLabQuadrantGoalDistance(currentBounds, context)\\n  const targetQuadrantDistance = getLabQuadrantGoalDistance(targetBounds, context)\\n  if (targetQuadrantDistance < currentQuadrantDistance) {\\n    return {\\n      progressClass: 0,\\n      progressAmount: (currentQuadrantDistance - targetQuadrantDistance) * 1000\\n    }\\n  }\\n  if (targetQuadrantDistance > currentQuadrantDistance) {\\n    return {\\n      progressClass: 2,\\n      progressAmount: currentQuadrantDistance - targetQuadrantDistance\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const knownCrossing = currentQuadrantDistance > 0 ? getLabBestKnownGoalCrossing(state, currentBounds, fromX, fromY, context) : null\\n  if (knownCrossing && targetBounds.key === currentBounds.key) {\\n    const currentCrossingDistance = Math.abs(fromX - knownCrossing.fromX) + Math.abs(fromY - knownCrossing.fromY)\\n    const targetCrossingDistance = Math.abs(targetX - knownCrossing.fromX) + Math.abs(targetY - knownCrossing.fromY)\\n    const progressAmount = currentCrossingDistance - targetCrossingDistance\\n    return {\\n      progressClass: progressAmount > 0 ? 0 : (progressAmount < 0 ? 2 : 1),\\n      progressAmount\\n    }\\n  }\\n  if (targetBounds.key !== currentBounds.key) return { progressClass: 1, progressAmount: 0 }\\n  if (targetQuadrantDistance === 0) {\\n    const currentGoalDistance = getLabGoalDistance(state, fromX, fromY)\\n    const targetGoalDistance = getLabGoalDistance(state, targetX, targetY)\\n    const progressAmount = currentGoalDistance - targetGoalDistance\\n    return {\\n      progressClass: progressAmount > 0 ? 0 : 1,\\n      progressAmount\\n    }\\n  }\\n  let progressAmount = 0\\n  for (const dir of getLabGoalwardDirsForQuadrant(currentBounds, context)) {\\n    switch (dir) {\\n      case \\\"east\\\": progressAmount += Math.max(0, targetX - fromX); break\\n      case \\\"west\\\": progressAmount += Math.max(0, fromX - targetX); break\\n      case \\\"south\\\": progressAmount += Math.max(0, targetY - fromY); break\\n      case \\\"north\\\": progressAmount += Math.max(0, fromY - targetY); break\\n      default: break\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return {\\n    progressClass: progressAmount > 0 ? 0 : 1,\\n    progressAmount\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// Memoized goalward-dir lookup.  The result is a small array; the cost of\\n// rebuilding it is trivial individually but it is hammered from every branch\\n// scoring pass for every frontier candidate, so a per-(x,y) cache wins back\\n// real cycles.  Keyed by influence signature, which changes when layout\\n// anchors change.\\nfunction getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(state, x, y, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!context) return []\\n  const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)\\n  if (!bounds) return []\\n  if (state) {\\n    const signature = getLabInfluenceSignature(context)\\n    let cache = labGoalwardDirsCache.get(state)\\n    if (!cache || cache.signature !== signature) {\\n      cache = { signature, map: new Map() }\\n      labGoalwardDirsCache.set(state, cache)\\n    }\\n    const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n    const cached = cache.map.get(key)\\n    if (cached) return cached\\n    const dirs = computeLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(x, y, bounds, context)\\n    cache.map.set(key, dirs)\\n    return dirs\\n  }\\n  return computeLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(x, y, bounds, context)\\n}\\n\\n// Pure compute helper for getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs.  Pulled out so the\\n// memoized wrapper above stays small and the actual logic lives in one place.\\nfunction computeLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(x, y, bounds, context) {\\n  if (bounds.sideX !== context.goalSideX || bounds.sideY !== context.goalSideY) {\\n    return getLabGoalwardDirsForQuadrant(bounds, context)\\n  }\\n  const dirs = []\\n  if (context.exitTargetX > x) dirs.push(\\\"east\\\")\\n  else if (context.exitTargetX < x) dirs.push(\\\"west\\\")\\n  if (context.exitTargetY > y) dirs.push(\\\"south\\\")\\n  else if (context.exitTargetY < y) dirs.push(\\\"north\\\")\\n  return dirs\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabDeadBranchSet(state) {\\n  let deadBranches = labDeadBranchCache.get(state)\\n  if (!(deadBranches instanceof Set)) {\\n    deadBranches = new Set()\\n    labDeadBranchCache.set(state, deadBranches)\\n  }\\n  return deadBranches\\n}\\n\\nfunction setLabFrontierDeadBranchStatus(state, key, dead) {\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[key]\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return\\n  room.deadBranch = dead === true\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabFrontierDeadBranchStatus(state, key) {\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[key]\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return false\\n  return room.deadBranch === true || state?.routing?.frontierStubs?.get(key)?.deadBranch === true\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabCornerKey(x, y) {\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(y)) return `${x},${y}`\\n  return packLabCoordKey(x, y)\\n}\\n\\nfunction parseLabCornerKey(key) {\\n  if (typeof key === \\\"number\\\" && Number.isFinite(key)) return unpackLabCoordKey(key)\\n  const [x, y] = String(key ?? \\\"\\\").split(\\\",\\\").map(Number)\\n  return [x, y]\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWallSegmentPoints(x, y, dir) {\\n  switch (dir) {\\n    case \\\"north\\\": return [[x - 1, y - 1], [x + 1, y - 1]]\\n    case \\\"south\\\": return [[x - 1, y + 1], [x + 1, y + 1]]\\n    case \\\"east\\\": return [[x + 1, y - 1], [x + 1, y + 1]]\\n    case \\\"west\\\": return [[x - 1, y - 1], [x - 1, y + 1]]\\n    default: return null\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction addLabWallSegment(adjacency, x, y, dir) {\\n  const points = getLabWallSegmentPoints(x, y, dir)\\n  if (!(adjacency instanceof Map) || !Array.isArray(points)) return\\n  const [left, right] = points\\n  const leftKey = getLabCornerKey(left[0], left[1])\\n  const rightKey = getLabCornerKey(right[0], right[1])\\n  if (!adjacency.has(leftKey)) adjacency.set(leftKey, new Set())\\n  if (!adjacency.has(rightKey)) adjacency.set(rightKey, new Set())\\n  adjacency.get(leftKey).add(rightKey)\\n  adjacency.get(rightKey).add(leftKey)\\n}\\n\\nfunction removeLabWallSegment(adjacency, x, y, dir) {\\n  const points = getLabWallSegmentPoints(x, y, dir)\\n  if (!(adjacency instanceof Map) || !Array.isArray(points)) return\\n  const [left, right] = points\\n  const leftKey = getLabCornerKey(left[0], left[1])\\n  const rightKey = getLabCornerKey(right[0], right[1])\\n  adjacency.get(leftKey)?.delete(rightKey)\\n  adjacency.get(rightKey)?.delete(leftKey)\\n  if (adjacency.get(leftKey)?.size === 0) adjacency.delete(leftKey)\\n  if (adjacency.get(rightKey)?.size === 0) adjacency.delete(rightKey)\\n}\\n\\nfunction addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, x, y, dir) {\\n  markLabBlockedEdge(blockedEdges, x, y, dir)\\n  addLabWallSegment(wallAdjacency, x, y, dir)\\n}\\n\\nfunction removeLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, x, y, dir) {\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  if (!(blockedEdges instanceof Set) || !delta || !Number.isInteger(x) || !Number.isInteger(y)) return\\n  blockedEdges.delete(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x, y, dir))\\n  blockedEdges.delete(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x + delta.dx, y + delta.dy, delta.back))\\n  removeLabWallSegment(wallAdjacency, x, y, dir)\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// buildLabWallCache — derive every wall we know about, including INFERRED ones.\\n//\\n// Output:\\n//   { blockedEdges: Set<\\\"x,y,dir\\\">, wallAdjacency: Map<corner, Set<corner>> }\\n//   - blockedEdges holds keys for every (x, y, dir) that we know is a wall.\\n//     Both endpoints of each wall are stored so callers can ask the question\\n//     from either side.\\n//   - wallAdjacency is the wall-segment graph used by isLabBranchEnclosedByWalls\\n//     to flood-fill from one entrance corner to the other and detect when a\\n//     branch is fully boxed in.\\n//\\n// Three sources of walls feed the cache:\\n//   1. The OUTER RING of the layout.  The four iterations near the top mark\\n//      every (room on minY, north), (room on maxY, south), (room on minX,\\n//      west), (room on maxX, east) as walls.  Combined with sanitizeLabRoomExits\\n//      this guarantees nothing routes outside the maze bounds.\\n//   2. EXPLORED ROOM exits.  For each explored room, every `exits[dir] === false`\\n//      flag becomes a wall in the cache.\\n//   3. The ONE-PASSAGE-PER-QUADRANT inference.  For each of the four\\n//      inter-quadrant boundary segments (top-left↔top-right east edge,\\n//      bottom-left↔bottom-right east edge, top-left↔bottom-left south edge,\\n//      top-right↔bottom-right south edge), we look at every room that sits\\n//      on that boundary.  If we have already discovered AT LEAST ONE open\\n//      passage through it, we know every OTHER potential passage on that\\n//      boundary must be a wall, so we mark them all blocked.  This is the\\n//      \\\"once the path is known, the rest of the boundary wall can be marked\\n//      as blocked\\\" rule from the puzzle spec.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction buildLabWallCache(state, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const layout = context?.layout ?? state?.layout\\n  if (!layout) return { blockedEdges: new Set(), wallAdjacency: new Map() }\\n  const blockedEdges = new Set()\\n  const wallAdjacency = new Map()\\n  for (let x = layout.minX; x <= layout.maxX; x += 2) {\\n    addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, x, layout.minY, \\\"north\\\")\\n    addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, x, layout.maxY, \\\"south\\\")\\n  }\\n  for (let y = layout.minY; y <= layout.maxY; y += 2) {\\n    addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, layout.minX, y, \\\"west\\\")\\n    addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, layout.maxX, y, \\\"east\\\")\\n  }\\n  for (const room of Object.values(state?.rooms ?? {})) {\\n    if (!room?.explored || !room.exits) continue\\n    for (const [dir] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n      if (room.exits[dir] === false) addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, room.x, room.y, dir)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const wallSegments = [\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"east\\\" },\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: 1, dir: \\\"east\\\" },\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"south\\\" },\\n    { sideX: 1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"south\\\" }\\n  ]\\n  for (const segment of wallSegments) {\\n    const bounds = getLabQuadrantBounds(segment.sideX, segment.sideY, context)\\n    if (!bounds) continue\\n    const candidates = []\\n    if (segment.dir === \\\"east\\\") {\\n      for (let y = bounds.minY; y <= bounds.maxY; y += 2) candidates.push({ x: bounds.maxX, y, dir: segment.dir })\\n    }\\n    else {\\n      for (let x = bounds.minX; x <= bounds.maxX; x += 2) candidates.push({ x, y: bounds.maxY, dir: segment.dir })\\n    }\\n    const openKeys = new Set()\\n    for (const candidate of candidates) {\\n      const room = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(candidate.x, candidate.y)]\\n      if (room?.explored && room.exits?.[candidate.dir] === true) openKeys.add(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir))\\n    }\\n    if (openKeys.size === 0) continue\\n    for (const candidate of candidates) {\\n      if (openKeys.has(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir))) continue\\n      addLabBlockedWall(blockedEdges, wallAdjacency, candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return { blockedEdges, wallAdjacency }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWallCache(state, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return buildLabWallCache(state, context)\\n  const signature = getLabInfluenceSignature(context)\\n  let cache = labWallCache.get(state)\\n  if (!cache || cache.signature !== signature) {\\n    cache = { signature, wallCache: buildLabWallCache(state, context) }\\n    labWallCache.set(state, cache)\\n  }\\n  return cache.wallCache\\n}\\n\\nfunction updateLabWallCacheForRoom(state, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context)) {\\n  if (!room?.explored || !room.exits || !wallCache) return wallCache\\n  for (const [dir] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (room.exits?.[dir] === false) addLabBlockedWall(wallCache.blockedEdges, wallCache.wallAdjacency, room.x, room.y, dir)\\n    else if (room.exits?.[dir] === true) removeLabBlockedWall(wallCache.blockedEdges, wallCache.wallAdjacency, room.x, room.y, dir)\\n  }\\n  return wallCache\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBoundarySegments(context) {\\n  if (!context) return []\\n  return [\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"east\\\" },\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: 1, dir: \\\"east\\\" },\\n    { sideX: -1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"south\\\" },\\n    { sideX: 1, sideY: -1, dir: \\\"south\\\" }\\n  ].map((segment) => {\\n    const bounds = getLabQuadrantBounds(segment.sideX, segment.sideY, context)\\n    if (!bounds) return null\\n    const candidates = []\\n    if (segment.dir === \\\"east\\\") {\\n      for (let y = bounds.minY; y <= bounds.maxY; y += 2) candidates.push({ x: bounds.maxX, y, dir: segment.dir })\\n    } else {\\n      for (let x = bounds.minX; x <= bounds.maxX; x += 2) candidates.push({ x, y: bounds.maxY, dir: segment.dir })\\n    }\\n    const delta = labDirections[segment.dir]\\n    const segmentKey = candidates.length > 0 && delta\\n      ? getLabBoundaryCrossingSegmentKey(candidates[0].x, candidates[0].y, delta.dx, delta.dy, context)\\n      : \\\"\\\"\\n    return { ...segment, bounds, candidates, segmentKey }\\n  }).filter(Boolean)\\n}\\n\\nfunction updateLabWallCacheForBoundarySegments(state, segmentKeys = null, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context)) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms || !context || !wallCache) return wallCache\\n  const wanted = segmentKeys instanceof Set ? segmentKeys : null\\n  for (const segment of getLabBoundarySegments(context)) {\\n    if (wanted && !wanted.has(segment.segmentKey)) continue\\n    if (!state.boundaryCrossingsKnown?.has(segment.segmentKey)) continue\\n    const openKeys = new Set()\\n    for (const candidate of segment.candidates) {\\n      const room = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(candidate.x, candidate.y)]\\n      if (room?.explored && room.exits?.[candidate.dir] === true) openKeys.add(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir))\\n    }\\n    if (openKeys.size === 0) continue\\n    for (const candidate of segment.candidates) {\\n      if (openKeys.has(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir))) {\\n        removeLabBlockedWall(wallCache.blockedEdges, wallCache.wallAdjacency, candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir)\\n        continue\\n      }\\n      addLabBlockedWall(wallCache.blockedEdges, wallCache.wallAdjacency, candidate.x, candidate.y, candidate.dir)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return wallCache\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchEntranceCorners(sourceX, sourceY, dir) {\\n  switch (dir) {\\n    case \\\"east\\\": return [getLabCornerKey(sourceX + 1, sourceY - 1), getLabCornerKey(sourceX + 1, sourceY + 1)]\\n    case \\\"west\\\": return [getLabCornerKey(sourceX - 1, sourceY - 1), getLabCornerKey(sourceX - 1, sourceY + 1)]\\n    case \\\"south\\\": return [getLabCornerKey(sourceX - 1, sourceY + 1), getLabCornerKey(sourceX + 1, sourceY + 1)]\\n    case \\\"north\\\": return [getLabCornerKey(sourceX - 1, sourceY - 1), getLabCornerKey(sourceX + 1, sourceY - 1)]\\n    default: return null\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabWallSegmentOnBranchSide(ax, ay, bx, by, bounds, sourceX, sourceY, dir) {\\n  const minX = bounds.minX - 1\\n  const maxX = bounds.maxX + 1\\n  const minY = bounds.minY - 1\\n  const maxY = bounds.maxY + 1\\n  if (ax < minX || ax > maxX || bx < minX || bx > maxX || ay < minY || ay > maxY || by < minY || by > maxY) return false\\n  switch (dir) {\\n    case \\\"east\\\": return ax >= sourceX + 1 && bx >= sourceX + 1\\n    case \\\"west\\\": return ax <= sourceX - 1 && bx <= sourceX - 1\\n    case \\\"south\\\": return ay >= sourceY + 1 && by >= sourceY + 1\\n    case \\\"north\\\": return ay <= sourceY - 1 && by <= sourceY - 1\\n    default: return false\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// isLabBranchEnclosedByWalls — does an unbroken wall ring seal off the branch\\n// you would enter by stepping from (sourceX, sourceY) in direction `dir`?\\n//\\n// We only need to inspect WALL CORNERS, not interior cells.  The flood fill\\n// starts at one entrance corner of the branch opening, only expands across\\n// wall segments on the branch side of the entrance (per\\n// isLabWallSegmentOnBranchSide), and asks: can we reach the other entrance\\n// corner by walking along walls?  If yes, the branch is fully enclosed\\n// (= dead end pocket); if no, there's a gap and the branch escapes the\\n// quadrant region.\\n//\\n// PERF: the call is hammered by branch scoring and routing-stub refreshes.\\n// Results are pure for the current wall facts and branch side, so we memoize\\n// per wall version while the wall cache is patched incrementally as rooms are\\n// recorded.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction isLabBranchEnclosedByWalls(sourceX, sourceY, dir, bounds, wallCache, state = null, forceRefresh = false) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return false\\n  const entrance = getLabBranchEntranceCorners(sourceX, sourceY, dir)\\n  const wallAdjacency = wallCache?.wallAdjacency\\n  if (!Array.isArray(entrance) || !(wallAdjacency instanceof Map)) return false\\n  // Cache lookup — keyed by (state, topologyVersion, source/dir/bounds).\\n  // We only cache when state is supplied because the WeakMap needs an object\\n  // key; callers without state get the direct compute (rare path).\\n  if (state) {\\n    const wallVersion = getLabWallVersion(state)\\n    let cache = labBranchEnclosureCache.get(state)\\n    if (!cache || cache.wallVersion !== wallVersion) {\\n      cache = { wallVersion, map: new Map() }\\n      labBranchEnclosureCache.set(state, cache)\\n    }\\n    const cacheKey = `${sourceX},${sourceY},${dir},${bounds?.key ?? \\\"\\\"}`\\n    const cached = cache.map.get(cacheKey)\\n    if (!forceRefresh && cached !== undefined) return cached\\n    const result = floodLabBranchEnclosure(entrance, wallAdjacency, bounds, sourceX, sourceY, dir)\\n    cache.map.set(cacheKey, result)\\n    return result\\n  }\\n  return floodLabBranchEnclosure(entrance, wallAdjacency, bounds, sourceX, sourceY, dir)\\n}\\n\\n// Pure flood-fill: walk wall segments along the branch side from one entrance\\n// corner, return true iff we can reach the other entrance corner.  Operates\\n// purely on the wall-corner graph (no room cells visited), which is the\\n// \\\"only look at the edges of the walls to find a gap\\\" optimisation in\\n// action — interior cells are never enumerated.\\nfunction floodLabBranchEnclosure(entrance, wallAdjacency, bounds, sourceX, sourceY, dir) {\\n  const [startKey, endKey] = entrance\\n  if (!wallAdjacency.has(startKey) || !wallAdjacency.has(endKey)) return false\\n  const visited = new Set([startKey])\\n  const queue = [startKey]\\n  let head = 0\\n  while (head < queue.length) {\\n    const currentKey = queue[head++]\\n    if (currentKey === endKey) return true\\n    const [currentX, currentY] = parseLabCornerKey(currentKey)\\n    for (const nextKey of wallAdjacency.get(currentKey) ?? []) {\\n      if (visited.has(nextKey)) continue\\n      const [nextX, nextY] = parseLabCornerKey(nextKey)\\n      // Restrict the walk to wall segments on the branch's side of the\\n      // entrance — this stops the flood from straying into the rest of the\\n      // maze and keeps the search proportional to the branch's perimeter.\\n      if (!isLabWallSegmentOnBranchSide(currentX, currentY, nextX, nextY, bounds, sourceX, sourceY, dir)) continue\\n      visited.add(nextKey)\\n      queue.push(nextKey)\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return false\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchDirectionMetrics(state, sourceX, sourceY, dir, bounds, wallCache, lastDir = \\\"\\\", context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return { penalty: 0, headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0 }\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  const branchKey = getLabBlockedEdgeKey(sourceX, sourceY, dir)\\n  const deadBranches = getLabDeadBranchSet(state)\\n  const positiveExitBranch = isLabPositiveExitGoalSubquadrantBranch(state, sourceX, sourceY, dir, context, bounds)\\n  if (!delta) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  // HARD GUARD: stepping directly into the exit cell is always allowed,\\n  // regardless of stale deadBranches data or the wall flood-fill.  Without\\n  // this the picker can refuse to enter the exit room when its entrance\\n  // edge had previously been (mis)flagged as a dead branch.\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  const stepsIntoExit = layout\\n    && Number.isInteger(layout.finishX) && Number.isInteger(layout.finishY)\\n    && (sourceX + delta.dx) === layout.finishX\\n    && (sourceY + delta.dy) === layout.finishY\\n  if (stepsIntoExit) {\\n    if (deadBranches.has(branchKey)) deadBranches.delete(branchKey)\\n    return { penalty: 0, headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0 }\\n  }\\n  if (positiveExitBranch && deadBranches.has(branchKey)) deadBranches.delete(branchKey)\\n  if (!positiveExitBranch && deadBranches.has(branchKey)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  if (wallCache?.blockedEdges?.has(branchKey)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  const startX = sourceX + delta.dx\\n  const startY = sourceY + delta.dy\\n  if (!isLabCoordsInsideBounds(startX, startY, bounds)) {\\n    // The destination exits the current quadrant — this is a cross-quadrant move, not an\\n    // enclosed pocket.  Enclosure analysis only makes sense within a single quadrant, so\\n    // return 0 penalty (allow the move) rather than Infinity (which was permanently blocking\\n    // all progress into the next quadrant whenever the wall filter was active).\\n    return { penalty: 0, headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0 }\\n  }\\n  // Pass state so the enclosure flood-fill hits the per-topology memo cache.\\n  const enclosed = isLabBranchEnclosedByWalls(sourceX, sourceY, dir, bounds, wallCache, state)\\n  if (enclosed && !positiveExitBranch) deadBranches.add(branchKey)\\n  return {\\n    penalty: enclosed ? (positiveExitBranch ? -1 : Infinity) : 0,\\n    headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabBranchDeadByWallState(state, sourceX, sourceY, dir, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context), options = {}) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return false\\n  if (modeMapOnly) return false\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  if (!delta) return true\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  const targetX = Number.isInteger(options.targetX) ? options.targetX : sourceX + delta.dx\\n  const targetY = Number.isInteger(options.targetY) ? options.targetY : sourceY + delta.dy\\n  const branchKey = getLabBlockedEdgeKey(sourceX, sourceY, dir)\\n  const bounds = options.bounds ?? getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(sourceX, sourceY, context)\\n  const positiveExitBranch = isLabPositiveExitGoalSubquadrantBranch(state, sourceX, sourceY, dir, context, bounds)\\n  if (layout && Number.isInteger(layout.finishX) && Number.isInteger(layout.finishY)\\n    && targetX === layout.finishX && targetY === layout.finishY) {\\n    getLabDeadBranchSet(state).delete(branchKey)\\n    return false\\n  }\\n  if (positiveExitBranch) {\\n    getLabDeadBranchSet(state).delete(branchKey)\\n    return false\\n  }\\n  if (!bounds || !isLabCoordsInsideBounds(targetX, targetY, bounds)) return false\\n  if (context && isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(targetX, targetY, context)) return false\\n  const deadBranches = getLabDeadBranchSet(state)\\n  if (!options.forceRefresh && deadBranches.has(branchKey)) return true\\n  if (wallCache?.blockedEdges?.has(branchKey)) {\\n    deadBranches.add(branchKey)\\n    return true\\n  }\\n  if (isLabBranchEnclosedByWalls(sourceX, sourceY, dir, bounds, wallCache, state, options.forceRefresh === true)) {\\n    deadBranches.add(branchKey)\\n    return true\\n  }\\n  if (options.forceRefresh === true) deadBranches.delete(branchKey)\\n  return false\\n}\\n\\nfunction refreshLabDeadBranchEdgesForRoom(state, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context)) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return\\n  if (!room?.explored || !room.exits || !context) return\\n  const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(room.x, room.y, context)\\n  if (!bounds) return\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (room.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n    isLabBranchDeadByWallState(state, room.x, room.y, dir, context, wallCache, {\\n      bounds,\\n      targetX: room.x + delta.dx,\\n      targetY: room.y + delta.dy,\\n      forceRefresh: true\\n    })\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabDefaultBranchChoiceMetrics(state, x, y, dir, currentPath = [], context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) {\\n    const room = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]\\n    return room?.exits?.[dir] === true\\n      ? { penalty: 0, headingPenalty: Array.isArray(currentPath) && currentPath[currentPath.length - 1] === dir ? 0 : 1 }\\n      : { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  }\\n  const delta = labDirections[dir]\\n  const branchKey = getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x, y, dir)\\n  const deadBranches = getLabDeadBranchSet(state)\\n  const positiveExitBranch = isLabPositiveExitGoalSubquadrantBranch(state, x, y, dir, context)\\n  if (!delta) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  // HARD GUARD: a step directly into the exit cell is always allowed.\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  const stepsIntoExit = layout\\n    && Number.isInteger(layout.finishX) && Number.isInteger(layout.finishY)\\n    && (x + delta.dx) === layout.finishX\\n    && (y + delta.dy) === layout.finishY\\n  if (stepsIntoExit) {\\n    if (deadBranches.has(branchKey)) deadBranches.delete(branchKey)\\n    const lastDir = Array.isArray(currentPath) && currentPath.length > 0 ? currentPath[currentPath.length - 1] : \\\"\\\"\\n    return { penalty: 0, headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0 }\\n  }\\n  if (positiveExitBranch && deadBranches.has(branchKey)) deadBranches.delete(branchKey)\\n  if (!positiveExitBranch && deadBranches.has(branchKey)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  const wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context)\\n  if (wallCache?.blockedEdges?.has(branchKey)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  const nextX = x + delta.dx\\n  const nextY = y + delta.dy\\n  if (!isLabCoordsInsideLayout(nextX, nextY, state?.layout)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]\\n  const lastDir = Array.isArray(currentPath) && currentPath.length > 0 ? currentPath[currentPath.length - 1] : \\\"\\\"\\n  const backDir = labDirections[lastDir]?.back ?? \\\"\\\"\\n  const goalDirs = getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(state, x, y, context)\\n  const availableForwardDirs = []\\n  for (const [candidateDir, candidateDelta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (candidateDir === backDir || room?.exits?.[candidateDir] !== true) continue\\n    const candidateX = x + candidateDelta.dx\\n    const candidateY = y + candidateDelta.dy\\n    if (!isLabCoordsInsideLayout(candidateX, candidateY, state?.layout)) continue\\n    const candidateKey = getLabBlockedEdgeKey(x, y, candidateDir)\\n    const candidatePositiveExitBranch = isLabPositiveExitGoalSubquadrantBranch(state, x, y, candidateDir, context)\\n    if ((!candidatePositiveExitBranch && deadBranches.has(candidateKey)) || wallCache?.blockedEdges?.has(candidateKey)) continue\\n    availableForwardDirs.push(candidateDir)\\n  }\\n  const availableGoalDirs = availableForwardDirs.filter((goalDir) => goalDirs.includes(goalDir))\\n  let penalty = 0\\n  if (availableForwardDirs.length > 0) {\\n    if (dir === backDir) penalty = Infinity\\n    else if (availableGoalDirs.length > 0 && !availableGoalDirs.includes(dir)) penalty = 1\\n  }\\n  return {\\n    penalty,\\n    headingPenalty: lastDir ? (dir === lastDir ? 0 : 1) : 0\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchWallFilter(state, x, y, currentPath = [], context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]\\n  if (!room?.explored || !room.exits || !context?.layout) return null\\n  const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)\\n  if (!bounds) return null\\n  if (bounds.sideX === context.goalSideX && bounds.sideY === context.goalSideY) {\\n    if (isLabExitGoalSubquadrantExplored(state, context)) return null\\n    if (isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(x, y, context)) return null\\n  }\\n  const lastDir = Array.isArray(currentPath) && currentPath.length > 0 ? currentPath[currentPath.length - 1] : \\\"\\\"\\n  const backDir = labDirections[lastDir]?.back ?? \\\"\\\"\\n  const forwardDirs = []\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (dir === backDir || room.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n    const nextX = x + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = y + delta.dy\\n    if (!isLabCoordsInsideLayout(nextX, nextY, state?.layout)) continue\\n    forwardDirs.push(dir)\\n  }\\n  if (forwardDirs.length <= 1) return null\\n  const goalDirs = getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(state, x, y, context)\\n  const wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, context)\\n  const choices = {}\\n  let hasLiveGoalward = false\\n  for (const dir of forwardDirs) {\\n    const metrics = getLabBranchDirectionMetrics(state, x, y, dir, bounds, wallCache, lastDir, context)\\n    choices[dir] = metrics\\n    if (Number.isFinite(metrics.penalty) && goalDirs.includes(dir)) hasLiveGoalward = true\\n  }\\n  if (hasLiveGoalward) {\\n    for (const dir of forwardDirs) {\\n      if (goalDirs.includes(dir) || !Number.isFinite(choices[dir]?.penalty)) continue\\n      choices[dir] = {\\n        ...choices[dir],\\n        penalty: choices[dir].penalty + 1\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const filter = { choices }\\n  return filter\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchChoiceMetrics(state, x, y, currentPath, dir, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return getLabDefaultBranchChoiceMetrics(state, x, y, dir, currentPath, context)\\n  const filter = getLabBranchWallFilter(state, x, y, currentPath, context)\\n  if (!filter) return getLabDefaultBranchChoiceMetrics(state, x, y, dir, currentPath, context)\\n  return filter.choices?.[dir] ?? { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchChoicePenalty(state, x, y, currentPath, dir, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  return getLabBranchChoiceMetrics(state, x, y, currentPath, dir, context).penalty\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabExitInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const layout = context?.layout ?? state?.layout\\n  if (!layout || !Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return 1000\\n  if (![layout.minX, layout.minY, layout.maxX, layout.maxY].every(Number.isFinite)) return 1000\\n  const midX = context?.midX ?? (layout.minX + layout.maxX) / 2\\n  const midY = context?.midY ?? (layout.minY + layout.maxY) / 2\\n  const goalX = context?.goalX ?? (Number.isFinite(layout.goalX) ? layout.goalX : layout.maxX)\\n  const goalY = context?.goalY ?? (Number.isFinite(layout.goalY) ? layout.goalY : layout.maxY)\\n  const sideX = getLabQuadrantSide(x, midX)\\n  const sideY = getLabQuadrantSide(y, midY)\\n  const goalSideX = context?.goalSideX ?? getLabQuadrantSide(goalX, midX)\\n  const goalSideY = context?.goalSideY ?? getLabQuadrantSide(goalY, midY)\\n  if (sideX !== goalSideX || sideY !== goalSideY) return 1000\\n  const exitTargetX = context?.exitTargetX ?? (goalSideX === 1 ? layout.maxX : layout.minX)\\n  const exitTargetY = context?.exitTargetY ?? (goalSideY === 1 ? layout.maxY : layout.minY)\\n  return Math.floor((Math.abs(x - exitTargetX) + Math.abs(y - exitTargetY)) / 2)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), maxSteps = labInfluenceTravelTolerance) {\\n  return getLabExitInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getCachedLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state), maxSteps = labInfluenceTravelTolerance) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return getLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context, maxSteps)\\n  const stepLimit = Math.max(0, Math.floor(Number.isFinite(maxSteps) ? maxSteps : 0))\\n  const signature = `${getLabInfluenceSignature(context)}:${stepLimit}`\\n  let cache = labProjectedInfluenceCache.get(state)\\n  if (!cache || cache.signature !== signature) {\\n    cache = { signature, ranks: new Map() }\\n    labProjectedInfluenceCache.set(state, cache)\\n  }\\n  const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n  if (!cache.ranks.has(key)) cache.ranks.set(key, getLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, context, stepLimit))\\n  return cache.ranks.get(key)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabInfluenceTier(rank) {\\n  if (rank < 1000) return 0\\n  return 3\\n}\\n\\nfunction compareLabInfluenceWithTravel(candidateInfluenceRank, candidateTravelDist, bestInfluenceRank, bestTravelDist) {\\n  if (!Number.isFinite(candidateTravelDist)) return 1\\n  if (!Number.isFinite(bestTravelDist)) return -1\\n  if (candidateInfluenceRank === bestInfluenceRank) return 0\\n  const candidateTier = getLabInfluenceTier(candidateInfluenceRank)\\n  const bestTier = getLabInfluenceTier(bestInfluenceRank)\\n  if (candidateTier !== bestTier) {\\n    if (candidateTier < bestTier) return candidateTravelDist <= bestTravelDist + labInfluenceTravelTolerance ? -1 : 1\\n    return candidateTravelDist + labInfluenceTravelTolerance < bestTravelDist ? -1 : 1\\n  }\\n  if (candidateInfluenceRank < bestInfluenceRank) {\\n    return candidateTravelDist <= bestTravelDist + labInfluenceTravelTolerance ? -1 : 1\\n  }\\n  return candidateTravelDist + labInfluenceTravelTolerance < bestTravelDist ? -1 : 1\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabRouteCost(travelDist, branchBacktrackDist = 0) {\\n  if (!Number.isFinite(travelDist)) return Infinity\\n  const backtrack = Number.isFinite(branchBacktrackDist) ? Math.max(0, branchBacktrackDist) : 0\\n  return travelDist + backtrack * labBacktrackStepPenalty\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabDimensions(chaReq) {\\n  return labDimensionsByCha[chaReq] ?? null\\n}\\n\\nfunction getEstimatedLabLayout(chaReq) {\\n  const dim = getLabDimensions(chaReq)\\n  if (!dim) return null\\n  const width = dim.mazeWidth + 1\\n  const height = dim.mazeHeight + 1\\n  const maxX = width - 2\\n  const maxY = height - 2\\n  return {\\n    startX: 1,\\n    startY: 1,\\n    minX: 1,\\n    minY: 1,\\n    maxX: maxX,\\n    maxY: maxY,\\n    finishX: null,\\n    finishY: null,\\n    goalX: maxX,\\n    goalY: maxY,\\n    roomCount: ((maxX - 1) / 2 + 1) * ((maxY - 1) / 2 + 1),\\n    offsetStartAndEnd: dim.offsetStartAndEnd,\\n    estimated: true\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabLayout(server, details, chaReq) {\\n  let state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (state?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && state.rooms && state.layout && state.layout.estimated !== true) return state.layout\\n  state = getLabState(server, details)\\n  normalizeLabOrigin(state)\\n  const rootRoom = getLabRootRoom(server)\\n  if (!rootRoom?.jsonLog) {\\n    if (!state.layout) {\\n      state.layout = getEstimatedLabLayout(chaReq)\\n      bumpLabTopologyVersion(state)\\n      syncLabDisplayMap(state, true)\\n      inProgress.set(server, state)\\n    }\\n    return state.layout\\n  }\\n  if (state.layout && state.layout.estimated !== true) return state.layout\\n  const [rootX, rootY] = getLabActualCoords(rootRoom.x, rootRoom.y, rootRoom.jsonLog, state)\\n  const dim = getLabDimensions(chaReq)\\n  if (!dim) return null\\n  const offsetX = rootX - 1\\n  const offsetY = rootY - 1\\n  const width = dim.mazeWidth + 1\\n  const height = dim.mazeHeight + 1\\n  const finishY: null,\\n    goalX: Math.max(1, Math.min(maxX, maxX - offsetX)),\\n    goalY: Math.max(1, Math.min(maxY, maxY - offsetY)),\\n    roomCount: ((maxX - 1) / 2 + 1) * ((maxY - 1) / 2 + 1),\\n    offsetStartAndEnd: dim.offsetStartAndEnd,\\n    estimated: false\\n  }\\n  syncLabDisplayMap(state, true)\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n  return state.layout\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabState(server, details) {\\n  const existing = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (existing?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && existing.rooms) {\\n    if (!existing.layout) existing.layout = null\\n    if (!existing.workers) existing.workers = {}\\n    ensureLabIndexes(existing)\\n    if (!Array.isArray(existing.displayMap)) existing.displayMap = []\\n    if (typeof (!Number.isInteger(existing.workersVersion)) existing.workersVersion = 0\\n    if (!Number.isInteger(existing.roomRecordCount)) existing.roomRecordCount = Object.keys(existing.rooms ?? {}).length\\n    if (typeof existing.rootKey !== \\\"string\\\") existing.rootKey = \\\"\\\"\\n    if (typeof existing.finishKey !== \\\"string\\\") existing.finishKey = \\\"\\\"\\n    if (typeof existing.serverName syncLabAnchorLayout(existing)\\n    return existing\\n  }\\n  const fresh = { details: details, serverName: String(server), rooms: {}, roomRecordCount: 0, layout: null, workers: {}, workerClaims: {}, workerClaimIndexReady: true, frontierKeys: {}, frontierKeysByQuadrant: {}, frontierIndexReady: true, workerStarts: {}, startKeys: [], displayMap: [], displayLayoutKey: \\\"\\\", displayVersion: 0, workersVersion: 0, rootKey: \\\"\\\", finishKey: \\\"\\\", coordOffsetX: 0, coordOffsetY: 0, labTopologyVersion: 0, labLayoutVersion: 0, labWallVersion: 0, labRoutingVersion: 0 }\\n  inProgress.set(server, fresh)\\n  return fresh\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabIndexes(state) {\\n  if (!state || !state.rooms) return state\\n  if (!state.workerClaims || typeof state.workerClaims !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.workerClaims)) {\\n    state.workerClaims = {}\\n    state.workerClaimIndexReady = false\\n  }\\n  else if (state.workerClaimIndexReady !== true) state.frontierIndexReady = false\\n  }\\n  else if (state.frontierIndexReady !== true) state.frontierIndexReady = false\\n  if (!state.frontierKeysByQuadrant || typeof state.frontierKeysByQuadrant !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant)) {\\n    state.frontierKeysByQuadrant = {}\\n    state.frontierIndexReady = false\\n  }\\n  if (!state.quadrantUnexplored || typeof room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!room || !context) return \\\"\\\"\\n  return getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(room.x, room.y, context)?.key ?? \\\"\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunction addLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  const quadrantKey = getLabFrontierQuadrantKey(state, room, context)\\n  if (!quadrantKey) return\\n  if (!state.frontierKeysByQuadrant || typeof state.frontierKeysByQuadrant !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant)) {\\n    state.frontierKeysByQuadrant = {}\\n  }\\n  if (!state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey]) state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey] = {}\\n  state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey][key] = true\\n}\\n\\nfunction removeLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!state?.frontierKeysByQuadrant) return\\n  if (!room) {\\n    for (const [quadrantKey, bucket] of Object.entries(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant)) {\\n      delete bucket[key]\\n      if (Object.keys(bucket).length === 0) delete state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey]\\n    }\\n    return\\n  }\\n  const quadrantKey = getLabFrontierQuadrantKey(state, room, context)\\n  if (quadrantKey && state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey]) {\\n    delete state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey][key]\\n    if (Object.keys(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey]).length === 0) delete state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey]\\n  } else {\\n    for (const bucket of Object.values(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant)) delete bucket[key]\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabFrontierQuadrantOrder(state, x, y, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!context) return Object.keys(state?.frontierKeysByQuadrant ?? {})\\n  const currentBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)\\n  const keys = Object.keys(state?.frontierKeysByQuadrant ?? {})\\n  const rankForKey = (key) => {\\n    const [sideX, sideY] = key.split(\\\",\\\").map(Number)\\n    return Math.abs(sideX - context.goalSideX) / 2 + Math.abs(sideY - context.goalSideY) / 2\\n  }\\n  return keys.sort((a, b) => {\\n    const aCurrent = currentBounds && a === currentBounds.key ? 0 : 1\\n    const bCurrent = currentBounds && b === currentBounds.key ? 0 : 1\\n    if (aCurrent !== bCurrent) return aCurrent - bCurrent\\n    const aRank = rankForKey(a)\\n    const bRank = rankForKey(b)\\n    if (aRank !== bRank) return aRank - bRank\\n    return a.localeCompare(b)\\n  })\\n}\\n\\n// Adjust the per-quadrant unexplored counter by `delta` for the quadrant\\n// containing `room`.  Cheap and exact: O(1) lookup of quadrant bounds\\n// + arithmetic.  Replaces the periodic full-rescan that was happening\\n// inside getLabPreferredQuadrantForWorker.\\nfunction bumpLabQuadrantUnexplored(state, room, delta) {\\n  if (!state || !room || !delta) return\\n  const context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  if (!context) return\\n  const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(room.x, room.y, context)\\n  if (!bounds) return\\n  if (!state.quadrantUnexplored) state.quadrantUnexplored = {}\\n  const next = (state.quadrantUnexplored[bounds.key] ?? 0) + delta\\n  state.quadrantUnexplored[bounds.key] = next < 0 ? 0 : next\\n}\\n\\nfunction bumpLabExitSubFrontierCount(state, room, delta) {\\n  if (!state || !room || !delta) return\\n  const context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  if (!context) return\\n  const key = isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(room.x, room.y, context) ? \\\"inside\\\" : \\\"outside\\\"\\n  if (!state.exitSubFrontierCounts || typeof state.exitSubFrontierCounts !== \\\"object\\\" || Array.isArray(state.exitSubFrontierCounts)) {\\n    state.exitSubFrontierCounts = { inside: 0, outside: 0 }\\n  }\\n  const next = (state.exitSubFrontierCounts[key] ?? 0) + delta\\n  state.exitSubFrontierCounts[key] = next < 0 ? 0 : next\\n}\\n\\nfunction rebuildLabFrontierIndex(state) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return {}\\n  state.frontierKeys = {}\\n  state.frontierKeysByQuadrant = {}\\n  state.quadrantUnexplored = {}\\n  state.exitSubFrontierCounts = { inside: 0, outside: 0 }\\n  const context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  for (const [key, room] of Object.entries(state?.rooms ?? {})) {\\n    if (room && !room.explored) {\\n      state.frontierKeys[key] = true\\n      addLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room, context)\\n      if (context) {\\n        const bounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(room.x, room.y, context)\\n        if (bounds) state.quadrantUnexplored[bounds.key] = (state.quadrantUnexplored[bounds.key] ?? 0) + 1\\n        const subKey = isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(room.x, room.y, context) ? \\\"inside\\\" : \\\"outside\\\"\\n        state.exitSubFrontierCounts[subKey] = (state.exitSubFrontierCounts[subKey] ?? 0) + 1\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  state.frontierIndexReady = true\\n  return state.frontierKeys\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabFrontierIndex(state) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return {}\\n  if (state?.frontierIndexReady !== true) return rebuildLabFrontierIndex(state)\\n  return state.frontierKeys\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabFrontierRooms(state, options = {}) {\\n  const frontierKeys = ensureLabFrontierIndex(state)\\n  const rooms = []\\n  const quadrantKeys = Array.isArray(options.quadrantKeys) && options.quadrantKeys.length > 0\\n    ? options.quadrantKeys\\n    : null\\n  const keys = []\\n  if (quadrantKeys && state?.frontierKeysByQuadrant) {\\n    const seen = new Set()\\n    for (const quadrantKey of quadrantKeys) {\\n      for (const key of Object.keys(state.frontierKeysByQuadrant[quadrantKey] ?? {})) {\\n        if (seen.has(key)) continue\\n        seen.add(key)\\n        keys.push(key)\\n      }\\n    }\\n    for (const key of Object.keys(frontierKeys ?? {})) {\\n      if (seen.has(key)) continue\\n      seen.add(key)\\n      keys.push(key)\\n    }\\n  } else {\\n    keys.push(...Object.keys(frontierKeys ?? {}))\\n  }\\n  for (const key of keys) {\\n    const room = state?.rooms?.[key]\\n    if (!frontierKeys?.[key] || !room || room.explored) {\\n      delete frontierKeys[key]\\n      removeLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room, options.context)\\n      continue\\n    }\\n    rooms.push(room)\\n  }\\n  return rooms\\n}\\n\\nfunction markLabFrontierRoom(state, key, room) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (state?.frontierIndexReady !== true) return\\n  const wasFrontier = state.frontierKeys[key] === true\\n  const isFrontier = !!room && !room.explored\\n  if (isFrontier && !wasFrontier) {\\n    state.frontierKeys[key] = true\\n    addLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room)\\n    bumpLabQuadrantUnexplored(state, room, +1)\\n    bumpLabExitSubFrontierCount(state, room, +1)\\n  } else if (!isFrontier && wasFrontier) {\\n    delete state.frontierKeys[key]\\n    removeLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room ?? state.rooms?.[key])\\n    bumpLabQuadrantUnexplored(state, room ?? state.rooms?.[key], -1)\\n    bumpLabExitSubFrontierCount(state, room ?? state.rooms?.[key], -1)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction clearLabFrontierRoom(state, key) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (state?.frontierIndexReady !== true) return\\n  if (state.frontierKeys[key]) {\\n    delete state.frontierKeys[key]\\n    const room = state.rooms?.[key]\\n    if (room) removeLabFrontierBucketEntry(state, key, room)\\n    if (room) bumpLabQuadrantUnexplored(state, room, -1)\\n    if (room) bumpLabExitSubFrontierCount(state, room, -1)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// isLabKnownDeadEndFrontierRoom — can we already prove this frontier cell is\\n// either fully sealed off or a useless dead-end pocket?\\n//\\n// Returns true when EVERY wall of `room` is determinable, either because:\\n//   * the wall is the outer-ring boundary of the layout, OR\\n//   * the wall is an inferred wall in the labWallCache (e.g. a sealed-off\\n//     segment of a quadrant boundary once the single passage was found), OR\\n//   * the neighbouring room on that side has already been explored and its\\n//     exits map tells us whether the wall between us is open.\\n// AND at most one of those walls is an actual opening.  A 0-opening pocket is\\n// unreachable; a 1-opening pocket can be entered but reveals nothing new (we\\n// can fully predict its exits map) and cannot be a through-route, so we never\\n// need to target it as a frontier.\\n//\\n// BUG FIX: previously this only consulted neighbour-room exits, so frontier\\n// pockets sealed off solely by inferred walls (the outer ring or the\\n// one-passage-per-quadrant rule) were never recognised as dead and the\\n// planner kept trying to walk to them.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction isLabKnownDeadEndFrontierRoom(state, room) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return false\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return false\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  if (!layout) return false\\n  // Never prune the goal cell — we still need to reach it.\\n  if (Number.isInteger(layout.finishX) && Number.isInteger(layout.finishY)\\n    && room.x === layout.finishX && room.y === layout.finishY) return false\\n  // modeMapOnly: the whole point of this mode is to physically VISIT every\\n  // nook of the maze, including 1-opening dead-end pockets, before stepping\\n  // into the goal quadrant.  Pruning a \\\"useless\\\" dead-end pocket here was\\n  // exactly the source of the user's complaint that modeMapOnly skips dead\\n  // ends — frontier rooms representing those pockets were being deleted\\n  // before any worker could target them.  When the mode is on we treat\\n  // every still-unexplored frontier as worth visiting; the picker takes care\\n  // of routing.\\n  if (modeMapOnly) return false\\n  // Never prune a frontier inside the exit subquadrant — once the worker\\n  // is committed to that region we want it to visit every cell, including\\n  // every dead-end pocket, instead of backtracking out of a 1-opening\\n  // pocket and giving up partway through the corner region.  This is the\\n  // \\\"exit subquadrant always fully mapped\\\" half of the user's contract:\\n  // pockets here are valuable terrain, not garbage to discard.\\n  const context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  if (context && isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(room.x, room.y, context)) return false\\n  return computeLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room).deadEnd\\n}\\n\\n// Wall/exit summary for an unexplored frontier room: how many openings has\\n// the wall analysis already proven, and is the room's wall state fully\\n// determined?  Used by the modeMapOnly picker to PREFER dead-end-shaped\\n// frontiers (1-opening, fully determined), and by the regular dead-end\\n// pruner to evict them.  Splitting the computation out lets both callers\\n// share logic without the modeMapOnly bypass that lives in\\n// isLabKnownDeadEndFrontierRoom.\\nfunction calculateLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room) {\\n  const layout = state?.layout\\n  if (!room || room.explored || !layout) return { openings: 0, fullyDetermined: false, deadEnd: false }\\n  const wallCache = getLabWallCache(state)\\n  const blockedEdges = wallCache?.blockedEdges ??
