null\\n  let openings = 0\\n  let fullyDetermined = true\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    const nx = room.x + delta.dx\\n    const ny = room.y + delta.dy\\n    if (nx < layout.minX || nx > layout.maxX || ny < layout.minY || ny > layout.maxY) continue\\n    if (blockedEdges?.has(getLabBlockedEdgeKey(room.x, room.y, dir))) continue\\n    const neighbor = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(nx, ny)]\\n    if (!(neighbor?.explored && neighbor.exits)) { fullyDetermined = false; continue }\\n    if (neighbor.exits[delta.back] === true) openings++\\n  }\\n  return { openings, fullyDetermined, deadEnd: fullyDetermined && openings <= 1 }\\n}\\n\\nfunction refreshLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room) {\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return { openings: 0, fullyDetermined: false, deadEnd: false }\\n  const summary = calculateLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room)\\n  room.frontierOpeningSummary = summary\\n  return summary\\n}\\n\\nfunction computeLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room) {\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return { openings: 0, fullyDetermined: false, deadEnd: false }\\n  if (room.frontierOpeningSummary\\n    && Number.isFinite(room.frontierOpeningSummary.openings)\\n    && typeof room.frontierOpeningSummary.fullyDetermined === \\\"boolean\\\"\\n    && typeof room.frontierOpeningSummary.deadEnd === \\\"boolean\\\") {\\n    return room.frontierOpeningSummary\\n  }\\n  return refreshLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room)\\n}\\n\\nfunction refreshAllLabFrontierOpeningSummaries(state) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return\\n  for (const room of getLabFrontierRooms(state)) refreshLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room)\\n}\\n\\n// True when a frontier room has only one currently-known way in (one\\n// explored neighbour with an open exit toward it), regardless of whether\\n// the rest of its walls are fully determined.  This is the \\\"dead-end\\n// shaped\\\" classifier modeMapOnly uses to PRIORITISE pockets — even\\n// pockets whose far walls aren't yet confirmed look like dead-ends from\\n// the side we approach them from, and we want to visit those first to\\n// maximise coverage per step.\\nfunction isLabFrontierDeadEndCandidate(state, room) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return false\\n  if (!room || room.explored) return false\\n  const summary = computeLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, room)\\n  return summary.openings <= 1\\n}\\n\\n// After recording a newly explored room at (x, y), check each of its four\\n// neighbours: if the new wall information has just made any unexplored\\n// neighbour a known dead-end pocket, evict it from the frontier.  This is the\\n// fast-path local sweep; pruneAllLabDeadEndFrontier handles wider effects\\n// (e.g. when discovering the one quadrant-passage suddenly seals dozens of\\n// distant frontier cells via inferred walls).\\nfunction pruneLabDeadEndFrontierAround(state, x, y) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return\\n  for (const [, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    const neighborKey = getLabKey(x + delta.dx, y + delta.dy)\\n    const neighbor = state.rooms?.[neighborKey]\\n    if (!neighbor || neighbor.explored) continue\\n    refreshLabFrontierOpeningSummary(state, neighbor)\\n    if (!isLabKnownDeadEndFrontierRoom(state, neighbor)) continue\\n    clearLabRoomClaim(state, neighbor)\\n    clearLabFrontierRoom(state, neighborKey)\\n    removeLabRoom(state, neighborKey)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// Returns the canonical key for the boundary segment between the two\\n// quadrants that an exit from (x, y) in direction (dx, dy) crosses, or \\\"\\\" if\\n// the exit doesn't cross a quadrant boundary.  Segment keys are sorted so\\n// they're stable regardless of which side we look from.\\nfunction getLabBoundaryCrossingSegmentKey(x, y, dx, dy, context) {\\n  if (!context) return \\\"\\\"\\n  const fromBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x, y, context)\\n  const toBounds = getLabQuadrantBoundsForCoords(x + dx, y + dy, context)\\n  if (!fromBounds || !toBounds) return \\\"\\\"\\n  if (fromBounds.key === toBounds.key) return \\\"\\\"\\n  // Sort the two quadrant keys so the segment key is direction-agnostic.\\n  return fromBounds.key < toBounds.key\\n    ? `${fromBounds.key}|${toBounds.key}`\\n    : `${toBounds.key}|${fromBounds.key}`\\n}\\n\\n// Update state.boundaryCrossingsKnown with the open crossings exposed by\\n// `room` and return true iff a NEW segment was sealed (i.e. this room\\n// discovered the unique passage on a previously-unknown boundary).\\n//\\n// PERF: this is the trigger gate for the global frontier prune — when no new\\n// segment was sealed, the wall cache picks up no additional inferred walls\\n// and the global sweep would be wasted work.  We still always run the cheap\\n// local sweep around (x, y).\\nfunction recordLabBoundaryCrossings(state, room, context = getLabInfluenceContext(state)) {\\n  if (!room?.exits || !context) return new Set()\\n  if (!(state.boundaryCrossingsKnown instanceof Set)) state.boundaryCrossingsKnown = new Set()\\n  const added = new Set()\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (room.exits[dir] !== true) continue\\n    const segmentKey = getLabBoundaryCrossingSegmentKey(room.x, room.y, delta.dx, delta.dy, context)\\n    if (!segmentKey) continue\\n    if (state.boundaryCrossingsKnown.has(segmentKey)) continue\\n    state.boundaryCrossingsKnown.add(segmentKey)\\n    added.add(segmentKey)\\n  }\\n  return added\\n}\\n\\n// Sweep EVERY frontier room and drop any that are now provably dead.  Cheap\\n// to run (frontier sets are small) and necessary because a single recordRoom\\n// can flip many distant cells from \\\"unknown\\\" to \\\"dead\\\" in one shot — namely\\n// when discovering the unique passage through a quadrant boundary causes the\\n// rest of that boundary to become inferred walls.  Called from recordLabRoom\\n// after the wall cache has been patched for a newly-sealed boundary;\\n// any other room update can only affect frontier cells in its immediate\\n// neighbourhood and is handled by the cheaper local sweep.\\nfunction pruneAllLabDeadEndFrontier(state) {\\n  if (labDisableDeadRoomDetection) return\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return\\n  refreshAllLabFrontierOpeningSummaries(state)\\n  // Snapshot keys first so we can mutate state.rooms / frontierKeys safely\\n  // while iterating.\\n  const frontierRooms = getLabFrontierRooms(state).slice()\\n  for (const room of frontierRooms) {\\n    if (!room || room.explored) continue\\n    if (!isLabKnownDeadEndFrontierRoom(state, room)) continue\\n    const key = getLabKey(room.x, room.y)\\n    clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n    clearLabFrontierRoom(state, key)\\n    removeLabRoom(state, key)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction rebuildLabWorkerClaimIndex(state) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return {}\\n  state.workerClaims = {}\\n  for (const [key, room] of Object.entries(state?.rooms ?? {})) {\\n    if (room && !room.explored && room.claimedBy) state.workerClaims[room.claimedBy] = key\\n  }\\n  state.workerClaimIndexReady = true\\n  return state.workerClaims\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabWorkerClaimIndex(state) {\\n  ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return {}\\n  if (state?.workerClaimIndexReady !== true) return rebuildLabWorkerClaimIndex(state)\\n  return state.workerClaims\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWorkerClaimEntries(state) {\\n  return Object.entries(ensureLabWorkerClaimIndex(state) ?? {})\\n}\\n\\nfunction clearLabWorkerClaim(state, workerId, expectedKey = \\\"\\\") {\\n  if (!workerId) return\\n  const workerClaims = ensureLabWorkerClaimIndex(state)\\n  if (expectedKey && workerClaims?.[workerId] !== expectedKey) return\\n  delete workerClaims[workerId]\\n}\\n\\nfunction clearLabRoomClaim(state, room) {\\n  if (!room) return\\n  const key = getLabKey(room.x, room.y)\\n  if (room.claimedBy) clearLabWorkerClaim(state, room.claimedBy, key)\\n  room.claimedBy = \\\"\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunction assignLabRoomClaim(state, room, workerId) {\\n  if (!room || !workerId) return\\n  const key = getLabKey(room.x, room.y)\\n  const workerClaims = ensureLabWorkerClaimIndex(state)\\n  if (room.claimedBy && room.claimedBy !== workerId) clearLabWorkerClaim(state, room.claimedBy, key)\\n  const previousKey = workerClaims?.[workerId]\\n  if (previousKey && previousKey !== key) {\\n    const previousRoom = state.rooms?.[previousKey]\\n    if (previousRoom?.claimedBy === workerId) previousRoom.claimedBy = \\\"\\\"\\n  }\\n  room.claimedBy = workerId\\n  workerClaims[workerId] = key\\n}\\n\\nfunction removeLabRoom(state, key) {\\n  if (!state?.rooms?.[key]) return\\n  delete state.rooms[key]\\n  if (!Number.isInteger(state.roomRecordCount)) state.roomRecordCount = Object.keys(state.rooms ?? {}).length\\n  else state.roomRecordCount = Math.max(0, state.roomRecordCount - 1)\\n}\\n\\nfunction ensureLabRoom(state, x, y, path = []) {\\n  const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n  if (!state.rooms[key]) {\\n    state.rooms[key] = {\\n      x: x,\\n      y: y,\\n      path: path.slice(),\\n      jsonLog: null,\\n      exits: null,\\n      explored: false,\\n      claimedBy: \\\"\\\"\\n    }\\n    state.roomRecordCount = (Number.isInteger(state.roomRecordCount) ? state.roomRecordCount : Object.keys(state.rooms ?? {}).length - 1) + 1\\n    markLabFrontierRoom(state, key, state.rooms[key])\\n  }\\n  else if (path.length > 0 && state.rootKey !== key && (state.rooms[key].path.length === 0 || path.length < state.rooms[key].path.length)) {\\n    state.rooms[key].path = path.slice()\\n  }\\n  return state.rooms[key]\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabDisplayLayoutKey(layout) {\\n  if (!layout) return \\\"\\\"\\n  return [layout.minX, layout.minY, layout.maxX, layout.maxY, layout.goalX, layout.goalY].join(\\\":\\\")\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBoardInfo(layout) {\\n  if (!layout) return null\\n  const { minX, minY, maxX, maxY, goalX, goalY } = layout\\n  return {\\n    minX,\\n    minY,\\n    maxX,\\n    maxY,\\n    goalX,\\n    goalY,\\n    originX: minX - 1,\\n    originY: minY - 1,\\n    width: maxX - minX + 3,\\n    height: maxY - minY + 3\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction setLabDisplayChar(displayMap, boardX, boardY, char) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(displayMap) || !Number.isInteger(boardX) || !Number.isInteger(boardY)) return false\\n  if (boardY < 0 || boardY >= displayMap.length) return false\\n  const row = displayMap[boardY]\\n  if (typeof row !== \\\"string\\\" || boardX < 0 || boardX >= row.length) return false\\n  if (row[boardX] === char) return false\\n  displayMap[boardY] = row.slice(0, boardX) + char + row.slice(boardX + 1)\\n  return true\\n}\\n\\nfunction setLabDisplayCharAtCoords(state, x, y, char) {\\n  const info = getLabBoardInfo(state?.layout)\\n  if (!info) return false\\n  return setLabDisplayChar(state.displayMap, x - info.originX, y - info.originY, char)\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// buildLabMapOutput — final render pass for the lab map view.\\n//\\n// Takes the raw rows from createLabDisplayMap (already populated with walls,\\n// halls, rooms, etc.) and overlays:\\n//   * worker positions (cyan \\\"o\\\")\\n//   * the start anchor and finish anchor (red \\\"S\\\" / \\\"X\\\")\\n//   * a dim-grey wash on the wall column / wall row that forms the\\n//     four-way quadrant border, so the player can see at a glance which\\n//     walls are the structural cross between quadrants.\\n//\\n// Boundary positions (anchors.boundaryX / anchors.boundaryY) are computed\\n// from layout / influence context by buildLabMapObject so this function\\n// stays a pure \\\"paint cells\\\" routine.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction buildLabMapOutput(boardRows, layout, workers = {}, anchors = {}) {\\n  const info = getLabBoardInfo(layout)\\n  if (!info) return Array.isArray(boardRows) ? boardRows.slice() : []\\n  const rows = Array.isArray(boardRows) ? boardRows.slice() : []\\n  const setCell = (x, y, value) => {\\n    const boardX = x - info.originX\\n    const boardY = y - info.originY\\n    if (boardY < 0 || boardY >= rows.length) return\\n    const row = rows[boardY]\\n    if (typeof row !== \\\"string\\\" || boardX < 0 || boardX >= row.length) return\\n    if (row[boardX] === value) return\\n    rows[boardY] = row.slice(0, boardX) + value + row.slice(boardX + 1)\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const worker of Object.values(workers ?? {})) {\\n    if (!worker || !Number.isInteger(worker.x) || !Number.isInteger(worker.y)) continue\\n    setCell(worker.x, worker.y, labMapWorker)\\n  }\\n\\n  const startCoords = Array.isArray(anchors?.startCoords)\\n    ? anchors.startCoords\\n    : [[Number.isInteger(anchors?.startX) ? anchors.startX : layout?.startX, Number.isInteger(anchors?.startY) ? anchors.startY : layout?.startY]]\\n  const finishX = Number.isInteger(anchors?.finishX) ? anchors.finishX : layout?.finishX\\n  const finishY = Number.isInteger(anchors?.finishY) ? anchors.finishY : layout?.finishY\\n  if (Number.isInteger(finishX) && Number.isInteger(finishY)) {\\n    setCell(finishX, finishY, labMapFinish)\\n  }\\n  for (const [startX, startY] of startCoords) {\\n    if (!Number.isInteger(startX) || !Number.isInteger(startY)) continue\\n    setCell(startX, startY, labMapStart)\\n  }\\n\\n  return rows\\n}\\n\\nfunction createLabDisplayMap(layout) {\\n  const info = getLabBoardInfo(layout)\\n  if (!info) return []\\n  const board = Array.from({ length: info.height }, (_, rowIndex) => {\\n    let row = \\\"\\\"\\n    for (let colIndex = 0; colIndex < info.width; colIndex++) {\\n      const x = info.originX + colIndex\\n      const y = info.originY + rowIndex\\n      const inBounds = x >= info.minX && x <= info.maxX && y >= info.minY && y <= info.maxY\\n      if (!inBounds || (x % 2 === 0 && y % 2 === 0)) row += labMapFill\\n      else if (x % 2 === 1 && y % 2 === 1) row += labMapUnknownRoom\\n      else row += labMapPossibleHall\\n    }\\n    return row\\n  })\\n  return board\\n}\\n\\nfunction updateLabDisplayFromRoom(state, room) {\\n  const info = getLabBoardInfo(state?.layout)\\n  if (!info || !room || !Array.isArray(state.displayMap)) return\\n  if (room.x < info.minX || room.x > info.maxX || room.y < info.minY || room.y > info.maxY) return\\n\\n  let changed = setLabDisplayChar(state.displayMap, room.x - info.originX, room.y - info.originY, room.explored ? labMapOpen : labMapUnknownRoom)\\n\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    const exitState = room.exits?.[dir]\\n    if (exitState !== true && exitState !== false) continue\\n    changed = setLabDisplayCharAtCoords(state, room.x + delta.dx / 2, room.y + delta.dy / 2, exitState ? labMapOpen : labMapFill) || changed\\n  }\\n\\n  if (changed && !state.displayRebuilding) {\\n    state.displayVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.displayVersion) ? state.displayVersion : 0) + 1\\n    state.displayOutputKey = \\\"\\\"\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction syncLabDisplayMap(state, forceRebuild = false) {\\n  if (!state?.layout) {\\n    state.displayLayoutKey = \\\"\\\"\\n    if (!Array.isArray(state.displayMap)) state.displayMap = []\\n    return state.displayMap\\n  }\\n\\n  const layoutKey = getLabDisplayLayoutKey(state.layout)\\n  if (forceRebuild || !Array.isArray(state.displayMap) || state.displayLayoutKey !== layoutKey) {\\n    state.displayMap = createLabDisplayMap(state.layout)\\n    state.displayLayoutKey = layoutKey\\n    state.displayRebuilding = true\\n    for (const room of Object.values(state.rooms ?? {})) updateLabDisplayFromRoom(state, room)\\n    state.displayRebuilding = false\\n    state.displayVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.displayVersion) ? state.displayVersion : 0) + 1\\n    state.displayOutputKey = \\\"\\\"\\n  }\\n  return state.displayMap\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// recordLabRoom — commit a worker's observation of a room into solver state.\\n//\\n// Called every time the worker reports being in a room (after a successful\\n// move, a blocked move, or the initial bootstrap probe).  Responsibilities:\\n//   * Translate the game's reported coords into our (offset-corrected) frame.\\n//   * On the very first room set rootKey and the coord offset.\\n//   * Sanitize the reported exits (sanitizeLabRoomExits forces exits closed\\n//     for the outer ring, so we never plan moves out of bounds).\\n//   * If the recorded exits CONFLICT with a previously-recorded exits map for\\n//     the same room (and we are not in allowOverwrite mode), abort: the worker\\n//     is desynced and the caller will resync.\\n//   * For each open exit, ensure a frontier room exists on the other side\\n//     (so the planner can target it).  For each closed exit, drop any\\n//     adjacent unexplored frontier room whose path was reaching us through\\n//     that now-closed wall.\\n//   * Exit early when a repeated report adds no exits and no shorter path.\\n//   * Patch wall facts, goal crossings, dead/frontier status, routing stubs,\\n//     and display rows incrementally before the next planning step.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction recordLabRoom(server, details, x, y, report, path = [], allowOverwrite = false) {\\n  const diag = labDiagStart()\\n  let state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!(state?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && state.rooms)) state = getLabState(server, details)\\n  if (!state.rootKey\\n    && path.length === 0\\n    && Array.isArray(report?.coords)\\n    && Number.isInteger(report.coords[0])\\n    && Number.isInteger(report.coords[1])) {\\n    state.coordOffsetX = x - report.coords[0]\\n    state.coordOffsetY = y - report.coords[1]\\n  }\\n  const [actualX, actualY] = getLabActualCoords(x, y, report, state)\\n  if (path.length === 0 && !state.rootKey) state.rootKey = getLabKey(actualX, actualY)\\n  const room = ensureLabRoom(state, actualX, actualY, path)\\n  if (state.rootKey === getLabKey(actualX, actualY)) room.path = []\\n  const nextJsonLog = cloneLabReport(report)\\n  const nextExits = sanitizeLabRoomExits(state, actualX, actualY, {\\n    north: Boolean(nextJsonLog?.north),\\n    east: Boolean(nextJsonLog?.east),\\n    south: Boolean(nextJsonLog?.south),\\n    west: Boolean(nextJsonLog?.west)\\n  })\\n  const wasExplored = room.explored === true\\n  const previousExits = wasExplored && room.exits ? { ...room.exits } : null\\n  const exitsConflict = room.explored\\n    && room.exits\\n    && labDirectionEntries.some(([dir]) => room.exits?.[dir] !== nextExits?.[dir])\\n  if (exitsConflict && !allowOverwrite) {\\n    clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n    inProgress.set(server, state)\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"recordLabRoom-conflict\\\", diag, `${server} ${actualX},${actualY}`)\\n    return\\n  }\\n  const roomKey = getLabKey(actualX, actualY)\\n  const pathImproved = state.rootKey !== roomKey\\n    && path.length > 0\\n    && (room.path.length === 0 || path.length < room.path.length)\\n  if (wasExplored && !exitsConflict && !pathImproved) {\\n    room.jsonLog = nextJsonLog\\n    room.explored = true\\n    clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n    clearLabFrontierRoom(state, roomKey)\\n    inProgress.set(server, state)\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"recordLabRoom-noop\\\", diag, `${server} ${actualX},${actualY}`)\\n    return\\n  }\\n  room.jsonLog = nextJsonLog\\n  room.exits = nextExits\\n  room.explored = true\\n  delete room.frontierOpeningSummary\\n  clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n  clearLabFrontierRoom(state, roomKey)\\n  if (state.rootKey === roomKey) room.path = []\\n  else if (pathImproved) room.path = path.slice()\\n\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (!room.exits[dir]) {\\n      const blockedPath = path.concat(dir)\\n      const blockedKey = getLabKey(actualX + delta.dx, actualY + delta.dy)\\n      const blockedRoom = state.rooms?.[blockedKey]\\n      if (blockedRoom\\n        && !blockedRoom.explored\\n        && Array.isArray(blockedRoom.path)\\n        && blockedRoom.path.length === blockedPath.length\\n        && blockedRoom.path.every((step, index) => step === blockedPath[index])) {\\n        clearLabRoomClaim(state, blockedRoom)\\n        clearLabFrontierRoom(state, blockedKey)\\n        removeLabRoom(state, blockedKey)\\n      }\\n      continue\\n    }\\n    const nextX = actualX + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = actualY + delta.dy\\n    if (state.layout && (nextX < state.layout.minX || nextX > state.layout.maxX || nextY < state.layout.minY || nextY > state.layout.maxY)) continue\\n    ensureLabRoom(state, nextX, nextY, path.concat(dir))\\n  }\\n\\n  // PERF: track whether THIS room's exits introduced a new quadrant-boundary\\n  // crossing.  Only when that happens does the wall cache gain new inferred\\n  // walls (the rest of that boundary segment is now sealed by the\\n  // one-passage-per-quadrant rule), and only then is the global frontier\\n  // sweep capable of finding anything new to prune.  When the answer is\\n  // false, we skip the global sweep entirely and let the cheaper local\\n  // sweep handle the immediate neighbourhood.\\n  const influenceContext = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  const addedBoundarySegments = recordLabBoundaryCrossings(state, room, influenceContext)\\n  const newBoundarySealed = addedBoundarySegments.size > 0\\n  const wallFactsChanged = newBoundarySealed || labDirectionEntries.some(([dir]) => {\\n    const previous = previousExits?.[dir]\\n    const next = room.exits?.[dir]\\n    if (!wasExplored) return next === false\\n    return previous !== next && (previous === false || next === false)\\n  })\\n  bumpLabTopologyVersion(state, { wall: wallFactsChanged, routing: true })\\n\\n  const wallCache = getLabWallCache(state, influenceContext)\\n  updateLabWallCacheForRoom(state, room, influenceContext, wallCache)\\n  if (newBoundarySealed) updateLabWallCacheForBoundarySegments(state, addedBoundarySegments, influenceContext, wallCache)\\n  updateLabKnownGoalCrossingsForRoom(state, room, influenceContext)\\n\\n  // Local sweep: the just-recorded room may have been the last missing\\n  // neighbour for one of its four adjacent frontier cells.  Drop any that\\n  // are now provable dead-end pockets so the picker stops walking workers\\n  // into them.\\n  pruneLabDeadEndFrontierAround(state, actualX, actualY)\\n\\n  // Wider sweep, gated on the seal event above: when a fresh boundary was\\n  // sealed, distant frontier cells can flip from \\\"unknown\\\" to \\\"dead\\\" in one\\n  // shot.  Frontier sets are small so the scan is cheap, but skipping it\\n  // entirely on the common case (no new seal) is cheaper still.\\n  if (newBoundarySealed) pruneAllLabDeadEndFrontier(state)\\n\\n  // Did this room introduce any new walls?  A room with all four exits\\n  // open adds nothing to the wall cache (no closed-exit walls, and the\\n  // outer-ring/boundary-inference walls are layout-driven, not per-room).\\n  // Without new walls, no enclosure analysis can have changed — pass\\n  // this fact down so updateLabRoutingForRoom can skip the dead-area\\n  // scan entirely.  Most corridor cells along an exploration run are\\n  // 2-exit (no closed exits if both opens are taken), so this short-\\n  // circuits the bulk of recordLabRoom calls.\\n  // Update the labyrinth routing graph with this room's classification\\n  // (junction node / corridor cell / gateway).  Incremental: each call only\\n  // re-stitches the corridors that touch this room, so the cost per\\n  // recordLabRoom is bounded by the corridor lengths around (x, y) — not\\n  // the whole graph.\\n  updateLabRoutingForRoom(state, room, newBoundarySealed, wallFactsChanged)\\n\\n  syncLabDisplayMap(state)\\n  updateLabDisplayFromRoom(state, room)\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n  labDiagEnd(\\\"recordLabRoom\\\", diag, `${server} ${actualX},${actualY} boundary=${newBoundarySealed} wall=${wallFactsChanged}`)\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// claimLabRoom — pick the best frontier room to target next, and reserve it\\n// for this worker.\\n//\\n// Walks every unexplored frontier room and scores it on a multi-tier\\n// comparison (progress class → progress amount → branch penalty → influence\\n// rank → goal distance → a long list of tie-breakers).  Two parallel \\\"best\\\"\\n// trackers are maintained:\\n//   * `best` — the best room not yet claimed by another live worker.\\n//   * `bestTakeover` — the best room currently claimed by another worker\\n//     that we could reach FASTER than the current claimant (so it makes\\n//     sense to steal the claim).\\n// After scanning, if a viable takeover exists and beats the unclaimed best,\\n// we steal it; otherwise we go for `best`.  The chosen room becomes our\\n// claim and a routeRoomNext table is returned so the worker only asks for\\n// one step at a time.\\n//\\n// The routing stubs and wall cache used here are wall-inference-aware, so\\n// frontier rooms reachable only through known-blocked edges already report\\n// Infinity travel distance and get filtered out automatically.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction claimLabRoom(server, details, workerId, options = {}) {\\n  const diag = labDiagStart()\\n  let frontierCount = 0\\n  const finish = (result, detail = \\\"\\\") => {\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"claimLabRoom\\\", diag, `${server} ${workerId} frontiers=${frontierCount}${detail ? ` ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`)\\n    return result\\n  }\\n  let state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!(state?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && state.rooms)) state = getLabState(server, details)\\n  else ensureLabIndexes(state)\\n  const skipKeys = options.skipKeys instanceof Set ? options.skipKeys : new Set()\\n  const currentPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n  if (!currentPosition) return finish(null, \\\"no-position\\\")\\n  const [currentX, currentY] = currentPosition\\n  const currentRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(currentX, currentY)]\\n  if (!currentRoom?.explored) return finish(null, \\\"current-unexplored\\\")\\n  const currentPath = Array.isArray(currentRoom.path) ? currentRoom.path : []\\n  const workers = state.workers ?? {}\\n\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (currentRoom.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n    const nextX = currentX + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = currentY + delta.dy\\n    if (state.layout && (nextX < state.layout.minX || nextX > state.layout.maxX || nextY < state.layout.minY || nextY > state.layout.maxY)) continue\\n    ensureLabRoom(state, nextX, nextY, currentRoom.path.concat(dir))\\n  }\\n\\n  const influenceContext = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  const frontierRooms = getLabFrontierRooms(state, {\\n    context: influenceContext,\\n    quadrantKeys: getLabFrontierQuadrantOrder(state, currentX, currentY, influenceContext)\\n  })\\n  frontierCount = frontierRooms.length\\n  if (frontierRooms.length === 0) return finish(null, \\\"no-frontiers\\\")\\n  const otherWorkers = []\\n  for (const [otherWorkerId, otherWorker] of Object.entries(workers)) {\\n    if (otherWorkerId === workerId) continue\\n    if (!otherWorker || !Number.isInteger(otherWorker.x) || !Number.isInteger(otherWorker.y)) continue\\n    otherWorkers.push(otherWorker)\\n  }\\n\\n  // Route reuse for this picker pass.  The worker's attach point and one\\n  // Dijkstra result answer every per-frontier query with a stub lookup and\\n  // a Map read; labRoutingDijkstra also caches the same answer across the\\n  // rest of this routing revision.\\n  const routingInfluenceContext = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  const routingDeferGate = shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, routingInfluenceContext)\\n  const fromAttach = nearestLabRoutingNodeFromRoom(state, currentX, currentY)\\n  const routingDijkstra = fromAttach\\n    ? labRoutingDijkstra(state, fromAttach.nodeKey, { allowGoalSubnet: !routingDeferGate, context: routingInfluenceContext })\\n    : { distances: new Map(), previous: new Map() }\\n  const getRoutedFrontierStub = (frontierX, frontierY) => state?.routing?.frontierStubs?.get(getLabKey(frontierX, frontierY))\\n  const getRoutedDistance = (frontierX, frontierY) => {\\n    if (!fromAttach) return Infinity\\n    const stub = getRoutedFrontierStub(frontierX, frontierY)\\n    if (!stub) return Infinity\\n    if (fromAttach.nodeKey === stub.parentNodeKey) return fromAttach.dirs.length + stub.cost\\n    const nodeDist = routingDijkstra.distances.get(stub.parentNodeKey)\\n    if (nodeDist === undefined) return Infinity\\n    return fromAttach.dirs.length + nodeDist + stub.cost\\n  }\\n  const getRoutedFirstStep = (frontierX, frontierY) => {\\n    if (!fromAttach) return \\\"\\\"\\n    const stub = getRoutedFrontierStub(frontierX, frontierY)\\n    if (!stub) return \\\"\\\"\\n    if (fromAttach.dirs.length > 0) return fromAttach.dirs[0]\\n    if (fromAttach.nodeKey === stub.parentNodeKey) {\\n      return stub.dirsFromNode.length > 0 ? stub.dirsFromNode[0] : stub.finalDir\\n    }\\n    return routingDijkstra.firstSteps?.get(stub.parentNodeKey) ?? \\\"\\\"\\n  }\\n  const otherClaimPaths = []\\n  for (const [claimWorkerId, claimKey] of getLabWorkerClaimEntries(state)) {\\n    if (claimWorkerId === workerId) continue\\n    const room = state.rooms?.[claimKey]\\n    if (!room || room.explored || room.claimedBy !== claimWorkerId) {\\n      clearLabWorkerClaim(state, claimWorkerId, claimKey)\\n      continue\\n    }\\n    if (!workers?.[claimWorkerId]) {\\n      clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n      continue\\n    }\\n    if (Array.isArray(room.path)) otherClaimPaths.push(room.path)\\n  }\\n  let best = null\\n  let bestBranchPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchHeadingPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestInfluenceRank = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchOverlap = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchBacktrackDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTravelDist = Infinity\\n  let bestRouteCost = Infinity\\n  let bestSpreadDist = -1\\n  let bestGoalDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeover = null\\n  let bestTakeoverBranchPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverBranchHeadingPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverInfluenceRank = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverBranchBacktrackDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverTravelDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverRouteCost = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverClaimantDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverGoalDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverGoalward = false\\n  let bestProgressClass = Infinity\\n  let bestProgressAmount = -Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverProgressClass = Infinity\\n  let bestTakeoverProgressAmount = -Infinity\\n  const influenceSignature = getLabInfluenceSignature(influenceContext)\\n  const blockedTargetCache = new Map()\\n  const getProjectedInfluenceRank = (x, y) => {\\n    return getCachedLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, influenceContext)\\n  }\\n  const isBlockedTarget = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    const targetKey = getLabKey(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (blockedTargetCache.has(targetKey)) return blockedTargetCache.get(targetKey)\\n    const blocked = getLabFrontierDeadBranchStatus(state, targetKey)\\n    blockedTargetCache.set(targetKey, blocked)\\n    return blocked\\n  }\\n  const getBranchMetrics = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    if (isBlockedTarget(targetX, targetY)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n    const firstDir = getRoutedFirstStep(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (!firstDir) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n    return getLabBranchChoiceMetrics(state, currentX, currentY, currentPath, firstDir, influenceContext)\\n  }\\n  let bestGoalward = false\\n  // modeMapOnly gating: when on, refuse to commit to any frontier room inside\\n  // the goal quadrant while non-goal frontier still exists.  Cached lookup —\\n  // one bool per scoring pass.\\n  const deferGoalQuadrant = shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, influenceContext)\\n  for (const room of frontierRooms) {\\n    if (room.explored) continue\\n    if (skipKeys.has(getLabKey(room.x, room.y))) continue\\n    if (deferGoalQuadrant && isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(room.x, room.y, influenceContext)) continue\\n    if (room.claimedBy && !state.workers?.[room.claimedBy]) clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n    const travelDist = getRoutedDistance(room.x, room.y)\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(travelDist)) continue\\n    const branchMetrics = getBranchMetrics(room.x, room.y)\\n    const branchPenalty = branchMetrics.penalty\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(branchPenalty)) continue\\n    const progressInfo = getLabTargetProgressInfo(state, currentX, currentY, room.x, room.y, influenceContext)\\n    const progressClass = progressInfo.progressClass\\n    const progressAmount = progressInfo.progressAmount\\n    const branchBacktrackDist = getLabBranchBacktrackDistance(currentPath, room.path)\\n    const routeCost = getLabRouteCost(travelDist, branchBacktrackDist)\\n    const influenceRank = getProjectedInfluenceRank(room.x, room.y)\\n    if (room.claimedBy && room.claimedBy !== workerId) {\\n      const claimantDist = getLabWorkerDistanceToClaim(server, state.workers?.[room.claimedBy], room)\\n      const goalDist = getLabGoalDistance(state, room.x, room.y)\\n      const influenceTier = getLabInfluenceTier(influenceRank)\\n      const goalward = influenceTier === 0 && isLabAxisGoalward(state, currentX, currentY, room.x, room.y, influenceContext)\\n      const influenceCompare = bestTakeover\\n        ? compareLabInfluenceWithTravel(influenceRank, routeCost, bestTakeoverInfluenceRank, bestTakeoverRouteCost)\\n        : -1\\n      const betterTakeoverTier = influenceTier < getLabInfluenceTier(bestTakeoverInfluenceRank)\\n      const goalFocusedTie = influenceCompare === 0 && influenceTier <= 1 && getLabInfluenceTier(bestTakeoverInfluenceRank) <= 1\\n      const routeIsCompetitive = routeCost <= bestTakeoverRouteCost + labInfluenceTravelTolerance\\n        || branchBacktrackDist <= bestTakeoverBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance\\n      if (!Number.isFinite(claimantDist)\\n        || travelDist < claimantDist\\n        || (travelDist === claimantDist && isLabWorkerAuthoritative(state, workerId, room.claimedBy))) {\\n      if (!bestTakeover\\n          || progressClass < bestTakeoverProgressClass\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount > bestTakeoverProgressAmount)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty < bestTakeoverBranchPenalty)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && branchMetrics.headingPenalty < bestTakeoverBranchHeadingPenalty && routeIsCompetitive)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && goalward && !bestTakeoverGoalward && routeIsCompetitive)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && (!bestTakeoverGoalward || goalward) && influenceCompare < 0 && (betterTakeoverTier || branchBacktrackDist <= bestTakeoverBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance))\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist < bestTakeoverGoalDist)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && goalDist < bestTakeoverGoalDist && routeIsCompetitive)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist === bestTakeoverGoalDist && routeCost < bestTakeoverRouteCost)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && branchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance < bestTakeoverBranchBacktrackDist)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && !goalFocusedTie && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost < bestTakeoverRouteCost)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestTakeoverRouteCost && travelDist < bestTakeoverTravelDist)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestTakeoverRouteCost && travelDist === bestTakeoverTravelDist && claimantDist > bestTakeoverClaimantDist)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestTakeoverRouteCost && travelDist === bestTakeoverTravelDist && claimantDist === bestTakeoverClaimantDist && goalDist < bestTakeoverGoalDist)\\n          || (progressClass === bestTakeoverProgressClass && progressAmount === bestTakeoverProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestTakeoverBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestTakeoverRouteCost && travelDist === bestTakeoverTravelDist && claimantDist === bestTakeoverClaimantDist && goalDist === bestTakeoverGoalDist && room.path.length < bestTakeover.path.length)\\n        ) {\\n          bestTakeover = room\\n          bestTakeoverProgressClass = progressClass\\n          bestTakeoverProgressAmount = progressAmount\\n          bestTakeoverBranchPenalty = branchPenalty\\n          bestTakeoverBranchHeadingPenalty = branchMetrics.headingPenalty\\n          bestTakeoverInfluenceRank = influenceRank\\n          bestTakeoverBranchBacktrackDist = branchBacktrackDist\\n          bestTakeoverTravelDist = travelDist\\n          bestTakeoverRouteCost = routeCost\\n          bestTakeoverClaimantDist = claimantDist\\n          bestTakeoverGoalDist = goalDist\\n          bestTakeoverGoalward = goalward\\n        }\\n      }\\n      continue\\n    }\\n    let branchOverlap = Infinity\\n    for (const path of otherClaimPaths) branchOverlap = Math.min(branchOverlap, getLabSharedPathLength(room.path, path))\\n    const goalDist = getLabGoalDistance(state, room.x, room.y)\\n    let spreadDist = Infinity\\n    for (const otherWorker of otherWorkers) {\\n      spreadDist = Math.min(spreadDist, Math.abs(room.x - otherWorker.x) + Math.abs(room.y - otherWorker.y))\\n    }\\n    const influenceCompare = best\\n      ? compareLabInfluenceWithTravel(influenceRank, routeCost, bestInfluenceRank, bestRouteCost)\\n      : -1\\n    const influenceTier = getLabInfluenceTier(influenceRank)\\n    const goalward = influenceTier === 0 && isLabAxisGoalward(state, currentX, currentY, room.x, room.y, influenceContext)\\n    const betterTier = influenceTier < getLabInfluenceTier(bestInfluenceRank)\\n    const goalFocusedTie = influenceCompare === 0 && influenceTier <= 1 && getLabInfluenceTier(bestInfluenceRank) <= 1\\n    const canUseSpreadTies = !goalFocusedTie || (goalDist === bestGoalDist && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist)\\n    const routeIsCompetitive = routeCost <= bestRouteCost + labInfluenceTravelTolerance\\n      || branchBacktrackDist <= bestBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance\\n    if (!best\\n      || progressClass < bestProgressClass\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount > bestProgressAmount)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty < bestBranchPenalty)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && branchMetrics.headingPenalty < bestBranchHeadingPenalty && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalward && !bestGoalward && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && (!bestGoalward || goalward) && influenceCompare < 0 && (betterTier || branchBacktrackDist <= bestBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance))\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist < bestGoalDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && goalDist < bestGoalDist && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist === bestGoalDist && routeCost < bestRouteCost)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && branchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance < bestBranchBacktrackDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && !goalFocusedTie && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost < bestRouteCost)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && !goalFocusedTie && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist < bestTravelDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && branchOverlap < bestBranchOverlap)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && branchOverlap === bestBranchOverlap && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist && spreadDist > bestSpreadDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && branchOverlap === bestBranchOverlap && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist && spreadDist === bestSpreadDist && goalDist < bestGoalDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && branchOverlap === bestBranchOverlap && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist && spreadDist === bestSpreadDist && goalDist === bestGoalDist && room.path.length < best.path.length)) {\\n      best = room\\n      bestProgressClass = progressClass\\n      bestProgressAmount = progressAmount\\n      bestBranchPenalty = branchPenalty\\n      bestBranchHeadingPenalty = branchMetrics.headingPenalty\\n      bestInfluenceRank = influenceRank\\n      bestBranchOverlap = branchOverlap\\n      bestBranchBacktrackDist = branchBacktrackDist\\n      bestTravelDist = travelDist\\n      bestRouteCost = routeCost\\n      bestSpreadDist = spreadDist\\n      bestGoalDist = goalDist\\n      bestGoalward = goalward\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  const takeoverCompare = bestTakeover && best\\n    ? compareLabInfluenceWithTravel(bestTakeoverInfluenceRank, bestTakeoverRouteCost, bestInfluenceRank, bestRouteCost)\\n    : -1\\n  if (bestTakeover && (!best\\n    || bestTakeoverProgressClass < bestProgressClass\\n    || (bestTakeoverProgressClass === bestProgressClass && bestTakeoverProgressAmount > bestProgressAmount)\\n    || (bestTakeoverProgressClass === bestProgressClass && bestTakeoverProgressAmount === bestProgressAmount && bestTakeoverBranchPenalty < bestBranchPenalty)\\n    || (bestTakeoverProgressClass === bestProgressClass && bestTakeoverProgressAmount === bestProgressAmount && bestTakeoverBranchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && bestTakeoverBranchHeadingPenalty < bestBranchHeadingPenalty)\\n    || (bestTakeoverProgressClass === bestProgressClass && bestTakeoverProgressAmount === bestProgressAmount && bestTakeoverBranchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && bestTakeoverBranchHeadingPenalty === bestBranchHeadingPenalty && takeoverCompare < 0))) {\\n    assignLabRoomClaim(state, bestTakeover, workerId)\\n    inProgress.set(server, state)\\n    const takeoverRouteRoomNext = getLabRouteRoomNextFromDirs(currentX, currentY, [getRoutedFirstStep(bestTakeover.x, bestTakeover.y)])\\n    return finish({\\n      key: getLabKey(bestTakeover.x, bestTakeover.y),\\n      x: bestTakeover.x,\\n      y: bestTakeover.y,\\n      path: bestTakeover.path.slice(),\\n      // Routing-tree-first planner.  If routing can't answer the query,\\n      // routeRoomNext is empty and the next picker pass will choose again.\\n      travelPath: [],\\n      routeRoomNext: takeoverRouteRoomNext,\\n      allowGoalSubnet: !routingDeferGate,\\n      fromX: currentX,\\n      fromY: currentY,\\n      influenceSignature\\n    }, `takeover=${bestTakeover.x},${bestTakeover.y} dist=${bestTakeoverTravelDist}`)\\n  }\\n  if (!best) return finish(null, \\\"no-candidate\\\")\\n  assignLabRoomClaim(state, best, workerId)\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n  const routeRoomNext = getLabRouteRoomNextFromDirs(currentX, currentY, [getRoutedFirstStep(best.x, best.y)])\\n  return finish({\\n    key: getLabKey(best.x, best.y),\\n    x: best.x,\\n    y: best.y,\\n    path: best.path.slice(),\\n    travelPath: [],\\n    routeRoomNext,\\n    allowGoalSubnet: !routingDeferGate,\\n    fromX: currentX,\\n    fromY: currentY,\\n    influenceSignature\\n  }, `best=${best.x},${best.y} dist=${bestTravelDist}`)\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// getLabAdvanceTarget — pick an *explored* room to relocate to that sits\\n// adjacent to a useful frontier.\\n//\\n// Used when claimLabRoom couldn't lock down a frontier directly (e.g. all\\n// nearby frontier rooms are claimed or blocked).  Instead of claiming a\\n// frontier we walk to a known room from which a frontier hangs off, so the\\n// next iteration of claimAdjacentLabRoom / claimLabRoom has fresh options.\\n// Same scoring philosophy as claimLabRoom (progress class → branch penalty →\\n// influence → tie-breakers) but applied to the parent rooms of frontier\\n// cells instead of to the frontier cells themselves.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction getLabAdvanceTarget(server, workerId) {\\n  const diag = labDiagStart()\\n  let frontierCount = 0\\n  const finish = (result, detail = \\\"\\\") => {\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"getLabAdvanceTarget\\\", diag, `${server} ${workerId} frontiers=${frontierCount}${detail ? ` ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`)\\n    return result\\n  }\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return finish(null, \\\"no-state\\\")\\n  const currentPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n  if (!currentPosition) return finish(null, \\\"no-position\\\")\\n  const [currentX, currentY] = currentPosition\\n  const currentRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(currentX, currentY)]\\n  const currentPath = Array.isArray(currentRoom?.path) ? currentRoom.path : []\\n  const influenceContext = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  const frontierRooms = getLabFrontierRooms(state, {\\n    context: influenceContext,\\n    quadrantKeys: getLabFrontierQuadrantOrder(state, currentX, currentY, influenceContext)\\n  })\\n  frontierCount = frontierRooms.length\\n  const otherWorkers = []\\n  for (const [otherWorkerId, otherWorker] of Object.entries(state.workers ?? {})) {\\n    if (otherWorkerId === workerId) continue\\n    if (!otherWorker || !Number.isInteger(otherWorker.x) || !Number.isInteger(otherWorker.y)) continue\\n    otherWorkers.push({ x: otherWorker.x, y: otherWorker.y })\\n  }\\n  let best = null\\n  let bestClaimPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchHeadingPenalty = Infinity\\n  let bestInfluenceRank = Infinity\\n  let bestBranchBacktrackDist = Infinity\\n  let bestTravelDist = Infinity\\n  let bestRouteCost = Infinity\\n  let bestOccupancy = Infinity\\n  let bestDepth = -1\\n  let bestGoalDist = Infinity\\n  let bestGoalward = false\\n  let bestProgressClass = Infinity\\n  let bestProgressAmount = -Infinity\\n  // Route reuse for relocation targets.  One Dijkstra run from the worker's\\n  // nearest routing node plus a small attach cache answers every explored\\n  // parent-room distance / first-step query in this picker pass.\\n  const advanceDeferGate = shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, influenceContext)\\n  const advanceFromAttach = nearestLabRoutingNodeFromRoom(state, currentX, currentY)\\n  const advanceDijkstra = advanceFromAttach\\n    ? labRoutingDijkstra(state, advanceFromAttach.nodeKey, { allowGoalSubnet: !advanceDeferGate, context: influenceContext })\\n    : { distances: new Map(), previous: new Map() }\\n  const advanceAttachCache = new Map()\\n  const getAdvanceTargetAttach = (x, y) => {\\n    const key = getLabKey(x, y)\\n    if (advanceAttachCache.has(key)) return advanceAttachCache.get(key)\\n    const attach = nearestLabRoutingNodeFromRoom(state, x, y)\\n    advanceAttachCache.set(key, attach)\\n    return attach\\n  }\\n  const getRoutedExploredDistance = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    if (!advanceFromAttach) return Infinity\\n    if (currentX === targetX && currentY === targetY) return 0\\n    const toAttach = getAdvanceTargetAttach(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (!toAttach) return Infinity\\n    if (toAttach.nodeKey === advanceFromAttach.nodeKey) return advanceFromAttach.dirs.length + toAttach.dirs.length\\n    const nodeDist = advanceDijkstra.distances.get(toAttach.nodeKey)\\n    if (nodeDist === undefined) return Infinity\\n    return advanceFromAttach.dirs.length + nodeDist + toAttach.dirs.length\\n  }\\n  const getRoutedExploredFirstStep = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    if (!advanceFromAttach) return \\\"\\\"\\n    if (currentX === targetX && currentY === targetY) return \\\"\\\"\\n    if (advanceFromAttach.dirs.length > 0) return advanceFromAttach.dirs[0]\\n    const toAttach = getAdvanceTargetAttach(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (!toAttach) return \\\"\\\"\\n    if (advanceFromAttach.nodeKey === toAttach.nodeKey) {\\n      // Target sits on (or hangs off) our same routing node.  First step\\n      // toward target is the reverse of the last step of toAttach.dirs\\n      // (which walks target→node).  Empty when target IS the node.\\n      if (toAttach.dirs.length === 0) return \\\"\\\"\\n      const lastBack = toAttach.dirs[toAttach.dirs.length - 1]\\n      return labDirections[lastBack]?.back ?? \\\"\\\"\\n    }\\n    return advanceDijkstra.firstSteps?.get(toAttach.nodeKey) ?? \\\"\\\"\\n  }\\n  const blockedTargetCache = new Map()\\n  const getProjectedInfluenceRank = (x, y) => {\\n    return getCachedLabProjectedInfluenceRank(state, x, y, influenceContext)\\n  }\\n  const isBlockedTarget = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    const targetKey = getLabKey(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (blockedTargetCache.has(targetKey)) return blockedTargetCache.get(targetKey)\\n    const blocked = getLabFrontierDeadBranchStatus(state, targetKey)\\n    blockedTargetCache.set(targetKey, blocked)\\n    return blocked\\n  }\\n  const getBranchMetrics = (targetX, targetY) => {\\n    if (isBlockedTarget(targetX, targetY)) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n    const firstDir = getRoutedExploredFirstStep(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (!firstDir) return { penalty: Infinity, headingPenalty: Infinity }\\n    return getLabBranchChoiceMetrics(state, currentX, currentY, currentPath, firstDir, influenceContext)\\n  }\\n\\n  const considerTarget = (targetX, targetY, depth, claimPenalty = 0, focusX = targetX, focusY = targetY) => {\\n    const targetRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(targetX, targetY)]\\n    if (!targetRoom?.explored) return\\n    if (currentX === targetX && currentY === targetY) return\\n    const travelDist = getRoutedExploredDistance(targetX, targetY)\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(travelDist) || travelDist <= 0) return\\n    const branchMetrics = getBranchMetrics(focusX, focusY)\\n    const branchPenalty = branchMetrics.penalty\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(branchPenalty)) return\\n    const progressInfo = getLabTargetProgressInfo(state, currentX, currentY, focusX, focusY, influenceContext)\\n    const progressClass = progressInfo.progressClass\\n    const progressAmount = progressInfo.progressAmount\\n    const branchBacktrackDist = getLabBranchBacktrackDistance(currentPath, targetRoom.path)\\n    const routeCost = getLabRouteCost(travelDist, branchBacktrackDist)\\n    let occupancy = 0\\n    for (const otherWorker of otherWorkers) {\\n      if (otherWorker.x === targetX && otherWorker.y === targetY) occupancy++\\n    }\\n    const influenceRank = getProjectedInfluenceRank(focusX, focusY)\\n    const goalDist = getLabGoalDistance(state, focusX, focusY)\\n    const influenceCompare = best\\n      ? compareLabInfluenceWithTravel(influenceRank, routeCost, bestInfluenceRank, bestRouteCost)\\n      : -1\\n    const influenceTier = getLabInfluenceTier(influenceRank)\\n    const goalward = influenceTier === 0 && isLabAxisGoalward(state, currentX, currentY, focusX, focusY, influenceContext)\\n    const betterTier = influenceTier < getLabInfluenceTier(bestInfluenceRank)\\n    const goalFocusedTie = influenceCompare === 0 && influenceTier <= 1 && getLabInfluenceTier(bestInfluenceRank) <= 1\\n    const canUseSpreadTies = !goalFocusedTie || (goalDist === bestGoalDist && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist)\\n    const routeIsCompetitive = routeCost <= bestRouteCost + labInfluenceTravelTolerance\\n      || branchBacktrackDist <= bestBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance\\n\\n    if (!best\\n      || progressClass < bestProgressClass\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount > bestProgressAmount)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty < bestClaimPenalty)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty < bestBranchPenalty)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && branchMetrics.headingPenalty < bestBranchHeadingPenalty && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalward && !bestGoalward && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && (!bestGoalward || goalward) && influenceCompare < 0 && (betterTier || branchBacktrackDist <= bestBranchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance))\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist < bestGoalDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && goalDist < bestGoalDist && routeIsCompetitive)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && goalFocusedTie && goalDist === bestGoalDist && routeCost < bestRouteCost)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && influenceCompare === 0 && branchBacktrackDist + labBranchBacktrackTolerance < bestBranchBacktrackDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && !goalFocusedTie && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost < bestRouteCost)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && !goalFocusedTie && influenceCompare === 0 && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist < bestTravelDist)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && occupancy < bestOccupancy)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && occupancy === bestOccupancy && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist && depth > bestDepth)\\n      || (progressClass === bestProgressClass && progressAmount === bestProgressAmount && claimPenalty === bestClaimPenalty && branchPenalty === bestBranchPenalty && canUseSpreadTies && influenceCompare === 0 && occupancy === bestOccupancy && routeCost === bestRouteCost && travelDist === bestTravelDist && depth === bestDepth && goalDist < bestGoalDist)) {\\n      best = {\\n        key: getLabKey(targetX, targetY),\\n        x: targetX,\\n        y: targetY,\\n        path: targetRoom.path.slice(),\\n        travelPath: []\\n      }\\n      bestClaimPenalty = claimPenalty\\n      bestProgressClass = progressClass\\n      bestProgressAmount = progressAmount\\n      bestBranchPenalty = branchPenalty\\n      bestBranchHeadingPenalty = branchMetrics.headingPenalty\\n      bestInfluenceRank = influenceRank\\n      bestBranchBacktrackDist = branchBacktrackDist\\n      bestDepth = depth\\n      bestTravelDist = travelDist\\n      bestRouteCost = routeCost\\n      bestOccupancy = occupancy\\n      bestGoalDist = goalDist\\n      bestGoalward = goalward\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // modeMapOnly gating: don't relocate to a parent of a goal-quadrant frontier\\n  // while non-goal frontier still exists.  Cached lookup so this is one bool.\\n  const deferGoalQuadrant = shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, influenceContext)\\n  for (const room of frontierRooms) {\\n    if (room?.explored) continue\\n    if (deferGoalQuadrant && isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(room.x, room.y, influenceContext)) continue\\n    const liveClaimedBy = room?.claimedBy && room.claimedBy !== workerId && state.workers?.[room.claimedBy] ? room.claimedBy : \\\"\\\"\\n    let sawParentTarget = false\\n    for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n      const parentX = room.x - delta.dx\\n      const parentY = room.y - delta.dy\\n      const parentRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(parentX, parentY)]\\n      if (!parentRoom?.explored || parentRoom.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n      sawParentTarget = true\\n      considerTarget(parentX, parentY, Array.isArray(parentRoom.path) ? parentRoom.path.length : 0, liveClaimedBy ? 1 : 0, room.x, room.y)\\n    }\\n    if (!sawParentTarget && Array.isArray(room.path) && room.path.length > 0) {\\n      const finalDir = room.path[room.path.length - 1]\\n      const finalDelta = labDirections[finalDir]\\n      if (finalDelta) {\\n        const parentX = room.x - finalDelta.dx\\n        const parentY = room.y - finalDelta.dy\\n        const parentRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(parentX, parentY)]\\n        if (parentRoom?.explored) {\\n          considerTarget(parentX, parentY, Array.isArray(parentRoom.path) ? parentRoom.path.length : Math.max(0, room.path.length - 1), liveClaimedBy ? 1 : 0, room.x, room.y)\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  if (best) {\\n    best.travelPath = []\\n    best.routeRoomNext = getLabRouteRoomNextFromDirs(currentX, currentY, [getRoutedExploredFirstStep(best.x, best.y)])\\n    best.allowGoalSubnet = !advanceDeferGate\\n    return finish(best, `parent=${best.x},${best.y} dist=${bestTravelDist}`)\\n  }\\n\\n  return finish(null, \\\"no-parent-target\\\")\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// getLabRetreatTarget — fall-back of last resort: step exactly one room back\\n// along the path we used to arrive at the current cell.  Used when neither\\n// claimLabRoom nor getLabAdvanceTarget can find anything useful and we need\\n// the worker to back out of a dead corridor before it can re-plan.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction getLabRetreatTarget(server, workerId) {\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!state?.rooms) return null\\n  const currentPosition = getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId)\\n  if (!currentPosition) return null\\n  const [currentX, currentY] = currentPosition\\n  const currentRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(currentX, currentY)]\\n  if (!currentRoom?.explored || !Array.isArray(currentRoom.path) || currentRoom.path.length === 0) return null\\n  const lastDir = currentRoom.path[currentRoom.path.length - 1]\\n  const retreatDir = labDirections[lastDir]?.back\\n  const retreatDelta = retreatDir ? labDirections[retreatDir] : null\\n  if (!retreatDir || !retreatDelta) return null\\n  const targetX = currentX + retreatDelta.dx\\n  const targetY = currentY + retreatDelta.dy\\n  const targetRoom = state.rooms?.[getLabKey(targetX, targetY)]\\n  if (!targetRoom?.explored) return null\\n  return {\\n    key: getLabKey(targetX, targetY),\\n    x: targetX,\\n    y: targetY,\\n    path: targetRoom.path.slice(),\\n    travelPath: [retreatDir],\\n    routeRoomNext: getLabRouteRoomNextFromDirs(currentX, currentY, [retreatDir])\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction releaseLabClaim(server, claim, workerId) {\\n  if (!claim) return\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[claim.key]\\n  if (!room || room.claimedBy !== workerId) return\\n  clearLabRoomClaim(state, room)\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabSharedPathLength(left = [], right = []) {\\n  let shared = 0\\n  while (shared < left.length && shared < right.length && left[shared] === right[shared]) shared++\\n  return shared\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabBranchBacktrackDistance(currentPath = [], targetPath = []) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(currentPath) || !Array.isArray(targetPath)) return Infinity\\n  return currentPath.length - getLabSharedPathLength(currentPath, targetPath)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabPathDistance(currentPath = [], targetPath = []) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(currentPath) || !Array.isArray(targetPath)) return Infinity\\n  const shared = getLabSharedPathLength(currentPath, targetPath)\\n  return (currentPath.length - shared) + (targetPath.length - shared)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWorkerDistanceToClaim(server, worker, claim) {\\n  if (!worker || !claim || !Number.isInteger(worker.x) || !Number.isInteger(worker.y)) return Infinity\\n  if (worker.x === claim.x && worker.y === claim.y) return 0\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  const workerRoom = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(worker.x, worker.y)]\\n  const pathDistance = getLabPathDistance(workerRoom?.path, claim.path)\\n  if (Number.isFinite(pathDistance)) return pathDistance\\n  // Routing-tree fallback — claim points at a frontier room (or a freshly\\n  // recorded one), and the routing graph already tracks both via\\n  // frontierStubs / nearestLabRoutingNodeFromRoom.  No BFS needed.\\n  const claimRoom = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(claim.x, claim.y)]\\n  if (claimRoom && !claimRoom.explored) {\\n    const routedDist = getLabRoutedFrontierDistance(state, worker.x, worker.y, claim.x, claim.y)\\n    if (Number.isFinite(routedDist)) return routedDist\\n  } else if (claimRoom?.explored) {\\n    const routedDist = getLabRoutedDistance(state, worker.x, worker.y, claim.x, claim.y)\\n    if (Number.isFinite(routedDist)) return routedDist\\n  }\\n  return Infinity\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWorkerPid(workerId) {\\n  const match = String(workerId ?? \\\"\\\").match(/-(\\\\d+)$/)\\n  return match ? Number(match[1]) : Infinity\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWorkerStartedAt(worker) {\\n  if (Number.isFinite(worker?.startedAt)) return worker.startedAt\\n  if (Number.isFinite(worker?.updatedAt)) return worker.updatedAt\\n  return Infinity\\n}\\n\\nfunction compareLabWorkerAuthority(state, leftWorkerId, rightWorkerId) {\\n  if (leftWorkerId === rightWorkerId) return 0\\n  const leftWorker = state?.workers?.[leftWorkerId]\\n  const rightWorker = state?.workers?.[rightWorkerId]\\n  const leftStarted = getLabWorkerStartedAt(leftWorker)\\n  const rightStarted = getLabWorkerStartedAt(rightWorker)\\n  if (leftStarted !== rightStarted) return leftStarted < rightStarted ? -1 : 1\\n  const leftPid = getLabWorkerPid(leftWorkerId)\\n  const rightPid = getLabWorkerPid(rightWorkerId)\\n  if (leftPid !== rightPid) return leftPid < rightPid ? -1 : 1\\n  return String(leftWorkerId).localeCompare(String(rightWorkerId))\\n}\\n\\nfunction isLabWorkerAuthoritative(state, candidateWorkerId, currentWorkerId) {\\n  return compareLabWorkerAuthority(state, candidateWorkerId, currentWorkerId) < 0\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// claimAdjacentLabRoom — single-step fast-path picker.\\n//\\n// Looks at every unexplored open neighbour of (x, y) and, when one stands out\\n// as the obvious next move, claims it directly without going through the full\\n// frontier scoring pass.  \\\"Stands out\\\" means: there is at least one neighbour\\n// whose direction is goalward (toward the exit corner of the current\\n// quadrant — for the goal quadrant that's the bottom-right exit corner) and\\n// not blocked by any of:\\n//   * the inferred wall cache (outer ring + sealed quadrant boundaries)\\n//   * a known dead-branch\\n//   * an enclosed-by-walls branch (Infinite branch penalty)\\n//   * a live competing claim from another worker\\n//   * the modeMapOnly gate (can't step into goal quadrant while non-goal\\n//     frontier remains)\\n// Among the surviving candidates we prefer GOALWARD over non-goalward, then\\n// the lower branch penalty, then the goalward direction matching `lastDir`\\n// of the current path (fewer turns).\\n//\\n// BUG FIX: previous implementation bailed whenever the current room had\\n// MORE THAN ONE unexplored open neighbour, which forced the planner into the\\n// full frontier picker — a pass whose progressAmount-heavy scoring could\\n// pick a distant frontier and route the worker backward through known\\n// territory.  That manifested as \\\"backtracking instead of taking the\\n// goalforward neighbour right next to me.\\\"  Picking among multiple adjacent\\n// candidates here keeps a worker that has a viable forward move from ever\\n// retreating.\\n// =============================================================================\\nfunction claimAdjacentLabRoom(server, workerId, x, y, options = {}) {\\n  const diag = labDiagStart()\\n  const finish = (result, detail = \\\"\\\") => {\\n    labDiagEnd(\\\"claimAdjacentLabRoom\\\", diag, `${server} ${workerId} at=${x},${y}${detail ? ` ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`)\\n    return result\\n  }\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  const room = state?.rooms?.[getLabKey(x, y)]\\n  if (!room?.explored || !room.exits) return finish(null, \\\"no-room\\\")\\n  const influenceContext = getLabInfluenceContext(state)\\n  const deferGoalQuadrant = shouldDeferGoalQuadrant(state, influenceContext)\\n  const goalDirs = influenceContext ? getLabImmediateGoalwardDirs(state, x, y, influenceContext) : []\\n  const lastDir = Array.isArray(room.path) && room.path.length > 0 ? room.path[room.path.length - 1] : \\\"\\\"\\n  const skipKeys = options.skipKeys instanceof Set ? options.skipKeys : null\\n  const candidates = []\\n  for (const [dir, delta] of labDirectionEntries) {\\n    if (room.exits?.[dir] !== true) continue\\n    const nextX = x + delta.dx\\n    const nextY = y + delta.dy\\n    if (state.layout && (nextX < state.layout.minX || nextX > state.layout.maxX\\n      || nextY < state.layout.minY || nextY > state.layout.maxY)) continue\\n    const nextKey = getLabKey(nextX, nextY)\\n    if (skipKeys?.has(nextKey)) continue\\n    const nextRoom = state.rooms?.[nextKey]\\n    if (!nextRoom || nextRoom.explored) continue\\n    if (getLabFrontierDeadBranchStatus(state, nextKey)) continue\\n    if (deferGoalQuadrant && isLabInExitGoalSubquadrant(nextX, nextY, influenceContext)) continue\\n    if (nextRoom.claimedBy && nextRoom.claimedBy !== workerId) {\\n      if (state.workers?.[nextRoom.claimedBy]) continue\\n      clearLabRoomClaim(state, nextRoom)\\n    }\\n    const branchPenalty = getLabBranchChoicePenalty(state, x, y, room.path ?? [], dir, influenceContext)\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(branchPenalty)) continue\\n    const goalward = goalDirs.includes(dir)\\n    candidates.push({ dir, delta, room: nextRoom, branchPenalty, goalward, sameHeading: dir === lastDir })\\n  }\\n  if (candidates.length === 0) return finish(null, \\\"no-candidates\\\")\\n\\n  // Prefer goalward, then minimal branch penalty, then continue same heading.\\n  const compareCandidate = (a, b) => {\\n    if (a.goalward !== b.goalward) return a.goalward ? -1 : 1\\n    if (a.branchPenalty !== b.branchPenalty) return a.branchPenalty - b.branchPenalty\\n    if (a.sameHeading !== b.sameHeading) return a.sameHeading ? -1 : 1\\n    return 0\\n  }\\n  let bestLiveCandidate = null\\n  let bestDeadCandidate = null\\n  for (const candidate of candidates) {\\n    if (candidate.deadBranch) {\\n      if (!bestDeadCandidate || compareCandidate(candidate, bestDeadCandidate) < 0) bestDeadCandidate = candidate\\n    } else if (!bestLiveCandidate || compareCandidate(candidate, bestLiveCandidate) < 0) {\\n      bestLiveCandidate = candidate\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const pick = bestLiveCandidate ?? candidates[0]\\n  // Take adjacent work immediately.  The routed picker is still available\\n  // when there is no local frontier, but sending a worker on a 15+ step\\n  // cross-map route while it has a one-step frontier is exactly the slow\\n  // behaviour we are trying to avoid.\\n\\n  assignLabRoomClaim(state, pick.room, workerId)\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n  return finish({\\n    key: getLabKey(pick.room.x, pick.room.y),\\n    x: pick.room.x,\\n    y: pick.room.y,\\n    path: Array.isArray(pick.room.path)\\n      ? pick.room.path.slice()\\n      : getLabPathAfterMove(room.path ?? [], pick.dir),\\n    travelPath: [pick.dir],\\n    routeRoomNext: getLabRouteRoomNextFromDirs(x, y, [pick.dir]),\\n    fromX: x,\\n    fromY: y,\\n    influenceSignature: \\\"\\\"\\n  }, `pick=${pick.dir} target=${pick.room.x},${pick.room.y} candidates=${candidates.length}`)\\n}\\n\\nfunction updateLabWorkerPosition(server, details, workerId, x, y) {\\n  let state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!(state?.details?.modelId === \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" && state.rooms)) state = getLabState(server, details)\\n  if (!state.workers) state.workers = {}\\n  const existingWorker = state.workers?.[workerId]\\n  const existingStartedAt = getLabWorkerStartedAt(existingWorker)\\n  if (existingWorker?.x === x && existingWorker?.y === y && Number.isFinite(existingStartedAt)) return\\n  // Diagnostic: feed every physical movement into the oscillation detector.\\n  // This sits before the state mutation so the previous position is still\\n  // implicitly available via the history buffer in the helper.\\n  labRecordWorkerPositionForOscillation(workerId, x, y)\\n  const now = Date.now()\\n  if (existingWorker) {\\n    existingWorker.x = x\\n    existingWorker.y = y\\n    existingWorker.startedAt = existingStartedAt === Infinity ? now : existingStartedAt\\n    existingWorker.updatedAt = now\\n  }\\n  else {\\n    state.workers[workerId] = {\\n      x: x,\\n      y: y,\\n      startedAt: now,\\n      updatedAt: now\\n    }\\n  }\\n  state.workersVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.workersVersion) ? state.workersVersion : 0) + 1\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n}\\n\\nfunction getLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId) {\\n  const worker = inProgress.get(server)?.workers?.[workerId]\\n  if (!worker) return null\\n  return [worker.x, worker.y]\\n}\\n\\nfunction clearLabWorkerPosition(server, workerId) {\\n  const state = inProgress.get(server)\\n  if (!state?.rooms && !state?.workers?.[workerId]) return\\n  const workerClaims = ensureLabWorkerClaimIndex(state)\\n  const claimKey = workerClaims?.[workerId]\\n  if (!state?.workers?.[workerId] && !claimKey) return\\n  if (claimKey) {\\n    const room = state.rooms?.[claimKey]\\n    if (room?.claimedBy === workerId) room.claimedBy = \\\"\\\"\\n    delete workerClaims[workerId]\\n  }\\n  if (!state?.workers?.[workerId]) {\\n    state.workersVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.workersVersion) ? state.workersVersion : 0) + 1\\n    inProgress.set(server, state)\\n    return\\n  }\\n  delete state.workers[workerId]\\n  state.workersVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.workersVersion) ? state.workersVersion : 0) + 1\\n  inProgress.set(server, state)\\n}\\n\\nfunction resetPersistedLabState() {\\n  if (!(inProgress instanceof Map)) return\\n  for (const [server, state] of inProgress.entries()) {\\n    if (state?.details?.modelId !== \\\"(The Labyrinth)\\\" || !state.rooms) continue\\n    state.workers = {}\\n    state.workersVersion = (Number.isInteger(state.workersVersion) ? state.workersVersion : 0) + 1\\n    state.workerClaims = {}\\n    state.workerClaimIndexReady = true\\n    for (const room of Object.values(state.rooms)) room.claimedBy = \\\"\\\"\\n    inProgress.set(server, state)\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// LABYRINTH ROUTING TREE\\n// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// The routing tree is a compact, incrementally-maintained graph that lets\\n// pathing queries skip most corridor cells and avoid rebuilding a whole-room\\n// travel map for each worker movement.\\n//\\n// Definitions:\\n//   * NODE — a recorded room with !=2 open exits (junction with 3+ exits, or\\n//     a 1-exit dead-end), or any recorded room that sits next to a quadrant\\n//     boundary with an open exit crossing it (\\\"gateway\\\" — see below).\\n//   * CORRIDOR CELL — a recorded room with exactly 2 open exits and not on a\\n//     boundary crossing.  Corridor cells aren't nodes; they're collapsed into\\n//     edge cost.\\n//   * EDGE — connects two nodes A, B.  Stores the ordered direction sequence\\n//     from A to B (so walking is just iteration; no BFS needed) and the list\\n//     of corridor cells between them.  Cost = number of steps from A to B\\n//     (== corridor length + 1).\\n//   * SUBNET — one of the four main quadrants.  Every node has a subnet.\\n//   * GATEWAY EDGE — an edge whose two endpoints sit in different subnets.\\n//     Per puzzle constraint there is exactly one gateway edge between each\\n//     pair of adjacent subnets.  We mark the rooms on either side of that\\n//     unique passage as nodes (gateways) so routing always has a node at the\\n//     subnet boundary.\\n//\\n// Storage (state.routing — built lazily, keyed off state, mutated in place):\\n//   nodes:      Map<roomKey, { x, y, exitCount, subnet, isGateway }>\\n//   edges:      Map<edgeId, { aKey, bKey, dirsFromA[], rooms[], cost,\\n//                              isGateway }>\\n//   nodeEdges:  Map<roomKey, Set<edgeId>>\\n//   roomToEdge: Map<roomKey, edgeId>     // for corridor cells only\\n//   edgeBetween:Map<\\\"aKey|bKey\\\", edgeId> // canonical-ordered key\\n//   nextEdgeId: integer counter\\n//\\n// The graph is updated incrementally on every recordLabRoom via\\n// updateLabRoutingForRoom.  No full-graph rebuild is ever needed: each room\\n// update only touches edges that pass through its corridor.\\n//\\n// Path queries: labRoutingDijkstra(state, fromKey) returns a distance/parent\\n// map; routeRoomNext tables translate that route into one-step movement.\\n// =============================================================================\\n\\n// Initialise (or return) the routing graph attached to a labyrinth state.\\n//\\n// frontierStubs (NEW): per-frontier entry { parentNodeKey, dirsFromNode,\\n// rooms, finalDir, cost, subnet }.  Tracks every UNEXPLORED room we know a\\n// path to from one of our explored routing nodes.  This is what lets\\n// routing answer frontier-lookup queries directly — no BFS travel-map walk\\n// needed — and gives the picker an O(1) \\\"every reachable frontier\\\" iterator\\n// keyed off the routing graph instead of a separate frontierKeys index.\\nfunction ensureLabRouting(state) {\\n  if (!state) return null\\n  if (!state.routing) {\\n    state.routing = {\\n      nodes: new Map(),\\n      edges: new Map(),\\n      nodeEdges: new Map(),\\n      roomToEdge: new Map(),\\n      edgeBetween: new Map(),\\n      // For each frontier (unexplored) room: the routing-graph attachment\\n      // through which it can be reached.  Key = frontier roomKey.\\n      // Value = {\\n      //   parentNodeKey: routing node we'd walk to first,\\n      //   dirsFromNode: dir sequence from parentNodeKey to the room JUST\\n      //                 before stepping into the frontier (== the explored\\n      //                 parent room of the frontier),\\n      //   finalDir: the single dir step from that explored parent into the\\n      //             frontier room itself,\\n      //   cost: total step count from parentNodeKey to the frontier,\\n      //   subnet: subnet of the frontier room (for modeMapOnly gating)\\n      // }\\n      frontierStubs: new Map(),\\n      nextEdgeId: 1,\\n      revision: 0,\\n      routeCache: new Map()\\n    }\\n  } else {\\n    if (!Number.isInteger(state.routing.revision)) state.routing.revision = 0\\n    if (!(state.routing.routeCache instanceof Map)) state.routing.routeCache = new Map()\\n    if (!(state.routing.frontierStubs instanceof Map)) state.routing.frontierStubs = new Map()\\n  }\\n  return state.routing\\n}\\n\\nfunction bumpLabRoutingRevision(state) {\\n  const routing = ensureLabRouting(state)\\n  if (!routing) return\\n  routing.revision = (Number.isInteger(routing.revision) ? routing.revision : 0) + 1\\n}\\n\\nfunction rememberLabRoutingRoute(routing, key, route) {\\n  if (!(routing?.routeCache instanceof Map) || !key || !route) return route\\n  routing.routeCache.set(key, route)\\n  const maxRoutes = 64\\n  while (routing.routeCache.size > maxRoutes) {\\n    const oldest = routing.routeCache.keys().next().value\\n    routing.routeCache.delete(oldest)\\n  }\\n  return route\\n}\\n\\n// Number of open exits on `room`.  -1 if room/exits missing.\\nfunction countLabRoomExits(room) {\\n  if (!room?.exits) return -1\\n  let n = 0\\n  if (room.exits.north === true) n++\\n  if (room.exits.south === true) n++\\n  if (room.exits.east === true) n++\\n  if (room.exits.west === true) n++\\n  return n\\n}\\n\\n// True when `room` has at least one open exit that crosses a quadrant\\n// boundary into a different subnet.
